body:
One more time | Fellow American,

What’s going on?

Some of the most influential America First leaders in the COUNTRY are about to convene a MAJOR strategy meeting for the 2024 election, BUT we can’t seem to locate YOUR response to the [**Official Canvass.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e851e9b979db459db6ea7d1782c3ee99&_e=i6eXi9fPdptfO9KbhvlzEcDGKun7QYkikQAa4jtlvE6I7YV7BHmVa8WjmesAEJgOb3-mm-bkj1nQY_T5OYMWV-rpAltW80qKZf08o0XZoIaB_2bHwc_zdbtDKt6X4h5dQA8105Ns8HHFwAGn0RM8U2tG-CqOjKiBL3D-nSa8HHm5ECegyY-gyzn_-bn9LZUfy1D9rl5ACYjz7FjnkcaPhZooC1KwP6G5Celt5aFTnSWaRRSlUUY2Dc_XbIr7AEyLHqmj-EtxNNIXprx0dQWQJLqZflxFREbq3d2JRLr-fdhtg5uzBj349zT96ttKKnKyoyri6INaa33TDwKTPGLLfi2-pUvybTG6HeowlwdOzQhW0XSD54n3aFIkaYlGjtAijjbXgmZN1gmxXGGk_sW2i1g_DE7tdHqc5jbE0beFBgsdNn0x8ibTJM6pDOS4WQh7)

[**Without YOUR answers to the crucial Canvass, our Party risks losing in 2024 and our country with it.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e851e9b979db459db6ea7d1782c3ee99&_e=i6eXi9fPdptfO9KbhvlzEcDGKun7QYkikQAa4jtlvE6I7YV7BHmVa8WjmesAEJgOb3-mm-bkj1nQY_T5OYMWV-rpAltW80qKZf08o0XZoIaB_2bHwc_zdbtDKt6X4h5dQA8105Ns8HHFwAGn0RM8U2tG-CqOjKiBL3D-nSa8HHm5ECegyY-gyzn_-bn9LZUfy1D9rl5ACYjz7FjnkcaPhZooC1KwP6G5Celt5aFTnSWaRRSlUUY2Dc_XbIr7AEyLHqmj-EtxNNIXprx0dQWQJLqZflxFREbq3d2JRLr-fdjHosRg4rL4hVJy2bL7rQfH-CyKllfKQCUWMlWwIndP6D7DPF6vV2ryZv2qOyRkPlnnY6wZ-3CsdScgGrym0aEfnIPV5vUNUqWqX1Ghrd5iZFNL8v6WNGzgWVsWusBnDCqe6VI3FvQssIo64aWVhqOp)

name: Wes Moore
subject: Announcing my endorsement
body:
Friend, I’m proud to announce my endorsement of Angela Alsobrooks for Senate right here in Maryland.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231023-1?refcode=em20231023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231023-1?refcode=em20231023]

The world needs America’s leadership now more than ever, the country needs Maryland’s leadership now more than ever, and that leader is Angela.
For Angela, this work isn’t political. It’s personal. Angela loves Maryland because she’s lived here her whole life. Angela fights for working families because she grew up in a working family.

Angela wants every young Marylander to achieve success because she’s a working mom who would do anything for the success of her daughter.
As Angela runs statewide for the first time, it’ll take a lot of resources early on to set the foundation to win. Join me today in supporting Angela for the Senate by making a contribution toward her campaign right now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231023-1?refcode=em20231023]

When Angela puts her mind to something, she gets results, and she has the track record to prove it. This is exactly the type of senator we need in Maryland.

Angela is someone who sets out to make her community, and the whole state, a better place to live and work. Maryland deserves a senator who will work day in and day out for fair wages, affordable health care, the right to choose, and quality education for every single child in Maryland.
I am proud to endorse Angela today because I know she is the best person to represent the Old Line state. I am honored to support my friend in her race for the Senate. I am supporting her because of what she would mean for the Senate, and a contribution right now is the best way to show her Team Wes is on her side. 100% of your contribution will support Angela’s campaign — make a donation today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231023-1?refcode=em20231023]

Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231023-1?refcode=em20231023]

Elevate,

Wes Moore

---
This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Wes Moore for Maryland

We have to keep pace if we want to save America in 2024... | Friend, Just a couple months ago, liberal activists were flooding our district registering new voters as part of a $1M initiative paid for by Florida Democrats and their radical chairwoman, Nikki Fried. Now, after reporting a huge Q3 fundraising haul, they're about to pour even more money into left-wing mobilization efforts across the Sunshine State. So we're reactivating our in order to keep pace with the Democrats and ensure the return of the AMERICA FIRST agenda remains right on schedule. Given that FL-19 is flooded with America First patriots, the ONLY way for the left to remove me from Congress is to directly interfere in our electoral process here. So, unsurprisingly, that is exactly what Nikki Fried and her socialist party intend to do. And they have the unwavering support of Joe Biden and his liberal SWAMP cronies in Washington as they do everything in their power to oust me from this seat next November. But we have an obligation to put the future of our great nation above all else - whether the woke mob likes it or not. Friend, I will NEVER back down to the corrupt DC SWAMP as these traitors put America's best interests on the backburner in order to fulfill their own special interests. Thank you, Rep. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates.

clean_body: Republicans across the nation are working tirelessly to keep control of the Virginia House. We’re calling on all of our grassroots donors to help Democrats flip control. | | | | | ---|--- The results of this November's elections in Virginia will determine the path our country takes for years to come. That’s why Hillary Clinton is calling on grassroots Democrats, including you, to make a difference: For the past two years, our Democratic majority in the state Senate has acted as a barrier against Virginia Republicans' dangerous agenda. But we risk losing this essential check on GOP power if Democrats are defeated next month. Virginia Republicans have already rolled back voting rights, and their proposed budget favors tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy. If the GOP flips the state Senate and keeps control of the House, abortion rights could be first up on the chopping block. Their far-right governor has already endorsed plans to threaten abortion doctors with jail time – it's horrible. The stakes are high, and we cannot afford to lose. This team has stepped up time and time again to help drive our mission forward, so we know you'll come through this year, too. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you for everything. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jim=20Walsh?=
subject: October 27th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
We have a great evening planned for you!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

subject: I know what it takes

body:
Jirair is running for Congress because there is so much at stake to ensure everyone in our community has equal opportunities and a fair shot to chase their own dream. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/zXToNFXV4kioy6WMrocbTQ2?unsubscribedata=Kqs6gvNE16k57A1OwvdOpOcgi6BnSFCAkO5Dxidt2VVsNCX8SKUnxZOBSVClSkJBWV7suEIq4NthCqke5aRZKuftZcfVmrnM0a%2FGGxh8XguwchYBC464Hidp97ReU6Jsk1G5vgdOvaup0VWEBYQGkZMOc5P9KzwrHKn%2FQeOHy0OOM4yTIcC4hTM0QHpD%2BHdY%2BJwtz2by4OI3esS5rCf1RTe3sFcdHqZjKLV4DFU%2BOGn6uTBeNOc%2B%2FLvZAEh2AkTkrGnNvCXcz696F%2BZ4OX0vbDRla6etyqR4eXiK%2FzZWby86FXGLPGUjXCxRjhpdCXy1avTQOM3BeeV11L%2BOAYLKZWmOwkU2kfkZ44YLOkHRJsxTwwmRQ6UEfLUub3udp2RHMZF6XQPJvrBMxqc4ET633TIKJMA1oKm%2FYVnJvxY49bSDBg6cMlUPKigWu7a1ygV8)
---
| |
---
Hi Peter — it’s Jirair for Congress here.

**I’ll be frank. Congress is broken.**

Last month, they narrowly avoided a shutdown because Republicans refused to work across the aisle. This month, the House is in utter disarray because Republican extremists are trying to hijack the Speakership.

Think about the issues you care about the most: LGBTQ+ rights, healthcare, funding our schools. When Congress is broken and dysfunctional, the people’s work fails to get done. | [Help stop the dysfunction →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72076736/434209431/-377887102?amount=20&refcode=SBD_JR_EM_FR_102323_1_1_Congress&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTU4MDc0MWUtMTE3Mi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fJi9bdQlYw3DMIJ7NzTIwebG3GRaE7tSQo4WvGIO5f0=)
---
There are at least 14 other candidates in this congressional primary. Out of all of those candidates, **I have the most federal experience.** From serving as Legislative Director for Congresswoman Barbara Lee to acting as a senior health advisor to President Biden, **I know how Washington works** and what needs to change to help make Los Angeles better, more prosperous, and more equal. And I know what it takes to end the dysfunction.

But even with all its dysfunction, I am not cynical about Congress. During my time in Washington, I have witnessed and been part of changes I never thought I would see. We NEED to make the House of Representatives work better – and represent the needs and diversity of Los Angeles.

Peter, I'm asking for your support today. **[My finance director has informed me that I’m behind on fundraising for this month and I need to raise $5000 by Wednesday if I’m going to catch up. Will you help me bridge the gap so that I can afford to pay staff, print door-knocking literature, and all of those critical things my campaign needs to keep the lights on?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72076737/434209432/-377887102?amount=20&refcode=SBD_JR_EM_FR_102323_1_1_Congress&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTU4MDc0MWUtMTE3Mi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fJi9bdQlYw3DMIJ7NzTIwebG3GRaE7tSQo4WvGIO5f0=)**

clean_body: Jirair is running for Congress because there is so much at stake to ensure everyone in our community has equal opportunities and a fair shot to chase their own dream. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi Peter — it’s Jirair for Congress here. I’ll be frank. Congress is broken. Last month, they narrowly avoided a shutdown because Republicans refused to work across the aisle. This month, the House is in utter disarray because Republican extremists are trying to hijack the Speakership. Think about the issues you care about the most: LGBTQ+ rights, healthcare, funding our schools. When Congress is broken and dysfunctional, the people’s work fails to get done. | = There are at least 14 other candidates in this congressional primary. Out of all of those candidates, I have the most federal experience. From serving as Legislative Director for Congresswoman Barbara Lee to acting as a senior health advisor to President Biden, I know how Washington works and what needs to change to help make Los Angeles better, more prosperous, and more equal. And I know what it takes to end the dysfunction. But even with all its dysfunction, I am not cynical about Congress. During my time in Washington, I have witnessed and been part of changes I never thought I would see. We NEED to make the House of Representatives work better – and represent the needs and diversity of Los Angeles. Peter, I'm asking for your support today. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Now more than ever, I need your support. Thank you, Jirair * | = Meet Jirair An experienced federal policy leader, public health doctor and progressive voice for change, Jirair has dedicated his life to helping others and spent his career bringing diverse communities together to solve big challenges. Let's Build A Campaign Together That Lifts Up Every Californian. | = Paid for and authorized by Jirair Ratevosian for Congress Jirair Ratevosian for Congress 321 N. Pass Ave Box 133 Burbank, CA 91505 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

| | Patriot,

---
Today, I officially filed our paperwork to run for President of the United States in the VERY FIRST PRIMARY of the 2024 election – New Hampshire. Big deal!
---
_**But even on a big day like today, I can still make time to check in on our Houston contest as we prepare to pick a winner to be my VIP Guest for my major November reception!**_

---
Because you’re a loyal supporter, I wanted to give you a courtesy reminder that TONIGHT before 11:59 P.M. is your last chance to enter my contest to be my VIP.

---
Your favorite president (ME) will take care of everything for his VIP (plus a guest of your choice).
---
_Your flights, your hotel, hors d'oeuvres and refreshments, and your tickets to the event – all on me!_

---
**All I ask is that you make a campaign contribution on this important day of our official paperwork filing for the first primary of the 2024 election to be automatically entered to win.**

---
**AND THERE’S ONE MORE THING I HAVE TO ADD – There is NO minimum contribution needed to be automatically entered to win.**

_With our contests,___everyone__ _has an equal shot at winning._

name: Huffines Liberty Foundatiom
subject: More Corporate Welfare in the Texas Constitution
body:
Six Propositions on the November 7 Ballot
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-vjypdd-yuddtktydi-f/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vjypdd-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## More Corporate Welfare in the Texas Constitution,
Six Propositions on the November 7 Ballot
[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vjypdd-yuddtktydi-y/) DALLAS, TX, October 23, 2023 -- The beginning of modern corporate welfare in Texas began on November 3, 1987, when 51.7 percent of Texas voters approved Proposition 4, which allowed Texas state and local governments to give taxpayer money to private individuals and businesses for the purpose of "economic development."Since then, Texas has given tens of billions of dollars to businesses that prefer to take money from taxpayers rather than earn it from consumers.On November 7 (_early voting starts today_), Texans will be asked to approve six amendments to the Texas Constitution that will send another $7.8 billion to various businesses.This amount of spending would have violated the Texas Constitution's prohibition against increasing state spending faster than economic growth.So rather than vote to "bust" the spending limit themselves, Texas politicians decided to ask voters to do it for them.**What can you do about it? Retweet and share these tweets to educate your friends and family:**
1. [Click here for tweet 1](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vjypdd-yuddtktydi-j/)
2. [Click here for tweet 2](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vjypdd-yuddtktydi-t/)
3. [Click here for tweet 3](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vjypdd-yuddtktydi-h/)

These educational posts are also on the Huffines Liberty Foundation's Facebook and Instagram pages.**Learn about the six propositions today:** [Read Paper](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vjypdd-yuddtktydi-k/) The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of **liberty** , **prosperity** , and **virtue** in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.###
### _Help us advance liberty and prosperity in Texas:_
[Donate](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vjypdd-yuddtktydi-u/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vjypdd-yuddtktydi-o/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vjypdd-yuddtktydi-b/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vjypdd-yuddtktydi-n/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vjypdd-yuddtktydi-p/) | [ Share ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-fb-vjypdd-yuddtktydi-z/) | [ Tweet ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-tw-vjypdd-yuddtktydi-v/) | [ Forward ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-yuddtktydi-17329976-vjypdd-l-e)

name: Christine Drazan
subject: Gov. Kotek's Education Board unanimously shelves grad standards
body:
[](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xohyn-dihkkhuuli-r/) Friend,Last week, we asked you to email the Oregon Board of Education to**** oppose suspension of graduation standards. _**Over 1,400 of you answered the call and told the Board how you feel about proficiency standards in our schools.**_ Thank you for supporting students._**Shockingly, despite your activism, the Board voted unanimously to scrap these standards!**_ Why was it such an easy vote for them? **Because they answer to Governor Kotek, not you. Kotek has appointed 6 of the 9 members of the Board.** These unelected bureaucrats chose to ignore public comment and continue down a path that neglects their primary responsibility to help students meet high standards. **Friend, thank you for doing your part in protecting our schools and our children.** This decision ultimately boils down to bad leadership. The people in charge seem to forget they are there to advance student's interests, not their own agendas.Friend, I promise we will continue to fight for our children, for our schools, and for our communities. I am so grateful to know we are in this fight together. Christine Drazan [](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xohyn-dihkkhuuli-y/)[](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xohyn-dihkkhuuli-j/)[](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xohyn-dihkkhuuli-t/)[](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xohyn-dihkkhuuli-i/) | [Preferences](https://andor.updatemyprofile.com/y-xohyn-172B6299-dihkkhuuli-d) | [Unsubscribe](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-u-xohyn-dihkkhuuli-h/)

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: President Trump gave me a mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
To fulfill it, I’m going to need your help...
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3a0oej4jjc2oilgg7091u3oe9vkt3ilfvr5hd4g_rp22sh2s8i66p70shgmaoj2cth2bs)
---
President Trump gave me a mission.

Friend,
---
President Trump has entrusted me with one of Republicans most important missions in 2024: **Defending our razor-thin 4-seat Republican House majority.**
---
That battle will be won or lost right here in New York.
---
With the radical Left targeting 5 New York Republican Representatives in toss-up races, New York alone could single-handedly decide the balance of power in the House.
---
**The Democrats see New York as the simplest path for them to win back the majority, and they’re unleashing their historic war chest on the Empire State.**
---
_A Soros-funded super PAC has launched a record-breaking $45 MILLION “New York Fund” to BUY these 5 key congressional races – and by doing so, hand control of the House to Hakeem Jeffries, Nancy Pelosi, and the rest of the Socialists!_
---
All that cash will be spent on direct mail pieces and TV ads pushing left-wing lies, research to help concoct witch hunts against Republicans, and programs to register liberal voters for ballot harvesting.
---
**President Trump and I agree: Republicans MUST respond to this massive investment by building a RED WALL to defend New York. **
---
That’s why I’m officially launching our own “New York Republican Defense Fund” to help us level the playing field against this staggering $45 MILLION spend...
---

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Are you with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=de9906e46987f130b38d2719f7133626322917498e13c5a3eb9f5342ad4ca6f27a663d58b4f7f9df72f10d04cb8b6e6beee67817ebfe57d22a1203e320aa8fd95b34fa7bd86e17e71b60f158c43e4fab

Friend,

We don't do political empty calories down here in Florida. We don't do the sideshow. We don't do the drama. We just deliver results across the board.

Since I took office, we've been able to deliver on so many issues: from paying down debt, cutting taxes, school choice, standing up to the CCP, you name it. Heck, we just brought people back from Israel. When everyone else was dragging their feet, we got it done.

I’m tired of the empty promises that politicians have repeatedly made to the people that elect them to office. Their drama is leading to NO results for Americans. While we’ve got an open border, skyrocketing prices, crime running through the streets our kids play on, and rising instability across the world, federal leaders cannot get their act together.

I’d like you to help me teach them a lesson and usher in a reckoning of accountability and discipline to D.C., I need your help NOW.

Visit my site to chip in to my cause:
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96bc21818f5c30acc9a810b7dcd0b1863d52f95828f9ccff72bf6f31eb5ea25446db54194fffe7893e8a2c008ccd310a2441f618b159d9bc46c0a5535e471111
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96bc21818f5c30ac01aed4a3cced0f50906a81f6f97204aca20d5ca3789062abb9c135ce966417c023d56966a8679defbcd9627a98e66a46894eebeadd94310b

Talk is not enough for this country. In 2025, we will be all about action. We will STOP this palace intrigue, focus on the American people, and deliver. No excuses. I can promise you, this is the framework we’re going to work from in D.C. when I’m President.

To make sure we’re able to achieve this, I am going to need you to continue standing firm in your support for our campaign. We have one year until Election Day... and after that, we have EIGHT YEARS to get this country back on track.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96bc21818f5c30acdff68b1bfaad8de36af59aef312e3a6fa7668ad65c52e3093b595a61845230977888af2b4f8bdec3fba44a7164db6207d6e951704842bdea

Ron DeSantis

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96bc21818f5c30ac8329d1a595cbb560dc5977fe578ddf58a537de53114f78d47df7355e6fcccd0f8cd562c0cea7db2a633642487931abd09b4530ef965efa76
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96bc21818f5c30acc9a810b7dcd0b1863d52f95828f9ccff72bf6f31eb5ea25446db54194fffe7893e8a2c008ccd310a2441f618b159d9bc46c0a5535e471111

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96bc21818f5c30acc9a810b7dcd0b1863d52f95828f9ccff72bf6f31eb5ea25446db54194fffe7893e8a2c008ccd310a2441f618b159d9bc46c0a5535e471111

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

We don't do the sideshow. We don't do the drama. We just deliver results across the board. Since I took office, we've been able to deliver on so many issues: from paying down debt, cutting taxes, school choice, standing up to the CCP, you name it. Heck, we just brought people back from Israel. When everyone else was dragging their feet, we got it done. I’m tired of the empty promises that politicians have repeatedly made to the people that elect them to office. Their drama is leading to NO results for Americans. name: Conservative Intel
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWvbLjkiQN

I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of
their heroes. For those people-and you may be among them-I'm
thrilled to share a digital

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWvbLjkiQN

Dear
Friend,

I hear
from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their
heroes. For those people-and you may be among them-I'm thrilled
to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you,
absolutely free: "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the
Rich."

"Tax cuts
for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower
tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy
Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the
federal government?

Hoover
Institution Senior Fellow Thomas Sowell takes an empirical
approach in his commentary, "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts
for the Rich."

Sowell
separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses
real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all
actually lead to greater revenue for the government.

As a
friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to
offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of
charge. Click here to get your free copy of "Trickle Down" Theory
and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" now.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

subject: Reminder: Team McDow Suspends, Moves to Massachusetts
body:
Keep Maryland in your prayers!
| | |

# McDow Suspending Campaign Relocating To Massachusetts
---
| | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001e0aWBOLXkdyGAX2hHP3y3N5Hzto33O60hOY7JwJ17ENw-bkI-MAgZKHxN_Xw331Hrs6i2R95-LeP-V1E_OBwaYmiwlOD0PBsbvMMfcqLy03UOPW52lxEsPftkAymk0TR4L0OpkJr5T3B9_Mg0lNHfJKU2SHXX5e5&c=iF2SqPpEQ2XnIbG4USsIcxjSEMj3yPqj4_Z2WjRmkhD8XeMJ2dJF0Q==&ch=L8au34g-wX_fYicVmXcSgjhi3SKYq2h9guBxb8sLA44QKuB3361OZg==)
---
| |
---
|
---
| Monrovia, MD - Stephen R. McDow II Suspends Maryland US Congressional race to return to Massachusetts
It is with sadness I suspend my efforts to seek the Maryland 6th Congressional seat currently held by Representative David Trone. The needs in the district are real and unlike all the other candidates we listened to the people of the 6th. Together we developed 24 policy objectives and know we are well positioned to win. The needs in the 6th are not about left versus right. Rather, they are about widening educational access points; supporting and uplifting small businesses, stamping out human trafficking, and more!
I enjoyed engaging with small business owners, laborers, unions like Local 616, IBEW and the Frederick Teachers Association, as well as the Women's Rights Coalition, Angela Batista, Judy Carbone and the Garrett County Democrats and all the stakeholders who make democracy work in Maryland. I remain humbled by our endorsement by the Forward Party and personally speaking on a virtual panel with former Presidential candidate Andrew Yang. Also, I'm energized by the fact that Andrew was inspired to give based on my authenticity and originality. As a Democrat endorsed by Forward, I knew this new affiliation would position me as more of an Independent thinker. I didn't know it would cause such deep consternation amongst the establishment. As matter of principle, I should say that I reject the aggression and hostility experienced by my wife and I at the hands of Democrats - a party that my family helped build. I am profoundly concerned with the treatment delivered to us by Black Democrats. As a Christian, I forgive you and look forward to our return to the Massachusetts state family.
My decision to leave the race is not easy with victory feeling so close. However, I made a promise to Rebecca and my family that above all they come first. Rebecca has accepted a position with Army Command and Intelligence in Massachusetts and we will return as a family to my 5-generation family home on Martha's Vineyard. During this time, I will focus on ensuring our teen boys transition back to island life, my wife adjusts back to New England life; and I engage with the citizens of the Cape and Islands, Boston metro, and across Massachusetts.
Returning to Massachusetts and New England feels more home now than ever - Especially since both my family homes in Washington, DC are no longer occupied or owned by family. We have deep roots in Massachusetts and look forward to reconnecting and boldly moving forward together.

Best,
Stephen R. McDow II & Committee To Elect Stephen McDow

clean_body: Keep Maryland in your prayers! | | | | | McDow Suspending Campaign Relocating To Massachusetts | | == | | | | Monrovia, MD - Stephen R. McDow II Suspends Maryland US Congressional race to return to Massachusetts It is with sadness I suspend my efforts to seek the Maryland 6th Congressional seat currently held by Representative David Trone. The needs in the district are real and unlike all the other candidates we listened to the people of the 6th. Together we developed 24 policy objectives and know we are well positioned to win. The needs in the 6th are not about left versus right. Rather, they are about widening educational access points; supporting and uplifting small businesses, stamping out human trafficking, and more! I enjoyed engaging with small business owners, laborers, unions like Local 616, IBEW and the Frederick Teachers Association, as well as the Women's Rights Coalition, Angela Batista, Judy Carbone and the Garrett County Democrats and all the stakeholders who make democracy work in Maryland. I remain humbled by our endorsement by the Forward Party and personally speaking on a virtual panel with former Presidential candidate Andrew Yang. Also, I'm energized by the fact that Andrew was inspired to give based on my authenticity and originality. As a Democrat endorsed by Forward, I knew this new affiliation would position me as more of an Independent thinker. I didn't know it would cause such deep consternation amongst the establishment. As matter of principle, I should say that I reject the aggression and hostility experienced by my wife and I at the hands of Democrats - a party that my family helped build. I am profoundly concerned with the treatment delivered to us by Black Democrats. As a Christian, I forgive you and look forward to our return to the Massachusetts state family. My decision to leave the race is not easy with victory feeling so close. However, I made a promise to Rebecca and my family that above all they come first. Rebecca has accepted a position with Army Command and Intelligence in Massachusetts and we will return as a family to my 5-generation family home on Martha's Vineyard. During this time, I will focus on ensuring our teen boys transition back to island life, my wife adjusts back to New England life; and I engage with the citizens of the Cape and Islands, Boston metro, and across Massachusetts. Returning to Massachusetts and New England feels more home now than ever - Especially since both my family homes in Washington, DC are no longer occupied or owned by family. We have deep roots in Massachusetts and look forward to reconnecting and boldly moving forward together. Best, Stephen R. McDow II & Committee To Elect Stephen McDow | | == == == == == == | | | | | | | | | Committee To Elect Stephen McDow | 4009 Tranquility Court, Monrovia, MD 21770 | | Sent by mailto:votestephen@mcdowforcongress.com powered by

name: Team D'Esposito
subject: total disregard for the will of the people
body:
Peter,

The Democrats are showing a complete disregard for the concerns of New York voters!

A recent poll unveils a stark reality:

72% of New Yorkers are vehemently against the Democrats' plan to manipulate our congressional district lines. Even more concerning is that a staggering 81% of voters believe they are attempting to game the system.

A decade ago, New Yorkers decisively voted to create an impartial redistricting process, eliminating political interference.

However, just last year, Kathy Hochul and the Albany Democrats brazenly ignored the voters' wishes, resulting in the courts rejecting their partisan gerrymandering scheme.

HELP PROTECT YOUR VOTE → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=first+button&utm_campaign=Fight+Against+Redistricting]

Now, they're resorting to a dubious lawsuit to achieve their unjust objectives.

Our battle against the Democrats extends far beyond the courtroom. We must ensure every New Yorker is fully aware of their actions and how little they value our opinions.

We need resources to disseminate this vital message, and we're counting on your support.

Please consider contributing to our cause [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Help+Me+Defeat+The+Radical+Left+Email] to help us expose the Democrats' assault on the rights of New York voters.

| | | The next Republican presidential primary debate will take place on NBC, on November 8. No doubt Trump will skip this one too, but that doesn’t mean there will be any shortage of lies and misinformation from the other candidates on the debate stage. We can most likely count on a ton of BS and conspiracy theories from the likes of Ron DeSantis, Mike Pence, and others, so we need the debate moderators to call out these lies in real time. Boldly, directly, and unambiguously. This is their job. They need to do it. They can't just allow lies to be broadcast on live TV. Add your name now: [Tell moderators of the Republican presidential debate to fact-check the candidates in real time >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T051b985c-d235-4803-a68a-9fbf2532fc51/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Donald Trump will again counter-program the GOP presidential debate, this time scheduling a rally in Hialeah, Florida—an area with many Hispanic voters—at the same time as the third debate on Nov. 8 in Miami.

# TUESDAY, OCTOBER 24, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** On this date in 1861, the first transcontinental telegraph was sent from San Francisco to Washington D.C. It marked the end of the Pony Express, previously the only way to send messages from east to west. [Here's a map of the Pony Express route](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DGOqzAQgOHTmA40HtsQFy4iPdHlbbklcsw4zMrgiIzCptmzr5R6D_Drl77Py3SJXHi7_Y8rBcl1ikn4SZOGFm2LZrLNHDIRkmko6N6ftEMNpllCD_21dzrrwXnQvaXBJPSQINohO-cbDghoNKAF76zDDp32MZ8IMhCZU1IWaGape_dVeZOFcnnVJ-1dqmtTwiJyfyhzVjgqHI_j6EpN3a0-FY4stCocpc7x1fLWLvyQur8UjjVJvdLeon13RpnzjzJnoW9R5t_H1uxhvh9cCj_6QVm4rZHL-yh_A_wGAAD__0RqWeE). ## Trump Rally to Compete with Debate
Donald Trump will again [counter-program the GOP presidential debate](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGu4yAQAL_G7oiWBWwoKK5Jl2uvtDAs8d7hYGEuUf7-Ka9-5Wia0fy5LbfAhR_332En33NdQuz8pEWCQC1QLXpMPhMhqZG8nJyVBiWocfMQV-UcWJr0tBpnCCetLUhlKUeT1MgeAZUE1OCMNnhBI13IliADkbJx0ECJe22Xv5UffaNc3vVJ7RLrPha_9X6cg_o14HXAazge9Do_6gOtcyw04LW3__shzn98nKJv3JK410MkWkMnkUttnIJooZS3CBTmlWZIMSSS0qC1cc5ojZRzdhrH5tPx4lL4nOZBw30PXL5b-s9rvgIAAP__9N9kEw), this time scheduling a rally in Hialeah, Florida--an area with many Hispanic voters--at the same time as the third debate on Nov. 8 in Miami. NBC is hosting the debate this time, and so far, only four candidates have qualified: Trump, Ron DeSantis, Nikki Haley, and Vivek Ramaswamy. ## NY Times Admits Errors in Gaza Coverage
The New York Times has walked back its initial coverage of the hospital bombing in Gaza, admitting in [an unusual editor's note](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz79ugzAQgPGnMZuR7_wnZPDQhS1dOyJjjuDK2JE5BfH2VTt3_oZPv6_H9Agpp_L8DDt5XusUIqc3TaAkGol6Mt3iVyIk3ZEHdx_AIijdbR6GeVFAFBXcnBnUGp2dw-wgzDA4DF3yqFCDQqPu1ljs0cI9rAOpVRHpIQqjaElcW_9dU-GN1nzVN7U-1r3LfmN-HUJ_CBwFjud59lfYav2tAkcqTI1DKjsVFjgWeUlOOx3yCNchU4m1NYosweobgnW233jPXfPL60w5p8PdhFHPPaT8N-T__T8BAAD__1ExXD0) that it "relied too heavily on claims" made by Hamas. Other news organizations, [including AP and Reuters,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFurDAQheGnMZ3ReGy8ULi4Dd3eNiUyZoBJDEZgrbV5-ojU6f7iSJ90Pp7D03PkffnvN3J5ToMPmV80KJBoJOrBVJObiZB0RU7ZrlUNKtDV6kLXjI0eTQgjmNE_Qmtbix7sZDtPNFXsEFArQANdYxqssVGdn1uCGYh0G4QBmjins_5MvOeV5vhOLzrrkLYqujXn4xL6n8BeYF9KqY8UOXNI90Bgv1O5BPa3IrBXcPddi__2ck3XwdlHuVOR73R-ycwbXRJAIXatrU43HYVj5Ms-hIFl8xx_5fz3ET8BAAD__xA4XSQ) did the same, accepting Hamas' claim that the blast was a "horrific massacre" by the Israelis. The media operations now say all evidence points to an errant Gaza missile landing in the hospital parking lot. The Times says its coverage left readers with an "incorrect impression." Critics pointed out that the Times still employs a [Mideast correspondent who praised Adolf Hitler](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOwyAQBNCvwR0RLODEBcU17nLtldaevcQbYbAAJfLfn5z6upFGehrNz326I0dOj2_cyLeQJ5wbv2jSSoKVYCbbLT4QAZmOvO6Hm3aglelWr2FwRv3OTmttF4uh12o2BORogCv2HXtQYLQCqwZnHVzA6QHDjVRQROY2C6to4ZbL5Zk5tZVCPPKLymXOWxf92tpehfkSMAoY07Hn2s5KwHjCAkatPlnAuHKLVORekCunh6w58oZJrvx8HnI-1Sq5FqQoV9ywyjcWGXKR6WgCxq74ZX9zjFz7q7DqsSHHz472_y1_AQAA___d-mL4) several times on Facebook.
## Off-Duty Pilot Tries to Crash Passenger Jet
An off-duty Alaska Airlines pilot was [charged with 83 counts of attempted murder](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1uhDAQBOCnMZ2RfzlcuEhDd2lTIp9ZH5szGJkN6N4-InW6TxppNJqv-3gPmHF9foYFPKUyhkh4wCgFV4YrPZpm8glAgW7Ay8710iopdDP7m7TJGvMQHQSnHzerY3LBdb2RMWlnG_RKKC2FMsJZY1WrrHQh9SCSANB9ZEbAhFRq-11wpRlSfpcDahvL0mQ_E2070x9MDUwN53m2cX3EK2RquKqZGqS4fCnksL8CD1gzrrDzDXMhPuEBlXaeMj5n4iERVL5D_KlIb05zhUAcVx5LfG1I7UxLbqqfthNzxr27MSOeS8D8t4n-v-g3AAD__-0DaCQ) after trying to crash a flight to San Francisco by turning off the engines. The actual pilots stopped him and made an emergency landing in Portland. The off-duty pilot, 44-year-old Joseph Emerson, was in the jump seat in the cockpit when he tried to interfere with the engines. After subduing him, the pilots asked law enforcement to meet them when they landed in Portland. The Alaska Airlines plane, operated by Horizon Air, was [carrying 80 passengers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOtCAURp8GOwxcEbWg-Bu7-dstDSMXvbMIBpgx-_abmXq7L_lykpPzdVtulgLF7b890FSfFrtWeuEiBQfFoVtU44xHBOwaNFJPo-xBiq7ZzTQ4dCAF3gffOa21l0rrQdzVMDo56oYMCOikACWmXvXQQi8n60cUXiB248qUQEc15faRKNYdffhJL8ztmo4mmL3Ws7DuH4OZwXxdV7veS8SrvH8G83symG2w5dtySzlQxMJ9oG2v3NELc0XHz5RrsNHxlHFLkT-ex8kL2srL_qwc4_bBXLoig7nJxp0XhUBFD0yJ7bAUPkL17z6_AQAA__8kb2lz) and four crew members from Everett, Washington, to S.F. No injuries were reported, and the motive remains unclear.

clean_body: Donald Trump will again counter-program the GOP presidential debate, this time scheduling a rally in Hialeah, Florida—an area with many Hispanic voters—at the same time as the third debate on Nov. 8 in Miami. | | | | | | TUESDAY, OCTOBER 24, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! On this date in 1861, the first transcontinental telegraph was sent from San Francisco to Washington D.C. It marked the end of the Pony Express, previously the only way to send messages from east to west. . Want to comment on a story? Head over to our . Want to help The Flyover keep taking off? Check out our sponsor, . | Trump Rally to Compete with Debate Donald Trump will again , this time scheduling a rally in Hialeah, Florida--an area with many Hispanic voters--at the same time as the third debate on Nov. 8 in Miami. NBC is hosting the debate this time, and so far, only four candidates have qualified: Trump, Ron DeSantis, Nikki Haley, and Vivek Ramaswamy. to reach the polling and donation goals. Trump remains the front-runner by a large margin, with 58% support. with 12.3%, and Haley is just behind at 11%, according to the latest USA Today poll. NY Times Admits Errors in Gaza Coverage The New York Times has walked back its initial coverage of the hospital bombing in Gaza, admitting in that it "relied too heavily on claims" made by Hamas. Other news organizations, did the same, accepting Hamas' claim that the blast was a "horrific massacre" by the Israelis. The media operations now say all evidence points to an errant Gaza missile landing in the hospital parking lot. The Times says its coverage left readers with an "incorrect impression." Critics pointed out that the Times still employs a several times on Facebook. Off-Duty Pilot Tries to Crash Passenger Jet An off-duty Alaska Airlines pilot was after trying to crash a flight to San Francisco by turning off the engines. The actual pilots stopped him and made an emergency landing in Portland. The off-duty pilot, 44-year-old Joseph Emerson, was in the jump seat in the cockpit when he tried to interfere with the engines. After subduing him, the pilots asked law enforcement to meet them when they landed in Portland. The Alaska Airlines plane, operated by Horizon Air, was and four crew members from Everett, Washington, to S.F. No injuries were reported, and the motive remains unclear. () | ➤ **A mechanic in Pennsylvania built a delightful giant blue bumper car powered by a Chevy engine and based on actual bumper cars from an amusement park. It's street-legal and ready to drive. () ****➤ The Philadelphia Eagles honored the Americans being held hostage in Gaza during their home game Sunday by leaving 10 seats open and flying American flags in those seats. () ➤ California became the latest state to require the teaching of cursive writing in elementary school. It joins 21 other states in mandating that kids learn to read and write in cursive. () ** | Do you think there's a need for a third GOP debate? 1. 2. Monday's Results: What's your favorite national fried chicken chain? 1. Chick-Fil-A: 51% 2. Popeye's: 15% 3. KFC: 21% 4. Raising Cane's: 6% 5. Wingstop: 3% 6. Zaxby's: 4% | | Daily Quote | "We've got the guy that tried to shut the engines down out of the cockpit." -- to air traffic control after near-disaster in the air. | Today's Trivia Which President made the dog name "Fido" famous? ** | The Flyover, LLC 1910 Thomes Ave. Cheyenne, WY 82001-3527 | ---|---

**The Democrats see New York as the simplest path for them to win back the majority, and they 're unleashing their historic war chest on the Empire State. **

" Hey, I know we've sent prices through the roof, caused crime to spike by refusing to hold criminals accountable, surrendered our southern border to drug cartels and human traffickers, and weakened America abroad - but please, elect us again?" They 'd lose in a landslide! So instead, these radicals work tirelessly to silence the voice of the majority of Americans who've had enough of their failed agenda. That's exactly why they're trying to JAIL President Trump for LIFE as an innocent man. They 'd rather rip the Constitution to shreds then have a President who will actually fight for the average American citizen. If President Trump won the White House but Democrats flipped the House, how long do you think it would take before they impeach him over some bogus witch hunt? If there 's one thing I've learned in Washington, it's to NEVER underestimate what the Democrats, the Deep State, and their special interest backers will do to maintain power. With New York squarely in their crosshairs, the President and I have no choice but to turn to grassroots patriots like YOU for support. Your contribution will help us cut through the Democrats' LIES with our own ads that tell voters the TRUTH about what the Democrats are doing to our country and fund our critical voter contact and registration programs. Republicans may not have $45 MILLION super PAC bankrolling us in New York... ... but we DO have millions of MAGA patriots who aren't going to surrender America to Biden and the radical Left's tyranny. Together, we'll level the playing field against Soros and the liberal globalist billionaires, defend the House majority for President Trump, and Make America Great Again! Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik House Republican Conference Chair Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801 Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

We plan to win, friend, but it will depend on what we're willing to give now to defeat the Left next November. We have to do everything it takes to get the job done.

Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=858762f23f37954b2bb580c700c638b9ed49536c83f290c320dbffed1b70f1e4d21d6c1ca824b95f46e20ded31bd21277cb8463928e1598c6cc85b19c443950b

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=858762f23f37954b2bb580c700c638b9ed49536c83f290c320dbffed1b70f1e4d21d6c1ca824b95f46e20ded31bd21277cb8463928e1598c6cc85b19c443950b

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.

---
| |
---
| | Peter,

I wanted to give you two quick updates. First, I recently [wrote an OP ED](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=f37be45125&e=9828080a05) about the importance for candidates to run to primaries in Minnesota, even if they have to forego the endorsement. It is time to restructure the statewide nominating process for major political parties in Minnesota by strongly encouraging substantive candidates to ‘run to the primary’ even without party endorsement. [I](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=e83907d558&e=9828080a05)[ hope you'll read it.](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=c7ae50a874&e=9828080a05)

Secondly, I also wanted you to watch a [new video by clicking the thumbnail below](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=79275746e9&e=9828080a05). Through discovering new information in our lawsuit, I learned that an investigation was opened up on me based on one tweet and one Democrat press release. This is wrong!

Could you be just as easily accused? [Watch the critical video below](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=01feb22770&e=9828080a05):

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don't say this to shock or scare you - I say it because it's true. _What we see today didn 't happen overnight. It's the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **... and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I'd know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ - radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my "comrades" made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan - then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I've dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That's why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** - and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I'm asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I'll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=11f64125511b460496d712f0e035fe86&_e=mbyYwnvuQTqp8CpM_Qeex4MbrTfxsPAAS06r0WLEZA7pOhG3AkWdjsNZcIKlncXDufw692iWDoXev2ZyAQ7W5LWBHEilnfFBCxWv5i3bz-bT23Gj5nPhFlt9zQ43crLeurgiQajKw50lamh66VSfkzyzKTCsj0IL1XZN8LTzDgfZkHfbpNDnR9y7_5SxwseI6dW-yOEBgcWlCrSCwwlBOPCUUqAhi5lq0gozilC8IeJc_nFqWYJc-w5YIdRIsfj9QK6x1S_y5ltIsTu4JTOLTZXvj-Xkdti0ez5QKDL3uXoLztr4mcptMA6KL-0FQpgNtHA9cWLnnNh70GFZbVMzdkeyloiQNIUzBH3-pIqsvXbI66tsbJHoNc9n4oHcMe7__rIfMmy_nOMG26s-Syfb7Q%3D%3D)** When you think of "the enemy within" you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn't be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making - but most of the American people have no clue what we're up against. **That 's why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state - and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as "white supremacists" and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... "A Great Book" - Dinesh D'Souza "_The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life." - Mark Levin "David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation." Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within -- and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. clean_body: America is on the brink of destruction. | | | | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don't say this to shock or scare you - I say it because it's true. What we see today didn 't happen overnight. It's the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ... and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda. I'd know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts - radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my "comrades" made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan - then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I've dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That's why I spent 6 months writing The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America - and I want you to have your very own copy of it. When you think of "the enemy within" you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn't be wrong. But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama. Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making - but most of the American people have no clue what we're up against. That 's why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state - and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as "white supremacists" and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... "A Great Book" - Dinesh D'Souza "The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life." - Mark Levin "David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation." Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within -- and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We've reached the point in our history that will decide our future - and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don't simply disagree with us about how to make our country better - they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama's own words "radically transform" America. And they don 't care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it's up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker?=
subject: Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN DELLICKER FOR CONGRESS
body:
I love a parade |
---
| | [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=c75785a9ef&e=1090c5c412)
---
|
---
|
---
| | Dear Friends and Neighbors:

When I speak to people across the district, they all want the same things: safe communities, good jobs, and strong families. This past week was a stark reminder that we have a lot of work to do towards achieving these three ideals.

**Safe Communities-** The world is on fire. We have war in the Middle East (again), war in Europe (still), war in Asia (are you tracking Azerbaijan vs. Armenia?), and war in Africa (nine coups since 2020). Our southern border is a disaster. Countries across South and Central America are falling apart. Iran and North Korea sow discord. Meanwhile, China just sits back and watches us play “whack-a-mole” as it quietly unleashes its new "Axis of Autocracy" against the United States.

When the United States projects weakness to the rest of the world, terrorist enterprises, rogue states, and peer adversaries see what they can get away with. And that’s exactly what’s happening right now. Under Joe Biden and Susan Wild, a member of the House Foreign Affairs Committee, our resolve is splintered, our budget is strained, and our military is unprepared for a multi-front war. If we don’t retake our rightful place as leaders of the free world, this chaos will only get worse.

**Good Jobs-** Yesterday, we learned that the Lehigh Valley was rejected as a $75 million “Tech Hub” by the federal government ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=9b23b035bd&e=1090c5c412)). Apparently, the application submitted by Susan Wild and a team of local economic developers wasn’t good enough to impress the reviewing bureaucrats.

But there's a bigger issue here: We don’t need the federal government to deem our region “qualified” to create good jobs and improve technology manufacturing. I’ve already written how this whole process is just a big waste of time and money ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=b08d052e68&e=1090c5c412)). Susan Wild invested a ton of political capital in this CHIPS Act application, and I’m shocked we didn’t receive the funding. Perhaps there is a silver lining: Now that the grant application is rejected, the local technology industry can get back to work innovating instead of filling out government forms.

**Strong Families-** With all the turmoil in the world, it’s easy to get depressed about our state of affairs. And driving around our own community provides ample evidence of hardship and decay. Crime is terrible. Traffic is jammed. Prices are way too high. The border crisis is affecting communities throughout the region. And the culture wars are tearing us apart.

Then I went to a parade, two, actually. I spent Saturday morning in Nazareth and Saturday afternoon in Lehighton. My son Jake was home from college, and he walked with me as my dad drove his 1948 Ford. Some members of the Dellicker campaign team joined us along with other GOP volunteers. Everybody had a blast.

We have a lot of problems. But our community is amazing. And our country is still strong. We just need different leadership to get us out of this funk and get us headed in the right direction. Let’s get to work!

**Keep America Free.**

_Kevin Dellicker is a husband and father who has lived in the Lehigh Valley for 40 years. He's the founder of a successful technology company and a 28-year veteran of the U.S. Armed Forces. Kevin's not running for Congress because he needs a job. He's running because he's got the experience, vision, and courage to defend our American way of life.

Neither military information nor photos of Kevin or Will in uniform imply endorsement of Kevin Dellicker for Congress by the Dept. of Defense or its particular military departments._

clean_body: I love a parade | | | | | | | Dear Friends and Neighbors: When I speak to people across the district, they all want the same things: safe communities, good jobs, and strong families. This past week was a stark reminder that we have a lot of work to do towards achieving these three ideals. Safe Communities- The world is on fire. We have war in the Middle East (again), war in Europe (still), war in Asia (are you tracking Azerbaijan vs. Armenia?), and war in Africa (nine coups since 2020). Our southern border is a disaster. Countries across South and Central America are falling apart. Iran and North Korea sow discord. Meanwhile, China just sits back and watches us play “whack-a-mole” as it quietly unleashes its new "Axis of Autocracy" against the United States. When the United States projects weakness to the rest of the world, terrorist enterprises, rogue states, and peer adversaries see what they can get away with. And that’s exactly what’s happening right now. Under Joe Biden and Susan Wild, a member of the House Foreign Affairs Committee, our resolve is splintered, our budget is strained, and our military is unprepared for a multi-front war. If we don’t retake our rightful place as leaders of the free world, this chaos will only get worse. Good Jobs- Yesterday, we learned that the Lehigh Valley was rejected as a $75 million “Tech Hub” by the federal government (). Apparently, the application submitted by Susan Wild and a team of local economic developers wasn’t good enough to impress the reviewing bureaucrats. But there's a bigger issue here: We don’t need the federal government to deem our region “qualified” to create good jobs and improve technology manufacturing. I’ve already written how this whole process is just a big waste of time and money (). Susan Wild invested a ton of political capital in this CHIPS Act application, and I’m shocked we didn’t receive the funding. Perhaps there is a silver lining: Now that the grant application is rejected, the local technology industry can get back to work innovating instead of filling out government forms. Strong Families- With all the turmoil in the world, it’s easy to get depressed about our state of affairs. And driving around our own community provides ample evidence of hardship and decay. Crime is terrible. Traffic is jammed. Prices are way too high. The border crisis is affecting communities throughout the region. And the culture wars are tearing us apart. Then I went to a parade, two, actually. I spent Saturday morning in Nazareth and Saturday afternoon in Lehighton. My son Jake was home from college, and he walked with me as my dad drove his 1948 Ford. Some members of the Dellicker campaign team joined us along with other GOP volunteers. Everybody had a blast. We have a lot of problems. But our community is amazing. And our country is still strong. We just need different leadership to get us out of this funk and get us headed in the right direction. Let’s get to work! Keep America Free. Kevin Dellicker is a husband and father who has lived in the Lehigh Valley for 40 years. He's the founder of a successful technology company and a 28-year veteran of the U.S. Armed Forces. Kevin's not running for Congress because he needs a job. He's running because he's got the experience, vision, and courage to defend our American way of life. Thank you! | | It was great to spend time with Tim Sheehy, U.S. Senate candidate from Montana. Tim is a father, husband, entrepreneur, combat veteran, and patriot. He's no career politician. subject: Get Creative for Veterans Day
body:
you won't want to miss this | | | | | |
---
[](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=1d2a30e7c3&e=b2e0e42b55)
|
---
Peter,
I am grateful and humbled by the service and commitment of our military veterans.
To honor their sacrifice, I wanted to let you know about an amazing organization and a unique way you can support it.
At my company, [Heritage Gear](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=5e1f25520d&e=b2e0e42b55), we are working with [Team RWB (www.teamrwb.org)](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=37709a3382&e=b2e0e42b55) \- Founded by a veteran, for veterans - Team RWB is focused on the health and well-being of those who have served. Team RWB organizes events and activities designed to restore the physical health and mental wellness of Vets while also creating community.
Between now and Veterans Day on Nov 11th, you can order one of these super-premium, high quality, made-in-the-USA bags: [heritagegear.com/collections/team-rwb](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=c3694c608b&e=b2e0e42b55). Half of the proceeds will go [Team Red, White and Blue](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=1060795ef3&e=b2e0e42b55), so they can continue serving those who proudly served our country.
[](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=4ce0030244&e=b2e0e42b55)
Get awesome USA gear AND support the men and women that served our country- [please join us](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=a27d5538cb&e=b2e0e42b55).
And we humbly ask that God continues to bless the United States of America.

Sincerely,
Matt Birk

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About The Coming Crisis** **This might be your only warning...** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **" Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zirstmvh174ng1otdqambk33jtlgqppsa9ngcv60_rp22sh2s8i66p70shhmcoj4clh2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8omuaid6ujq9ao75k1a0uv88la1k39ug130g4a8_rp22sh2s8i66p70shhmcoj4clh2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.
---

ICYMI News

name: Blake Dellinger
subject: Fwd: Volunteers Needed! Laura Friedman Tuesday Photo Shoot
body:
Happy Tuesday Everyone!

I just wanted to forward this email in case you couldn't get it. Laura is doing a photoshoot for her race and would love if you could participate today. The shoot is organized by Dre Guttag, copied here. Please let us know if you would be available and we can get you more information.

Thank you,
Blake Dellinger
Political Director
Laura Friedman for Congress

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Dre Guttag** <[dre@lauraforcongress.org](mailto:dre@lauraforcongress.org)>
Date: Mon, Oct 23, 2023 at 11:21 PM
Subject: Volunteers Needed! Laura Friedman Tuesday Photo Shoot
To:

Hi all - We have a bunch of amazing shots lined up for tomorrow and could really use some people to be interacting in photos with Laura. It is incredibly easy, lowkey, and an impactful way to help the campaign as we head into a competitive primary.

I've attached the schedule for the day, including locations. The first call time is at 11 AM and the last one is at 7:20 PM. We will wrap the day around 8:30. Please let me know if you can make any or all of the locations.

We ask that you don't wear crazy patterns, logos, or text on your attire. If you could bring a couple of tops/outfits for each location that would be appreciated.

Please feel free to recruit friends and family. Just like Laura's supporters, we want the "models" to be of all stripes!

I will be the primary contact throughout the day and am reached most effectively via email at this address. Please only call/text if you arrive at a location and cannot find us.

With appreciation,
Dre

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About The Coming Crisis** **This might be your only warning...** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **“Food shortages are coming.”** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671065%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Rw7hIKBSqMB1%2b2Nf3iyZZQ&sysid=1). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671066%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ducI%2fdLa7%2bvoOC%2bgDEOKRQ&sysid=1) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.
---

American Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

body:
The people across this great nation and those in District 8 of Texas deserve someone who will fight for their ability to maintain a healthy, normal... | | | | | [](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=1efb7ec92b&e=a2a46ff12c)
