# Cost of Living

Peter - every year, and especially in reeling from the Covid-19 pandemic, things are getting harder for families to afford.

Housing costs continue to rise while wages remain stagnant.

Healthcare continues to be out of reach for many Americans.

And our representatives that are sent to Washington, D.C., are not addressing these common issues. Instead, we see divisive rhetoric and culture war talking points used as scapegoats to avoid the real problems that impact everyday Americans.

The people across this great nation and those in District 8 of Texas deserve someone that will fight for their ability to maintain a healthy, normal life.

[**Peter, if you are ready to see that representation in our state is changed, then please chip in today. Every dollar counts and impacts our ability to see that we can make a real difference in the lives of those in our** **community.**](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=db3fbdef2c&e=a2a46ff12c)
| [Support Laura’s Campaign!](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=0897816457&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
Thank you so much.

\- Laura

name: Mucarsel-Powell, Debbie
subject: I just got news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
If we fall short here, it'll be a massive setback
| | |
---
Friend, I'm running to defeat Rick Scott — and the results of this election could determine which party controls the Senate. Here's what you need to know about my race:
**_First,_** election analysts from _CNN , FiveThirtyEight_, and _Roll Call_ ranked Rick Scott as one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot in 2024.
**_Then_****,** a new poll showed that the experts were right — this race is already a statistical tie! Floridians are sick and tired of Rick Scott threatening to take away their rights, raising their costs, and trying to end the Social Security and Medicare benefits they’ve worked hard for.
**_Now,_** with grassroots momentum on our side, experts are calling this race Democrats' best chance to expand the Senate majority and stop Mitch McConnell from retaking power. **But I just got news that we're $6,223 short of our FINAL weekly goal before we head into end-of-month.**
If we fall short here, it'll be a massive setback. **And Rick Scott, Mitch McConnell, and all their megadonors will undoubtedly weaponize that setback against me.**

clean_body: If we fall short here, it'll be a massive setback | | | Friend, I'm running to defeat Rick Scott — and the results of this election could determine which party controls the Senate. Here's what you need to know about my race: First, election analysts from CNN , FiveThirtyEight, and Roll Call ranked Rick Scott as one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot in 2024. Then, a new poll showed that the experts were right — this race is already a statistical tie! Floridians are sick and tired of Rick Scott threatening to take away their rights, raising their costs, and trying to end the Social Security and Medicare benefits they’ve worked hard for. Now, with grassroots momentum on our side, experts are calling this race Democrats' best chance to expand the Senate majority and stop Mitch McConnell from retaking power. But I just got news that we're $6,223 short of our FINAL weekly goal before we head into end-of-month. If we fall short here, it'll be a massive setback. name: Sarah Longwell
subject: The difference could not be greater
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc
body:
While Trump prefers cozying up to authoritarian dictators, Biden stands with our democratic allies around the world.
|
---
Friend,

Donald Trump has an unabashed admiration of authoritarians. Whether it’s praising Xi Jinping as a “brilliant man,” Kim Jong-Un as a “very talented” leader, or Putin’s invasion of Ukraine as “smart,” his affinity for ruthless dictators is never-ending. Many people have forgotten this fact. We haven’t. Our newest video lays out the glaring difference between how Donald Trump and Joe Biden talk about dictators. [You can watch it here:](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VWpJMt1JJ4X-N48pw1LxBSycW4lQ0X3550ZfCN2K0T2P3m2ndW69sMD-6lZ3l2W4ryDVh4jH6LKW5TvwM25Fb_LGW5tCJjR6WpfxyW2PJlBr6Dkv1wW7TlJ78832Z2cW6LswS31SDCfZN5fVg7ZKwR1nW5vbW6J3FfRl1W6z61ZX77MrstW45R_ft4r86cfW252Yzj94jYjVW5Xxqy42cWC9NW6lh55w20xHB7W2GX-4-6knFRrW2dkrzB38kQ_qW9b5hhc553pjyW76L_1X3t-RXHW2hWpxj86Rk1DW5KXV7M5q_qLJW325fPB4f1863dfznGT04)

[ ](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VWpJMt1JJ4X-N48pw1LxBSycW4lQ0X3550ZfCN2K0T2P3m2ndW69sMD-6lZ3llW19LgMY1QLK5mW7_4Yrk5J8qVBW4qvHhZ8xn33TN69RMlM6Fc5VW73Rm4l4CxwM4V6hC3y72sCPkW814wsF7NblJHW97djcB6GJZw8W8dMpS52MDKJbW5KggcW7l8qBWW1DxSH876Mk8LW1gJdrZ92tWdSW6b8pL93FnlSPN8ny4RsYKtfXW584yCc7tyLqnVj1kvl1rcJN7W24K15V5B179dN2X6BryWBXMqW1GsrHB4QcsXHW9fTy8B5jDXCgf2CFtLl04)
---
While Trump prefers cozying up to authoritarian dictators, Biden stands with our democratic allies around the world. One thing’s clear: The GOP is no longer the party of Reagan.
##
We can’t let voters forget what’s at stake in 2024.
##
Sarah Longwell

body:
New Hampshire Needs Your Help
| | |
---
| | Dear Derek, At Granite Solutions, we are committed to electing Republican leaders who will uphold the principles of limited government, individual liberty, and fiscal responsibility. Our state's future depends on strong conservative voices guiding our policies. Your past support has been instrumental in our success, and I want to thank you for standing with us. Every contribution to Granite Solutions allows us to invest in critical campaign activities, from grassroots organizing to digital advertising. The road ahead may have challenges, but with your continued support, I have no doubt that we can secure victory for conservative values in New Hampshire. Expanding our majority in the New Hampshire House and Senate is essential, and your contribution will help make that a reality. I invite you to join us in our mission by making a contribution to Granite Solutions. [Your donation, whether it's $10, $25, $50, or more](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.), will directly impact our ability to elect Republican leaders dedicated to our shared values.

| | Dear Derek, At Granite Solutions, we are committed to electing Republican leaders who will uphold the principles of limited government, individual liberty, and fiscal responsibility. Our state's future depends on strong conservative voices guiding our policies. Your past support has been instrumental in our success, and I want to thank you for standing with us. Every contribution to Granite Solutions allows us to invest in critical campaign activities, from grassroots organizing to digital advertising. The road ahead may have challenges, but with your continued support, I have no doubt that we can secure victory for conservative values in New Hampshire. Expanding our majority in the New Hampshire House and Senate is essential, and your contribution will help make that a reality. I invite you to join us in our mission by making a contribution to Granite Solutions. [Your donation, whether it's $10, $25, $50, or more](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.), will directly impact our ability to elect Republican leaders dedicated to our shared values.

subject: Rashida Tlaib Doubles Down On Debunked Hospital Bombing Claim, Says She Can’t ‘Uncritically Accept’ Israel’s ‘Denials’
body:
And Los Angeles DA Opens Probe Into Allegations Hotels Hired Homeless Illegal Migrants As Workers Went On Strike

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671089%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mx6Hipgi2BMvEfcdrPIKqw&sysid=1 Rashida Tlaib Doubles Down On Debunked Hospital Bombing Claim, Says She Can’t ‘Uncritically Accept’ Israel’s ‘Denials’

Democratic Rep. Rashida Tlaib of Michigan doubled down on claims that Israel bombed a hospital in Gaza, saying she can’t accept Israeli “denials” despite the claims being debunked by multiple reports. Tlaib and Democratic Rep. Ilhan Omar of Minnesota posted tweets that echoed claims by Hamas that the Israeli Defense Forces (IDF) bombed a hospital in Gaza, killing over 500 people.

The Los Angeles District Attorney’s office announced a probe Monday into allegations that hotels in the area hired Venezuelan migrants to replace striking workers, his office said in a statement. The investigation will focus on the hiring practices of hotels in Santa Monica and Los Angeles, the district attorney’s office said in a statement Monday.

Trump Says ‘Jesus Christ’ Is The Only One Who Can Get 217 Votes For
Speaker

Former President Donald Trump said Monday that “Jesus Christ” is the
only individual who could be elected Speaker of the House of
Representatives. The House has been without a speaker since Oct. 3
after Kevin McCarthy was removed from the office in a bipartisan vote
of eight Republicans and all Democrats.

name: Scalise, Steve
subject: Sign my petition to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If you believe only U.S. citizens should vote in U.S. elections... If you believe in one person, one vote... If you believe every voter should be required to prove their identity with a photo ID... Then we need to hear from you IMMEDIATELY.

| |

---
| | | Friend -

Democrats are racing to undermine election integrity ahead of the most important election of our lifetimes.
- **FIRST:** Deep-blue cities like New York and DC made it LEGAL for non-U.S. citizens to vote in local elections.

- **THEN:** Joe Biden SUED red states for enforcing voter identification laws.

- **NOW:** Democrats are filing LEGAL ACTION to gut strong election integrity measures in the swing state of North Carolina.
_If you believe only U.S. citizens should vote in U.S. elections ... If you believe in one person, one vote... If you believe every voter should be required to prove their identity with a photo ID... Then we need to hear from you IMMEDIATELY._

_**[I'm personally asking you to sign my petition to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws in every state in America.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl119rd55e4cm5lekqfej5gqpofpgc628nfqnskg_rp22sh2s8i66p70shhm6o74cph2bs "I’m personally asking you to sign my petition to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws in every state in America.")**_
---
| | | [ADD YOUR NAME: FEDERALLY MANDATE VOTER ID LAWS](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z19cmtnrj57i3uchf9171v9nv3ubqc5429j26i8o_rp22sh2s8i66p70shhm6o74cph2bs "ADD YOUR NAME: FEDERALLY MANDATE VOTER ID LAWS")
---
Look:

Last time the Democrats were in power, they attempted to fast-track an election-rigging scheme that would have irreparably undermined the security of our elections. They wanted to use your tax dollars to fund their campaigns, federalize our elections, and destroy voter ID laws NATIONWIDE.

**They called their election-rigging scheme HR 1 - meaning helping prevent Conservatives from winning elections was their FIRST PRIORITY when they controlled the House.**

If they think the American People are willing to turn a blind eye to this critical issue, it would only empower them to push harder.

**That 's where you come in.**

_**[We're pleading with every Conservative in America to back our efforts to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws. Adding your name to my petition today is the first step to securing our elections once and for all.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8bmcnbev2hte8tbuaj3jge52o0h94a7upn9jmp0_rp22sh2s8i66p70shhm6o74cph2bs "We’re pleading with every Conservative in America to back our efforts to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws. Adding your name to my petition today is the first step to securing our elections once and for all.")**_

Can I count on seeing your name? _I hope so._

For America,

Steve Scalise

name: ROLLAN ROBERTS FOR PRESIDENT

subject: It's An Invasion!!
body:
It's An Invasion!! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3a99b42ec157/conforti-for-congress-8248204?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Our Southern Border is wide open, and America is being invaded!

The problem is getting worse - not better. The Custom and Border Protection agency released data that shows the number of illegals crossing in 2023 has reached the highest levels EVER!!

What is even worse is that those crossing are not families seeking a better life -- but are now mostly military-aged men. Many of them are from our adversaries around the world. America is now at risk of terror attacks from within. If this doesn't frighten you, I'm not sure what will.

The current District 6 Representative, Sean Casten, sides with the progressive radicals to support policies that threaten America's security. He is working against the American people, and it is time for us to say NO MORE!

Help me get to Congress and push policies that protect the American people. Please consider making a contribution to my campaign so that I can go to WDC and push back on these bad policies. No amount is too small.

[](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=2caa154bb3&e=25f4fa3311)

Your support is greatly appreciated.
Stay strong!
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District
---

name: Maria Montero
subject: Reminder: ICYMI! Montero Campaign Updates October 21
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MARIA MONTERO
body:
Campaign news you don't want to miss...
| | | |
---
| Maria's Community Champions
---
| |
---|---
Earning the confidence and support of community members, leaders, and business people is what distinguishes Maria Montero--she reflects the people, values, and work ethic of the 7th Congressional District.

This week, we are pleased to share the support of Hilda Vinces. Hilda is the Lehigh Valley small business owner of Carvin Foods. As a faithful leader in our community, Hilda supports strong, pro-business Conservative candidates.

Business owners like Hilda are the backbone our community. Small businesses want to thrive and in this current environment they continue to suffer. Hilda supports Maria because Maria has private sector experience in running a small business and Maria acutely understands lowering taxes and ending government bureaucracy will set the U.S. economy in the right direction. Hilda Vinces shared, "Maria works in the private sector, she understands the small business grind, and is the voice we need in Washington D.C to be our advocate. Maria reflects our values, knows the issues, and is highly relatable to many of our community's voters. She is clearly the most qualified Republican candidate in this primary race and will beat Susan Wild."
| |
---
| In the News
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Nqw8vOCci9antLH7f8ceM1EaaUFJ3Hivkz9sVnlq-yzfMUnHXmFFjQtuJxiZAB-qN7KScStM6V1sYWY4t1NVSAgxU6CUOZA-_tDEE1uOslM331BExYCFY_GHHJcmur5Ti1PerHp34TYr033-79ukTvCC7MdXVjhbrM5nMJ2reZAVSO-74N9v5Q==&c=q-jVzFALxP8T4bNb1814pTypuOK6FFSFOtpMspAnL6wm9N2qOUGJfw==&ch=eZBP2UsVnKSriuBpHaBvwWnC9gjaih2V0NWkwok6U9OiKJzed3_x-w==)
---
| Did you have a chance to see the Volpe Report? Last week, Chuck Volpe invited Maria on his show to talk about the PA-7 U.S. Congressional race, which is one of the top targeted races in the country! You don't want to miss it...
---
| |
---
| Around the District
---
|
---
|
---
| Maria is a committed, roll-up your sleeves member of our community. This past week she helped the team prepare for the [Carbon Count](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Nqw8vOCci9antLH7f8ceM1EaaUFJ3Hivkz9sVnlq-yzfMUnHXmFFjQtuJxiZAB-qfgIYUCfU9G9OxQ10fUQB_cZTKA33PFt9-R-4mCvEesQGeOw2BGk81eamdNp-haICv6FKaAk2C-Mq79g414r3DriLISV1cO2IcN7NsslIyDi80CQqU9JfJ-RQHM67bz3Y-wo76T_jKMMvB_01XSFogsLdT7YKAjUA&c=q-jVzFALxP8T4bNb1814pTypuOK6FFSFOtpMspAnL6wm9N2qOUGJfw==&ch=eZBP2UsVnKSriuBpHaBvwWnC9gjaih2V0NWkwok6U9OiKJzed3_x-w==)y GOP Chicken BBQ fundraiser. Connecting with neighbors, friends, and voters in Carbon County is always a blast! The fundraiser was highly successful and supports the promotion of our statewide judicial races and our Carbon County candidates.
---
|
---
|
---
Leading by example and donating life: Maria donated blood at the [Charles Chrin Community Center](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Nqw8vOCci9antLH7f8ceM1EaaUFJ3Hivkz9sVnlq-yzfMUnHXmFFjQtuJxiZAB-qoVCs7P0KTWG8cceBxT76Jo8h_LrBdmtA7NsHNUGRjPTQLUwcRHs1Nj1PDyg_fRsiKPAxnCfCZSRBgX0WSx34UvHb4Cmlru0mYnrwptRmnQ0YLeFygzwurpBWIAc3YguJ1_5uqOUThVE=&c=q-jVzFALxP8T4bNb1814pTypuOK6FFSFOtpMspAnL6wm9N2qOUGJfw==&ch=eZBP2UsVnKSriuBpHaBvwWnC9gjaih2V0NWkwok6U9OiKJzed3_x-w==) blood drive held by [American ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Nqw8vOCci9antLH7f8ceM1EaaUFJ3Hivkz9sVnlq-yzfMUnHXmFFjQtuJxiZAB-qE-PQHMUgaNQFWz4D9vgSaszQvxmmqMTibZ5sgBQcfEt6EUJ9XNbSpbP5YCyKTgS9mkkTwu1nr1I5bs8743aIZVXdNTiuSQ8qAtYXlOwfzaxmU9m6JIYkOUbbbRsmXnQOC7T7HpsqC6jaujNsNalcwQ==&c=q-jVzFALxP8T4bNb1814pTypuOK6FFSFOtpMspAnL6wm9N2qOUGJfw==&ch=eZBP2UsVnKSriuBpHaBvwWnC9gjaih2V0NWkwok6U9OiKJzed3_x-w==)[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Nqw8vOCci9antLH7f8ceM1EaaUFJ3Hivkz9sVnlq-yzfMUnHXmFFjQtuJxiZAB-qE-PQHMUgaNQFWz4D9vgSaszQvxmmqMTibZ5sgBQcfEt6EUJ9XNbSpbP5YCyKTgS9mkkTwu1nr1I5bs8743aIZVXdNTiuSQ8qAtYXlOwfzaxmU9m6JIYkOUbbbRsmXnQOC7T7HpsqC6jaujNsNalcwQ==&c=q-jVzFALxP8T4bNb1814pTypuOK6FFSFOtpMspAnL6wm9N2qOUGJfw==&ch=eZBP2UsVnKSriuBpHaBvwWnC9gjaih2V0NWkwok6U9OiKJzed3_x-w==)[Red Cross](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Nqw8vOCci9antLH7f8ceM1EaaUFJ3Hivkz9sVnlq-yzfMUnHXmFFjQtuJxiZAB-qE-PQHMUgaNQFWz4D9vgSaszQvxmmqMTibZ5sgBQcfEt6EUJ9XNbSpbP5YCyKTgS9mkkTwu1nr1I5bs8743aIZVXdNTiuSQ8qAtYXlOwfzaxmU9m6JIYkOUbbbRsmXnQOC7T7HpsqC6jaujNsNalcwQ==&c=q-jVzFALxP8T4bNb1814pTypuOK6FFSFOtpMspAnL6wm9N2qOUGJfw==&ch=eZBP2UsVnKSriuBpHaBvwWnC9gjaih2V0NWkwok6U9OiKJzed3_x-w==)--blood banks are in low supply, please do what you can to help.
---
|
---
---
There is nothing better than enjoying a good time with your neighbors. Maria was doing just that and showing her skills while dancing "with the stars" in Easton's West Ward festival.
---
|
---
---
| Halloween and Parades go hand in hand, Maria had so much fun promoting all the Carbon GOP candidates at this year's Palmerton Halloween Parade!
---
| |
---
| Hope to see you on the campaign trail and thank you for your support...
Sincerely,

Maria Montero Republican Congressional Candidate Pennsylvania's 7th District

We are officially one week from our end-of-month deadline.
#

$10.
Yes, just $10.
That’s what we’re asking you to donate to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate today.
Your first online donation of $10 today, on October 24th, because we are officially one week from our end-of-month deadline.
$10 because at this point in 2022, millions of dollars were pouring into Arizona from Mitch McConnell and other outside groups to flip Arizona’s Senate seat. The attack ads could start up any day now — and when they do, they won’t stop.

Hi Peter,
_This is incredible._

**In the third quarter, we raised over $730,000 from more than 9,000 donors and nearly 18,000 individual donations.**

Our numbers exceeded expectations thanks to the generous support of voters and donors like you.

I'm humbled by how many patriots in both Virginia and across America invested themselves in our effort to save this country.

In Joe Biden and Tim Kaine's economy, I know how hard it is to spare a couple of extra bucks, and I'm so grateful for the thousands of people who are standing with us.

I give you my word: **I 'm not done fighting for us.**

These numbers are incredible, but we're just getting started. With you on our team, I know we can make our final quarter of the year even STRONGER than our last.

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Will you join me in fighting for workers' rights, Derek?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS Chris Deluzio is a United States veteran
body:
Solidarity, always.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72084082/434234743/-1807168276?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=231023_cd_strikefund&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjUzODU1NC03MDcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jM-2m1bqRqlo0sCTMZEbcLTYD_6agEZ9oLobbaUfKsg=)
---
Derek, **Pittsburgh Post-Gazette workers have been on strike for over a year.** I joined them on the picket line this month, alongside my friend Sen. John Fetterman, to fight for hard-earned benefits and fair wages. The newsroom employees who are on strike right now have been for over a year, and are fighting for the rights of every hard-working American. They're standing up to corporate bosses and demanding fair contracts, wages, working conditions, and healthcare benefits. **I know that the fight for collective action is long and hard.** I fought alongside my fellow Pitt workers and the United Steelworkers to secure a union at Pitt (the biggest union election win in the country in 2021). **Workers' rights affect _every_ American. Corporate jagoffs have been cutting corners at the expense of American workers and families for far too long.** We need to stand behind the workers who are on the picket line day after day to hold Big Business accountable. [**I'm determined to support the Pittsburgh Post-Gazette workers. Will you join me in raising funds for striking newsroom workers to make sure that they can continue their fight to stop corporate greed and demand hard-earned benefits?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72084087/434234747/-2010488556?ms=231023_cd_strikefund&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjUzODU1NC03MDcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jM-2m1bqRqlo0sCTMZEbcLTYD_6agEZ9oLobbaUfKsg=&emci=36459132-db71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=db538554-7072-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=13185894) **[CHIP IN TO THE STRIKE FUND](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72084088/434234751/-2010488556?ms=231023_cd_strikefund&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjUzODU1NC03MDcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jM-2m1bqRqlo0sCTMZEbcLTYD_6agEZ9oLobbaUfKsg=&emci=36459132-db71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=db538554-7072-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=13185894)** Derek, thank you for supporting hard-working Americans in our fight for the Common Good. – Chris Deluzio
| Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country.

**Will you join Chris' team and help keep PA-17 blue?** **[Contribute Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72084089/434234752/-1807168276?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=db538554-7072-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=231023_cd_strikefund&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjUzODU1NC03MDcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jM-2m1bqRqlo0sCTMZEbcLTYD_6agEZ9oLobbaUfKsg=)** **[GIVE Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72084090/434234753/-1807168276?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=db538554-7072-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=231023_cd_strikefund&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjUzODU1NC03MDcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jM-2m1bqRqlo0sCTMZEbcLTYD_6agEZ9oLobbaUfKsg=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Eric=20Underwood?=
subject: ☕Coffee w/ the Chairman
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
🇺🇸 SAVE THE DATE - Jan. 5th 2024; Nebraska's 2024 Campaign Kickoff - Featuring U.S. Senate Candidate Kari Lake | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12658289?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=c62f67e3ec&e=25844e23a8)
---
| |
#### Good Morning Republicans,

Woofta...what a spicy week!

The objective of the party is to maintain the government of, by, and for the people and to further the principles within the community. My job as Chairman is to facilitate the relationships and the connection that builds communication of values and support among all Republicans. Over the last month, I've enjoyed many in-person meetings, zoom meetings, sent texts, emails, phone calls, direct messages with over half our _32 Republican State Senators (I will get to them all)_ , _Two Constitutional Officers plus one former and one soon to be_, County Board Members and County Department Heads, Omaha Police Chief, Local School Board members, Board of Education Members, Public Service Commissioners, at least two dozen Nebraska county chairs, **over 15 State Chairs from Hawaii to Rhode Island and subsequent RNC Committeemen and Women**, dozens of your State Central Committee leaders, Republican candidates for 2024 Nebraska campaigns..._Team Kari Lake, Team Steve Bannon, Team Scott Pressler_ , AND let me say this...ALL whom I've been blessed to connect with have **TWO** very striking things in common...they BELIEVE in the [_Platform Values of the Republican Party_](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=8205c7c782&e=25844e23a8) AND they BELIEVE in the Power of the People.

__They believe in YOU!__

The people of the party should have a healthy, productive, and growing relationship with the Federal delegation and the Governor and Lt. Governor.
We simply aren't there.

Some have made efforts and we've connected on occasion. I want to be clear that I will not stop extending a handshake and opportunities to connect to all Republican leaders. However, the NEGOP office has been inundated with 100's upon 100's of emails, calls and 1000's of social media activity just this last week from _real, live, actual, down-home Nebraskans_ who want their voice heard.
We, at the NEGOP, hear you. Loud and clear.

The people of the party have asked the leaders of the NEGOP to be a voice for the _values of the party_ and no elected official is above the people. The Republican party has suffered from a misalignment between winning elections AND governing solutions through **values** , with some leaders holding completely different objectives from its voters and value-driven base. I see this misalignment in many other states and has been seemingly widening for decades. You cannot say you are "for" the party if you don't communicate WITH the party ABOUT our principles, no matter WHO is in leadership...or at the very least have **Coffee w/ the Chairman** to discuss values.

I encourage you to contact all your elected representatives and ask them to network with the county party and the State Party. I encourage you to highlight the importance of working as a team with the new leadership and new vision of the party. To pledge Unity in the Platform values of the party and unity of, by and for the People. I encourage you to **stress the importance** of having a State Party that is a voice for the people and values. I encourage you to take time to read the [Platform Values](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=c6084f518b&e=25844e23a8), engage in discussions with your elected representatives and ask them where and how we can work together to Defend the Platform. Let's use the Platform as a shared objective document with which we can have a common truth.

Republicans have asked me, "Are we moving forward as a party?" What I do see coming in 2024, first and foremost, is a Unicameral Legislative session for the ages. The team of Republican Senators have fought together under some of the worst conditions we've seen at the Capitol and they've come out more resolved in their conviction to bringing solutions to Nebraska. I've seen a humbleness and a servitude mindset from the many I've spoken to, seeking to push next year's session for the goodness of all Nebraskans. If we, as Republicans, set our minds to TWO main philosophies from Jan-April...next year will be historical.

We must...
#1 Show up (Support the Senators in Sub-committee meetings and during floor votes)
#2 Know the Rules (Educate ourselves on Parliamentary procedures)

Next, we must prepare like never before to secure our elections. The NEGOP has already begun training and preparation for Voter ID reform and election accountability. When 65.45% of Nebraskans voted for a very specific Voter ID requirement we must abide by the will of 2/3 of the people. We must be prepared to work on voter engagement and registration as well as unprecedented efforts for voter verification if we want our country to thrive and state to be protected. It's up to us at the local level to make the change we seek.

If we wish to "maintenance the government of, by, and for the people" as the [NEGOP Constitution](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=365408f8ef&e=25844e23a8) outlines, then we must actively recruit and prepare the 2024 candidates. Every county meeting, every coalition meeting, every meeting where Republicans assemble, discussions of candidacy and strategic preparation for efficient voter engagement must occur. This cannot wait until the filing deadline of March 1, 2024.

The time is now, you are called.
The awakening has happened, action is required.

This country, this state, your community needs you...everything you concern yourself with on social media or at the dining room table will only find resolution if you, yes YOU, stand for your family now. Take the first step, it's the hardest step, I promise, and ask the genuine questions...
"How can I help?"
"How do you become a county delegate?"
"What do I need to become a school board member?"
"Where can I support the people of the party?"

The truth shall set us free.

With much blessings,
---
|
---
| –Chairman Underwood

P.S. - I didn't forget my special announcement!

Please **SAVE THE DATE** of Friday, January 5th, 2024 as we promote the...
**NEGOP 2024 Campaign Kickoff Event** with: _**Special Guest Arizona U.S. Senate Candidate Kari Lake**_ _**[](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=f8c53c4bbe&e=25844e23a8)**_**Date:** _Friday, January 5th, 2024_
**Where:** _CHI Arena - Omaha, Ne_
**Time:** VIP - 5pm;
Main Event - 7pm;
NEGOP+ Booster Club Private VIP Book Signing - Immediately Following

For the most exclusive access SIGN UP for our [$50/month NEGOP+ Booster](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=53358cccbb&e=25844e23a8)
---

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE CONTACT:
Dawn Liphardt
admin@ne.gop
Tuesday, October 24, 2023 **STATEMENT ON THE 2024 NEGOP VOTER INVOLVEMENT PLAN** The Republican Party of Nebraska is highlighting our efforts to reach communities Democrats often take for granted. As Democrats push ethnic and race minorities aside, their radical agenda has become out of step with voters. Nebraskans of all backgrounds are discovering that there’s never been a better — or more important — time to vote Republican. Nationally, the Republican Party has been making inroads into various ethnic communities for years:
* Under the Trump administration, Republicans saw a 7 percent gain in support with Asian Americans from 2016 to 2020. The shift was even greater among Vietnamese Americans, who experienced a 14 percent shift toward Republican candidates.*
* While Democrats push socialism, radical abortion policies and refer to them as “Latinx,” Hispanic Americans are concerned about preserving freedoms, raising strong families, and putting food on the table.
* A similar shift towards the Republican Party is playing out among Black voters, who have been particularly hard hit by Democrats’ destructive agenda. Democratic support for the defund-the-police movement has led to a surge in violent crime that’s disproportionately impacting Black Americans. That’s why Black support for Democrats is quickly eroding.

These trends are part of a broader story. For generations, Democrats thought they had a monopoly on minority voters. But now, Democrats’ failed promises, polarizing agenda and rising cost-of-living prices have caught up with them. The Republican Party of Nebraska is building relationships and making significant investments in these communities. Under our 2024 Political Plan, adopted by our State Central Committee in Norfolk, NE on August 19, 2023, we will continue this national trend in Nebraska of connecting to minority voters by taking our message of freedom and opportunity to their doorstep. Included in this Political Plan is our **Voter Involvement Plan (VIP)** program, which is a comprehensive and coordinated effort designed to engage and involve new Republican voters with local, state, and federal candidates. Through these efforts, our party is connecting with new Republican voters in _Asian, Hispanic, African-American, and American Indian_ communities across Nebraska. Republicans CARE for all Nebraskans. Source: ***[https://thehill.com/opinion/campaign/3471496-minorities-are-finding-a-new-political-home-with-the-republican-party/](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=25a7eac133&e=25844e23a8)** **###**

clean_body: 🇺🇸 SAVE THE DATE - Jan. 5th 2024; Nebraska's 2024 Campaign Kickoff - Featuring U.S. Senate Candidate Kari Lake | | | | | | | Good Morning Republicans, Woofta...what a spicy week! The objective of the party is to maintain the government of, by, and for the people and to further the principles within the community. My job as Chairman is to facilitate the relationships and the connection that builds communication of values and support among all Republicans. Over the last month, I've enjoyed many in-person meetings, zoom meetings, sent texts, emails, phone calls, direct messages with over half our 32 Republican State Senators (I will get to them all) , Two Constitutional Officers plus one former and one soon to be, County Board Members and County Department Heads, Omaha Police Chief, Local School Board members, Board of Education Members, Public Service Commissioners, at least two dozen Nebraska county chairs, over 15 State Chairs from Hawaii to Rhode Island and subsequent RNC Committeemen and Women, dozens of your State Central Committee leaders, Republican candidates for 2024 Nebraska campaigns...Team Kari Lake, Team Steve Bannon, Team Scott Pressler , AND let me say this...ALL whom I've been blessed to connect with have TWO very striking things in common...they BELIEVE in the AND they BELIEVE in the Power of the People. They believe in YOU! The people of the party should have a healthy, productive, and growing relationship with the Federal delegation and the Governor and Lt. Governor. We simply aren't there. Some have made efforts and we've connected on occasion. I want to be clear that I will not stop extending a handshake and opportunities to connect to all Republican leaders. However, the NEGOP office has been inundated with 100's upon 100's of emails, calls and 1000's of social media activity just this last week from real, live, actual, down-home Nebraskans who want their voice heard. We, at the NEGOP, hear you. Loud and clear. The people of the party have asked the leaders of the NEGOP to be a voice for the values of the party and no elected official is above the people. The Republican party has suffered from a misalignment between winning elections AND governing solutions through values , with some leaders holding completely different objectives from its voters and value-driven base. I see this misalignment in many other states and has been seemingly widening for decades. You cannot say you are "for" the party if you don't communicate WITH the party ABOUT our principles, no matter WHO is in leadership...or at the very least have Coffee w/ the Chairman to discuss values. I encourage you to contact all your elected representatives and ask them to network with the county party and the State Party. I encourage you to highlight the importance of working as a team with the new leadership and new vision of the party. To pledge Unity in the Platform values of the party and unity of, by and for the People. I encourage you to stress the importance of having a State Party that is a voice for the people and values. I encourage you to take time to read the , engage in discussions with your elected representatives and ask them where and how we can work together to Defend the Platform. Let's use the Platform as a shared objective document with which we can have a common truth. Republicans have asked me, "Are we moving forward as a party?" What I do see coming in 2024, first and foremost, is a Unicameral Legislative session for the ages. The team of Republican Senators have fought together under some of the worst conditions we've seen at the Capitol and they've come out more resolved in their conviction to bringing solutions to Nebraska. I've seen a humbleness and a servitude mindset from the many I've spoken to, seeking to push next year's session for the goodness of all Nebraskans. If we, as Republicans, set our minds to TWO main philosophies from Jan-April...next year will be historical. We must... #1 Show up (Support the Senators in Sub-committee meetings and during floor votes) #2 Know the Rules (Educate ourselves on Parliamentary procedures) Next, we must prepare like never before to secure our elections. The NEGOP has already begun training and preparation for Voter ID reform and election accountability. When 65.45% of Nebraskans voted for a very specific Voter ID requirement we must abide by the will of 2/3 of the people. We must be prepared to work on voter engagement and registration as well as unprecedented efforts for voter verification if we want our country to thrive and state to be protected. It's up to us at the local level to make the change we seek. If we wish to "maintenance the government of, by, and for the people" as the outlines, then we must actively recruit and prepare the 2024 candidates. Every county meeting, every coalition meeting, every meeting where Republicans assemble, discussions of candidacy and strategic preparation for efficient voter engagement must occur. This cannot wait until the filing deadline of March 1, 2024. The time is now, you are called. The awakening has happened, action is required. This country, this state, your community needs you...everything you concern yourself with on social media or at the dining room table will only find resolution if you, yes YOU, stand for your family now. Take the first step, it's the hardest step, I promise, and ask the genuine questions... "How can I help?" "How do you become a county delegate?" "What do I need to become a school board member?" "Where can I support the people of the party?" The truth shall set us free. With much blessings, | | –Chairman Underwood P.S. - I didn't forget my special announcement! Please SAVE THE DATE of Friday, January 5th, 2024 as we promote the... NEGOP 2024 Campaign Kickoff Event with: Special Guest Arizona U.S. Senate Candidate Kari Lake : Friday, January 5th, 2024 Where: CHI Arena - Omaha, Ne Time: VIP - 5pm; Main Event - 7pm; NEGOP+ Booster Club Private VIP Book Signing - Immediately Following For the most exclusive access SIGN UP for our | | "Donate" | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE CONTACT: Dawn Liphardt admin@ne.gop Tuesday, October 24, 2023 STATEMENT ON THE 2024 NEGOP VOTER INVOLVEMENT PLAN The Republican Party of Nebraska is highlighting our efforts to reach communities Democrats often take for granted. name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About The Coming Crisis** **This might be your only warning...** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **" Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1iaet499ua0tfb35hh73gs94gc9rhhaos04rdio_rp22sh2s8i66p70shhm6o74c5h2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4qa1chu7pjndjm00h30toi970teiqhks5qqcalg_rp22sh2s8i66p70shhm6o74c5h2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.
---

American Action News
---

| | | **This is absolutely disgraceful.**

**Border Patrol agents reported that in September alone, Joe Biden’s administration released 100,000 illegal immigrants into our country.**

_We have no idea who these people are._

_We have no idea what they’re bringing to our country._

_We have no idea what their intentions are._

**Joe Biden is leaving our border WIDE OPEN to whatever criminals want to get into our country, and he’s putting your community at risk.**

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: Call Your Rep. To Oppose Emmer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o2HJ14m37Waxc_UhO23KkZkehboLAoci0lZSWvNWuFvxN2_gU9cro740F7lnEewqtQcEmWIrozv6V01Znt7EGlB9k0qhm7Bq7lsPj0ZS65TcyJoonoTPl6kdgkOLzAfiHO58WI9Kx1kbaM6cL68DrUT7FKl9b2YydZu9sGbZT0U=&c=KUKM2HJd8LQQU0qY1fgrSJ0embzCtKSutreEUwkjXPTxsOJRuMyyYg==&ch=wijejh5o34aVjNpOuunBpRF76jEn4bk600aqDsbLN5hxReFb_1hpDg==)
---
| No To Rep. Emmer As Speaker
---
| | |
---|---
Dear Friends,

The House of Representatives has still not selected a Speaker.

Grassroots conservatives like myself were supporting Rep. Jim Jordan of Ohio. But unfortunately, the RINOs in Washington wouldn't get behind the choice of true conservatives.

The Republican Conference is now set to support Rep. Tom Emmer of Minnesota.

I am opposed to Rep. Emmer. He is too closely aligned with former Speaker Kevin McCarthy and is obviously a D.C. swamp monster. And let's not forget that Emmer supports, or at least used to support, the National Popular Vote, which is an unconstitutional infringement on states' rights.

We can't have a Speaker who wants a more centralized government. There are few things more centralized than the National Popular Vote. Imagine a House Speaker leading the way to make the federal government more powerful in other aspects as well. No, thank you. The federal government needs to be more decentralized and less powerful. Clearly, we won't move an inch in that direction under Rep. Emmer as Speaker.

Please call your congressional delegation and urge them to oppose Rep. Tom Emmer for Speaker. We The People need a true representative.

Here is [the link to the entire House of Representatives phone directory](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o2HJ14m37Waxc_UhO23KkZkehboLAoci0lZSWvNWuFvxN2_gU9crox4Bp87yQF505WV8s6A1TRfEtKtMh0JmJKCWyQdUJtDQNFrxNovplfly_-ljS3c5ZfifEbNcAMTRtQDSHeCQSx20x_T_pDvMSJkEZHYCPQxz&c=KUKM2HJd8LQQU0qY1fgrSJ0embzCtKSutreEUwkjXPTxsOJRuMyyYg==&ch=wijejh5o34aVjNpOuunBpRF76jEn4bk600aqDsbLN5hxReFb_1hpDg==).

For God & Country,
Amanda Chase
---

clean_body: | | | | == | No To Rep. Emmer As Speaker | | | ---|--- Dear Friends, The House of Representatives has still not selected a Speaker. Grassroots conservatives like myself were supporting Rep. Jim Jordan of Ohio. But unfortunately, the RINOs in Washington wouldn't get behind the choice of true conservatives. The Republican Conference is now set to support Rep. Tom Emmer of Minnesota. I am opposed to Rep. Emmer. He is too closely aligned with former Speaker Kevin McCarthy and is obviously a D.C. swamp monster. And let's not forget that Emmer supports, or at least used to support, the National Popular Vote, which is an unconstitutional infringement on states' rights. We can't have a Speaker who wants a more centralized government. There are few things more centralized than the National Popular Vote. Imagine a House Speaker leading the way to make the federal government more powerful in other aspects as well. No, thank you. The federal government needs to be more decentralized and less powerful. Clearly, we won't move an inch in that direction under Rep. Emmer as Speaker. Please call your congressional delegation and urge them to oppose Rep. Tom Emmer for Speaker. We The People need a true representative. Here is ==. For God & Country, Amanda Chase | Donate to help me support true conservatives in all levels of government. | | == | | | | | | | | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. name: Scalise, Steve
subject: Add Your Name: FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If you believe only U.S. citizens should vote in U.S. elections... If you believe in one person, one vote... If you believe every voter should be required to prove their identity with a photo ID... Then we need to hear from you IMMEDIATELY.

| |

---
| | | Friend -

Democrats are racing to undermine election integrity ahead of the most important election of our lifetimes.
- **FIRST:** Deep-blue cities like New York and DC made it LEGAL for non-U.S. citizens to vote in local elections.

- **THEN:** Joe Biden SUED red states for enforcing voter identification laws.

- **NOW:** Democrats are filing LEGAL ACTION to gut strong election integrity measures in the swing state of North Carolina.
_If you believe only U.S. citizens should vote in U.S. elections ... If you believe in one person, one vote... If you believe every voter should be required to prove their identity with a photo ID... Then we need to hear from you IMMEDIATELY._

_**[I’m personally asking you to sign my petition to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws in every state in America.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671090%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NRq%2bFYAoKy%2fOKE0Rv5SKEQ&sysid=1 "I’m personally asking you
to sign my petition to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws in every state in
America.")**_
---
| | | [ADD YOUR NAME: FEDERALLY MANDATE VOTER ID LAWS](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671091%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QmwftKQ1UN4plyGKDaG63A&sysid=1 "ADD YOUR NAME: FEDERALLY MANDATE VOTER ID LAWS")
---
Look:

Last time the Democrats were in power, they attempted to fast-track an election-rigging scheme that would have irreparably undermined the security of our elections. They wanted to use your tax dollars to fund their campaigns, federalize our elections, and destroy voter ID laws NATIONWIDE.

**They called their election-rigging scheme HR 1 - meaning helping prevent Conservatives from winning elections was their FIRST PRIORITY when they controlled the House.**

If they think the American People are willing to turn a blind eye to this critical issue, it would only empower them to push harder.

**That’s where you come in.**

_**[We’re pleading with every Conservative in America to back our efforts to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws. Adding your name to my petition today is the first step to securing our elections once and for all.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671092%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KdzJ87iNLe%2f3WzMNwhDp0Q&sysid=1 "We’re pleading with every
Conservative in America to back our efforts to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws.
Adding your name to my petition today is the first step to securing our elections
once and for all.")**_

Can I count on seeing your name? _I hope so._

For America,

name: Ted Cruz
subject: How we make term limits a reality ⬇
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsxUz8kiuN

This would be a huge, lasting change for government in America,
returning us to the vision our Founders had when they created our
republic.

Dear
friend,

As I'm
sure you know, far too many career politicians in D.C. are
desperate to cling to their power by any means necessary. And
left unchecked, they hold their power for DECADES!

That's
why I am sponsoring legislation to add a Term Limits Amendment to
the U.S. Constitution, and why I am hopeful you will support this
effort with your voice today.

Under my
Term Limits Amendment, lawmakers in D.C. would:

✓ Serve
a MAXIMUM of three terms in the House or just two terms in the
Senate;

✓ Be
focused on their constituents, NOT the lobbyists who fund their
campaigns; and

✓ LEAVE
OFFICE after they reach their term limit, returning to their home
states and letting their voters elect a new "citizen-legislator"
to represent them!

SIGN THE
PETITION >>>

This
would be a huge, lasting change for government in America,
returning us to the vision our Founders had when they created our
republic. No kings, no entrenched ruling elite, just free-born
citizens managing our own affairs. I AGREE >>>

It's also
hugely popular. Every survey conducted recently shows at least
70% of the American people support putting term limits on
Congress.

That's
why career politicians like Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer
and President Biden (with their 88 combined years "serving" the
American people) want to shut my Term Limits Amendment down
before it builds any momentum.

And
that's why I am so anxious to know that you signed our PETITION
FOR TERM LIMITS.

While I
am not a career politician myself, I've been in D.C. long enough
to know that nothing moves here unless it is pushed - HARD - by
grassroots citizens writing, calling, and emailing their
lawmakers in numbers so huge they can't be ignored.

My
friends at Club for Growth have already done a lot of the work
for you here, typing up petitions and getting signatures, and
preparing it for your signature.

Club
employees will combine your PETITION, with thousands more being
mailed in by concerned citizens in your state, and deliver them
all to Capitol Hill at a moment of maximum impact as I fight on
the Senate floor to drive my term limits bill forward.

There
needs to be a HUGE stack of PETITIONS on every lawmaker's desk!

And if
you agree, I urge you to add your name and help them expand this
nationwide petition drive before the career politicians bury this
effort in big-government liberalism.

SIGN THE
PETITION >>>

For
Liberty,
Ted Cruz
United
States Senator (R - Texas)

Club for
Growth
2001 L
St. NW, Ste 600

Washington, DC 20036

ph
202.955.5500

Donate

It is my great honor to tell you that I have officially filed the paperwork to be a candidate for President of the United States in the very first primary of the 2024 election – New Hampshire.
_**NOTHING****CAN STOP THE GREATEST MOVEMENT IN HISTORY!**_
To prove that we truly are unstoppable, I’m calling on grassroots donors all across the nation to make a campaign contribution that will be registered the very week that our official presidential paperwork was filed.

clean_body: NOW LET’S WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE. | | Friend, It is my great honor to tell you that I have officially filed the paperwork to be a candidate for President of the United States in the very first primary of the 2024 election – New Hampshire. NOTHINGCAN STOP THE GREATEST MOVEMENT IN HISTORY! To prove that we truly are unstoppable, I’m calling on grassroots donors all across the nation to make a campaign contribution that will be registered the very week that our official presidential paperwork was filed. There will always be time-stamped proof that you were with us during WEEK ONE. Of course, if you cannot give because of the corrupt and incompetent fool who we will soon FIRE from the White House, then please do not donate today! I know who my loyal supporters are – and even if there won’t be time-stamped proof, I will remember who was with us on Day One. . | - Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: [FROM TRUMP FORCE ONE] Date: Mon, October 23, 2023 Subject: re: OFFICIALLY FILING TODAY To: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Friend, Right now, I’m flying to the great state of New Hampshire – home of the FIRST PRIMARY OF THE 2024 ELECTION. But this isn’t any ordinary campaign stop... ...I’m traveling to OFFICIALLY FILE THE PAPERWORK TO APPEAR ON THE BALLOT. Today, I want to send a message to Crooked Joe Biden, the naysayers in the Fake News Media, George Soros, the DNC, the RINOs, and all of our many other enemies that no matter how hard they conspire to try and destroy us, I will NEVER DROP out of this race and I will NEVER SURRENDER our mission to Make America Great Again! But I’ll need YOU to echo that message. Along with our official filing, I want to report that we had a MASSIVE SURGE of grassroots donations today, showing just how many Americans are 100% committed to our mission and will NEVER SURRENDER our country to tyranny. | Thank you, | Donald J. body:
#
Bad news, friend: **We just ran the numbers ahead of our deadline tonight, and we're 163 donations short of where we need to be.**

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-allred-split?amount=10?source=em231024-ca-split&refcode2=533_8507_mGUCIe&akid=533%2E8507%2EmGUCIe)
We won't sugarcoat this: Grassroots fundraising has really slowed down in October, and Colin depends on $5 and $10 donations to power his campaign.

But Ted Cruz's mega donors aren't slowing down. _**They're flooding him with MILLIONS to save his seat and buy this election.**_

[_That's why we HAVE to raise $50,000 before today ends. | More about Russell Prescott: A New Hampshire native of the Seacoast, Russell Prescott grew up in Exeter and currently lives in Kingston. For several decades, he was the co-owner and vice-president of R.E. Prescott Company, a wholesale distributor and manufacturer of water treatment systems. He purchased the business in 2020 and is now the president and sole owner.
Russell practiced Professional Engineering for 30 years and designs many of the products his company manufactures. As a result, he holds several patents for removing arsenic and radon from water. The company, founded in 1954 by his father, employs approximately 50 people and has operated in the same Exeter building since 1963.
Wanting to give back to his community, Prescott served five terms as a New Hampshire State Senator, being first elected in 2000 for two terms. He was re-elected in 2010, 2012, and again in 2014. As Senator, he represented Senate Districts 19 and 23, including towns from Newmarket to Plaistow and Derry to Seabrook.
Prescott was then twice elected to the Executive Council, once in 2016 and again in 2018. He decided to retire from the Executive Council in 2021 after purchasing his company.
Russell enjoys home restoration and recently finished a restoration of a 1737 colonial barn and grist mill in his town. His community service included Exeter Rotary Club, Kingston Lions Club, and the board of directors for the Exeter Area Chamber of Commerce.
He and his wife, Susan, have been married for 41 years, and they have five grown children and seven grandchildren. Following in their grandfather's and father's footsteps, his oldest three children are heavily involved with the daily operation and vision of the family business.

This week the Institute for Legislative Analysis (ILA) released their comprehensive review of state legislators.
> The ILA, ". . . serves as the data and policy hub for national conservative and liberty-minded organizations. ILA was established earlier this year, with its launch event attended by over 50 members of Congress who are the most philosophically committed to limited government. Prior to the launch of the ILA, the team previously served together for nearly a decade at CPAC and the American Conservative Union where they constructed the nation's first 50 state legislative scorecard."
The Mississippi Freedom Caucus is proud to announce that four of the top lawmakers who consistently voted for limited government, more freedom and lower taxes were members of the caucus. These members included; Steve Hopkins, Chris Brown, Joel Bomgar, and Dana Criswell. [All four scored above 90%](https://substack.com/redirect/f0ae6081-6eed-4039-b9c2-cad71099df34?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), proving their commitment to the conservative principles that make our state and nation great.
Sadly, other than the five top scores no other legislator in Mississippi scored above 80%. The ILA wrote in their analysis, "In fact, an astonishing **91 out of 112** Republican lawmakers received ratings below 50%, meaning they voted more often with the liberal position on policy than they did with the conservative position.
One such example is a bill which forced taxpayers to provide over $10 million to the Arts Commission - an entirely unnecessary government entity - which doled out grants to OxFilm, which sponsors films on Queer Family and LGBTQ drag artists, as well as the Mt. Zion Memorial Fund, which utilizes Critical Race Theory to examine "White Supremacy & Historic Preservation".
[Read more about the ILA's](https://substack.com/redirect/d4ee3a06-291a-47af-9ff8-06d05435c7df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) score and checkout how your legislators compare to the most conservative.
ILA CEO Ryan McGowan said, " If every day Mississippians do not step up to the plate and start fighting to hold their lawmakers accountable, the gaping hole left by these five lawmakers will only plunge the state further into economic despair."
The [Conservative Candidate Fund](https://substack.com/redirect/f6cfb517-6690-4ad4-8e82-9c664bac1de2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is raising money to support candidates who will fill that gaping hole and fight for limited government. You can help by making a donation. Your donation helps recruit, train, elect Mississippians who will fight for a better, more conservative Mississippi.
[Donate Today](https://substack.com/redirect/3da82fc3-c7db-4a77-b7d9-7dbdafb645e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michigan=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Michigan Democrats Jeopardize Women's Health Care
body:
MIGOP Issues Committee Pass Resolution to Oppose Senate Bills 474-477 which Jeopardize Women's Health | | |
---
| |
---
| |
# Party of the Constitution
---

**MIGOP Issues Committee Resolution to Oppose Senate Bills 474-477 That Seek to Amend the Public Health Code on Abortion Laws and Jeopardize the Rights and Health Care of All Women in Michigan**
WHEREAS; The Michigan Republican Party Issues Committee opposes the deliberate murdering of innocent life, and
WHEREAS; Senate Bills 474-477 have passed committee in the Michigan Senate introducing several amendments to the public health code regarding abortion laws, and
WHEREAS; SB 474 eliminates the term “Health Care Professional,” and license requirements, there by allowing for non-health care professionals to perform abortions, and
WHEREAS; SB 474 eliminates requirements for after-birth abortion survival care, thus allowing the death of a post-delivery baby, and
WHEREAS; SB 474 eliminates the word “elective,” thereby granting opportunity for forced abortions that will allow advantages for sex-traffickers and other sexual predators, and
WHEREAS; SB 475 eliminates the verbiage “himself/herself” and “his/her,” in domestic violence matters, thereby aligning with the gender neutrality and inclusion of the DEI agenda, and
WHEREAS; SB 476 changes the verbiage in the definition of abortion from “intentional” to “ A medical treatment,” thereby classifying abortion as a medical procedure, presumably in preparation for proposed health insurance coverage, and
WHEREAS; SB 477 allows for abortion referrals to pregnant students on college campuses, where by the current law as written prohibits such referrals, and
WHEREAS; SB 474-477 is being promoted under the guise as protection for women's “Reproductive Health Rights,” and
WHEREAS; SB 474-477 instead endangers the reproductive health rights of women by lowering the standards of quality health care,
WHEREAS; SB 474-477 is expected to be on the Senate floor for a vote on Thursday, October 19, 2023 and
WHEREAS; if passed by the Senate and House, Governor Whitmer has clear intentions of signing it into law effective immediately,
THEREFORE LET IT BE KNOWN; The Michigan Republican Party does not support any legislation that endangers the rights of women, removes access to high quality health care or endorses abortion.
THEREFORE LET IT ALSO BE KNOWN; that a copy of this resolution will be sent to Governor Whitmer& the members of the Michigan Senate and House of Representatives.
Michigan Republican Party Issues Committee October 18, 2023

### PRESERVE, PROTECT and DEFEND the Constitution of the United States,
### SO HELP ME GOD.
| [DONATE NOW](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=3a60852e49&e=a2af77507c)

Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=f044ed1cd9e3e76e7ef4b3758c981be8449f5b309fa9e2907253fcca6155675536f21e42567d9eff8fe4a5d076718860b5efd85afa82bff1e29002b65e22cc00

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=f044ed1cd9e3e76e7ef4b3758c981be8449f5b309fa9e2907253fcca6155675536f21e42567d9eff8fe4a5d076718860b5efd85afa82bff1e29002b65e22cc00

Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Hi friend, 🌴 ONE WEEK REMAINING! 🏖️ Have you had a chance to enter our presidential debate contest? We're picking a winner NEXT WEEK! THE RULES OF THE CONTEST - Click here to enter your name into the contest. - Every time you donate $5 or more between now and October 31st at 11:59 PM ET, your name is entered AGAIN. - 1 lucky winner will be chosen at random on 11/01 and notified promptly! THE PRIZE - 2 FREE trips to Miami, Florida for you and a guest! - 2 FREE tickets to attend the GOP debate. - A special meet & greet with Governor and First Lady DeSantis! - a 3-night hotel stay! ENTER THE CONTEST Our next debate is only two weeks away, and we're looking forward to showing out in Miami with the largest crowd supporting Ron DeSantis. We hope you'll be in that crowd cheering him on as he shows the nation why he's the best pick to be our next President. In Freedom, Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. body:
Stop me if you've heard this before:

Mike Feuer for Congress [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72094061/434271499/1100932385?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2023.10.24_B1_Survey_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDNhMGY4ZTAtN2Q3Mi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Df_4W_OSL5sH4sW92pWKFIz9yEam3roixe1EtgnOhZw=&emci=f85d2e01-9167-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=d3a0f8e0-7d72-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=13691217) | Friend, Stop me if you’ve heard this before: _**“Congress is out of touch.”**_ I hear people say this all the time on the campaign trail. I’ve said it more than a few times myself over the years. Well, now that I’m running for Congress, I don’t want to do things the old-fashioned way. I want to devote every ounce of my energy to work on the issues you care about most. **So, today, I’m asking you one question: What issue do you care about most right now?** [_**Please take a minute to share your priority issues. Write as little or as much as you like, and our team will review every single response.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72094062/434271500/-1126519514?contactdata=N3/tbSOzWOa+nxrKcMCde8zEiC2c0dayCyM3z9t+CaWpkg/IY/J0Ub31HcuoA5Cw7uU0NwB1kIkF/09QO0TXCUhRB+c74WGlzoA9RwumhdnAf8DQwIEHz03s/H+DtOQw&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2023.10.24_B1_Survey_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDNhMGY4ZTAtN2Q3Mi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Df_4W_OSL5sH4sW92pWKFIz9yEam3roixe1EtgnOhZw=&emci=f85d2e01-9167-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=d3a0f8e0-7d72-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=13691217) [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72094063/434271501/-2075592397?contactdata=N3/tbSOzWOa+nxrKcMCde8zEiC2c0dayCyM3z9t+CaWpkg/IY/J0Ub31HcuoA5Cw7uU0NwB1kIkF/09QO0TXCUhRB+c74WGlzoA9RwumhdnAf8DQwIEHz03s/H+DtOQw&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2023.10.24_B1_Survey_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDNhMGY4ZTAtN2Q3Mi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Df_4W_OSL5sH4sW92pWKFIz9yEam3roixe1EtgnOhZw=&emci=f85d2e01-9167-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=d3a0f8e0-7d72-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=13691217) I read about members of Congress who have gone months without a single public event. That doesn’t fly here. As Assemblymember, City Councilmember, and City Attorney, the people I represented were my neighbors. People would come up with questions and concerns on the sidewalk, the coffee shop, and the grocery store. I held hundreds of community meetings. In fact, one of my favorite aspects of public service is connecting, personally, with the people I serve. Most of us, regardless of age, background, or ideology, want leaders who are responsive, accessible, and honest. If you honor me with your support, I will run my office that way again--as your Congressman. [_**But as hard as I try, I can’t speak to every single CA-30 voter in-person. That’s where the online surveys come in. Can you take a minute and let me know what issues you care about most right now? Share your thoughts →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72094064/434271502/-1126519514?contactdata=N3/tbSOzWOa+nxrKcMCde8zEiC2c0dayCyM3z9t+CaWpkg/IY/J0Ub31HcuoA5Cw7uU0NwB1kIkF/09QO0TXCUhRB+c74WGlzoA9RwumhdnAf8DQwIEHz03s/H+DtOQw&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2023.10.24_B1_Survey_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDNhMGY4ZTAtN2Q3Mi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Df_4W_OSL5sH4sW92pWKFIz9yEam3roixe1EtgnOhZw=&emci=f85d2e01-9167-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=d3a0f8e0-7d72-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=13691217) Thank you for taking the time to take this quick survey and thank you for all you do. body:
Another week closer to Election Day 2023 and another week of great events and happenings in the campaign. Here are just a few highlights: |
---
[](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=ce15142b0eb643e08b282e173534121e&_e=uUCWAzuiKCZ2maOAV9KqKygIFYaYRvTCST8V2Vdz1oJtSV0yHS6JDMC_Gjox-MEHNnKhbtLo5H3nyGMj5MZ-yOsu6-HJbYJrgRJ97Nwho0cMPApBLVNbVMpdBrQJ8KzLUK4UC0VLUKAd34bzimgzhHUSbgzfwbRE381vMrYl1ZUYaVIXPEhcrk-8crWBnA_iN7cw7wspbAckBhbzEJIoffzwZSwWyO5rwarADtO58yyyWUBjp5aySVuyN5Ixb8U48JnLyqIZA6YbzWRx0ucxejPKoKc7AcXc6v12Vz91nlUMTeg2mLUI3mlkvDMzQus3rkywbXb46tcfkBHymAJEcmlxiQ0m-qH-e2vjR_SC7dNHSHu1b-QxMLSNKIqCPFRyJfEZcORTS473iJkVUYxS0qqMC5Row_zQRGqTojXTSKFHtz6aivmsCarFU6GqSfbHVS7DDTWg28sw645ZDphxLA%3D%3D)

_**The Mackenzie Minute**_

* * *
Peter,

Another week closer to Election Day 2023 and another week of great events and happenings in the campaign. Here are just a few highlights:

* Bath Borough Mayor Fiorella Reginelli Mirabito Endorsement
* Mackenzie Election Integrity Team Launch - JOIN TODAY
* Lehighton Halloween Parade
* Lehigh County Republican Chairman’s Club Event
* Northampton County Republican Committee Fall Dinner

As always, if you need to get in contact with my campaign, please feel free to reach out at (484) 347-8777.

All the Best,
[](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=ce15142b0eb643e08b282e173534121e&_e=uUCWAzuiKCZ2maOAV9KqKygIFYaYRvTCST8V2Vdz1oJtSV0yHS6JDMC_Gjox-MEHNnKhbtLo5H3nyGMj5MZ-yOsu6-HJbYJrgRJ97Nwho0cMPApBLVNbVMpdBrQJ8KzLUK4UC0VLUKAd34bzimgzhHUSbgzfwbRE381vMrYl1ZUYaVIXPEhcrk-8crWBnA_iN7cw7wspbAckBhbzEJIoffzwZSwWyO5rwarADtO58yyyWUBjp5aySVuyN5Ixb8U48JnLyqIZA6YbzWRx0ucxejPKoKc7AcXc6v12Vz91nlUMTeg2mLUI3mlkvDMzQus3rC2t2uByTDrqj7Rc7EiZZkFlAwWCrxGC-um9EuaDWKo6by0pekC81xlHtm4cMw5qU_rPrcTVoKXJuz4ZdacoenoW_Bhy-H8Aj8npYSOL7S9lXfmJULJD3e38v6T6kUdPDe-nu0x16bpqSI74dzW82w%3D%3D)

* * *
**NEWS**
* * *

**Bath Borough Mayor Fiorella Reginelli Mirabito Endorsement**
I am proud to receive the endorsement of Bath Borough Mayor Fiorella Reginelli who said, "We can count on Ryan Mackenzie to fight for every community in the 7th District, big and small. The people of Bath and Northampton County need a proven leader like Ryan in Congress, and I am proud to endorse him." The Mayor joins a growing list of trusted local leaders who are joining Team Mackenzie and we’re happy to have her!

* * *
**Join My Election Integrity Team Today**

I have officially announced that I am launching an Election Integrity Team for this November’s Election to help provide a fair and secure election for our municipal, school board, and county candidates. My Election Integrity Team will help monitor the local elections on November 7th to ensure every legal vote cast is counted, and field any calls coming in about issues that may arise at polls or during ballot counting.

I need your help! We are building a team of volunteers who can help with poll watching certificates, and monitor polls and mail-in ballots as they are being opened. Sign up today to join the Election Integrity Team: [**by clicking here.**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=ce15142b0eb643e08b282e173534121e&_e=uUCWAzuiKCZ2maOAV9KqK7EHQQLF33Va5Y0ddF-yrGzfFsYlLeiuqoYRY44-eD6Nj1si3OPMr7RZkWDcOtFmZHQP9f1CccoLlUUFlq1EiO0O3NvGi-h98G8hlqFGET-YV-4Fl7nFZ9PffOuy4yenbA8FZCmoLDoaQ-8Hlam1EHWwVvXpNtOJABv_OB1BbdZv3OXcQ9EZvGtHbsVzi2l7ng%3D%3D)

We will be doing a zoom call on Monday, Oct. 30th at 6:00 P.M. to provide more information to everyone who volunteers. You will receive log-in information after you volunteer and before the call.

Even if you cannot volunteer with our Election Integrity Team, if you see any issues on Election Day, we encourage you to call our campaign at: 484-575-1872
* * *
**Lehighton Halloween Parade**
On Sunday, I attended the Lehighton Halloween Parade showing my support for all the local Republican candidates. It was great seeing so many familiar faces!

* * *
**Lehigh County Republican Chairman’s Club Event**
Last week I was happy to speak at the Lehigh County Republican Chairman’s Event in support of our full slate of 2023 candidates and about what 2024 holds for our Party.

* * *
**Northampton County Republican Committee Fall Dinner**
I attended the Northampton County Republican Committee Fall Dinner. It was great listening to Hogan Gidley, former Trump White House Principal Deputy Press Secretary.

(Pictured with Hogan Gidley, Former Trump White House Principal Deputy Press Secretary)

* * *

As we approach the final push for this year’s election and I continue to work hard at helping our local Republican candidates, I hope you will take some time to help them, too. Please give your local candidates a call to find out how you can help - from calling mail-in voters to remind them to return their ballots to working a poll on election day. As always, if you’d like to join our team, visit [**ryanforpa.com/#volunteer**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=ce15142b0eb643e08b282e173534121e&_e=uUCWAzuiKCZ2maOAV9KqKw-dgg6AF4TxuPdfFuA1ko5or7x-sZLXx1KpDnCp0TDrG_qkJH9oVtNMCejDqVzJwbFkGbM1qB5pzBvRPfUNo18dYi0Ug1Ws7QHZKss5ywYZwf6ZGcUQflz9zxjKH1oT3ab_FU_rh3SB4Yy87s4ejR2xkgMFgr6q4wzl2LDqBJlH1g3jtTYJ_pTBXZ7psY7FSAHvgq5MoTGJvkk142TtzA4%3D) or donate at [**give.ryanforpa.com.**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=ce15142b0eb643e08b282e173534121e&_e=uUCWAzuiKCZ2maOAV9KqKygIFYaYRvTCST8V2Vdz1oJtSV0yHS6JDMC_Gjox-MEHNnKhbtLo5H3nyGMj5MZ-yOsu6-HJbYJrgRJ97Nwho0cMPApBLVNbVMpdBrQJ8KzLUK4UC0VLUKAd34bzimgzhHUSbgzfwbRE381vMrYl1ZUYaVIXPEhcrk-8crWBnA_iN7cw7wspbAckBhbzEJIoffzwZSwWyO5rwarADtO58yyyWUBjp5aySVuyN5Ixb8U48JnLyqIZA6YbzWRx0ucxejPKoKc7AcXc6v12Vz91nlUMTeg2mLUI3mlkvDMzQus3VFZ_RWeijVVaeX7zaKKOVsbZTOes5HbVdnAhAWTZU2aLfCBVSLJHd8KKz_xkJswjJn6KbXrshgyRRJb9wyH_Mv1Ku7W-ICVDm0lbgVcFkiPFFB9Cq_1HwHBTuhhCCYr0J33r7FaynHBWwnsKm-Urmg%3D%3D)
