name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Teichert=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: ICYMI: John Teichert joins Fox to discuss latest in Israel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Teichert for Senate]()
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2955db5fefd3/icymi-john-teicherts-vision-for-marylands-senate-on-fox-6670870?e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
**ICYMI: John Teichert joins Fox to discuss latest in Israel**
**Baltimore, MD** – In case you missed it, Maryland U.S. Senate candidate and retired Brigadier General John Teichert responded to the prepare to deploy orders sent out to U.S. troops during an appearance on Fox News Sunday.
[WATCH: ](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=09bc74ab4c&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=ef4c705b21&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
**“It’s an implicit understanding by the Biden administration that Iran is the root cause of all of these problems we’ve seen in the Middle East in the last 15 days or so,”** Teichert said. **“The things that we do to deter an adversary by demonstrating capability and will are the same things that we can use to respond to an adversary and by posturing our forces in a better position both to deter and respond, it makes it less likely we’re going to need to actually respond to those threats.”**
General Teichert’s response followed Secretary of Defense Lloyd J. Austin’s [statement ](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=ec05f0bfc0&e=1b1fb1ad9f)on increasing U.S. force posture in Israel.
Teichert went on to address the threat posed by the involvement of Iranian proxies like Hezbollah and deterrence against Iran, stating in part, **“just in the last week or so, we’ve seen attacks in Syria, in Iraq, or from Yemen, and all of that points back to the things the Biden administration has yet to fully acknowledge, which is that appeasement to Iran has created more danger in the region, and we at the United States need to posture ourselves in order to deter Iran and to regain strength, capability and resolve in the region.”**
Teichert, a retired Air Force Brigadier General, spent time in the Middle East as the nation’s top defense official. He’s seeking the open U.S. Senate seat left open by Maryland Democrat Ben Cardin’s retirement. Watch Teichert’s Fox News interview in [full here](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=857072d50f&e=1b1fb1ad9f).
| [DONATE](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=100cfd5900&e=1b1fb1ad9f)

We're in the final days of October and you know what that means: **OUR END OF MONTH FUNDRAISING DEADLINE IS NEARLY HERE.**

We don't want to bombard you with emails, but you know this is a **CRUCIAL** time for our campaign - _ESPECIALLY WITH IT ALREADY BEING OCTOBER OF 2023!_

We would kindly ask that you carefully consider this date because **IT IS THE MOST IMPORTANT FUNDRAISING DEADLINE WE 'VE EVER SEEN.**

[ **COUNTING ON YOU** ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f879ce8a3c4a4013a047dc02106b5414&_e=UKgjwKRXJm-OTIFsr_XNZ1Dcm6-9eyvg1JrzB3am-JHsnaF3wYcHE6Mufr5V03J-ybdmX8JtilpcycRBY3wMIwfyCGnNgajXimqfhy-E0ByBy_E8YZ90I2dylZlnKVOkS1DRAZiMwCaTuIrjHyBLr3zCVZwC2wXfE-udIJap8l2SJF89rBUfz48-AvofafF5X2jjxkzRNe30VkJ_0EYU1xZFI5_DxFzLvMLnMqCnhxNUZklXQm5RHABczsXYsXnnwrkM6OuGl5wJUXX85mqBc2_A_j3dIScuuicBZq4vX7J426_FBFpaehDAP6tt4t0RDhd8jdMUnTxIFdbq-p80kfB7Zi9so_7MJNKVD7W0QOz677szDOwaYqHIlGephXXnGv6dWmX-9giPjYQtO3otIw%3D%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Emily=20Busch?=
subject: A sincere thank you
body:
I am truly humbled to have your support. | | | | | |
---
[](https://emilyformichigan.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c160d8287650841171c449cf3&id=40623fa923&e=b2327e6d25)
|
---
## Thank you!
Peter,

Thank you so much for your investment in my campaign here in MI-10. I am truly humbled to have your support. 2024 is our year to make history here in Michigan and I am so grateful to have you on our team as we do.
We've kicked things into full gear and have made significant strides on the campaign trail, and of course (as always), there’s a lot of work left to do. But for today, I just want to take a moment to say thank you.
Thank you for investing not in me, but in our movement for safer communities and schools. Thank you for your commitment to supporting the gun safety measures that we need nationwide to keep our kids safe. I've spent years fighting the NRA, who continually lobbies for irresponsible policies that place our communities in danger. I know firsthand we can't just wait for change, we have to step up and demand it, so thank you for joining me in this fight.
We could not do this without you, Peter.

In service and appreciation,
Emily
PS: I’d be so grateful if I could count on your support again. [Click here to rush another donation to my campaign today!](https://emilyformichigan.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c160d8287650841171c449cf3&id=c69c58de72&e=b2327e6d25)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Noah?=
subject: stop Joe from making a mistake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee To Elect David Flippo]( "Paid for by The Committee To Elect David Flippo")
body:
Tell Governor Lombardo he needs to reconsider | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f6fc89fd2c0a/stop-joe-from-making-a-mistake?e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=8b099af80c&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| Hey Peter,

We wanted to bring to your attention a recent development that could significantly impact our race for Congress.

There are whispers that Governor Lombardo is considering endorsing former Democratic Mayor John Lee, who's now running as a Republican in the very same race that David Flippo is in.** Call Governor Lombardo's office at 775-684-5670 to let him know what you think.**

We both know that Lt. Col. Flippo is the combat-ready conservative we need to defeat Steve Horsford, and we can win without forsaking who we are.

_Here's why this matters:_

**FACT:** In his last year as a Nevada Senator, John Lee voted for two significant tax increases.

**SOURCE:** Assembly Bill 219-2011 and Senate Bill 432-2011

**FACT:** John Lee supported and voted in favor of Obamacare, a policy that has had wide-reaching implications for our healthcare system.

**SOURCE:** Assembly Bill 309-2011
Given these facts, we're reaching out to ask for your help.

**FACT:** As Mayor of North Las Vegas, John Lee defunded the police by 100 million dollars

**SOURCE:** https://360newslasvegas.com/nlv-mayor-lee-hosting-criminal-warrant-forgiveness-event-today/

Here's what you can do:

Call Governor Lombardo's office at**775-684-5670.** If someone picks up, share your concerns, if you get a voicemail machine, please leave a voicemail.

Please be respectful and courteous in your conversation. We all want what's best for Nevada.

Share your concerns about the potential endorsement of John Lee, especially given his voting record.

If you have friends or family who are also concerned about the direction of our state, please encourage them to make their voices heard as well.

David Flippo's commitment to Nevada is unwavering, and with your help, we can ensure that our leaders make decisions that truly reflect the will and best interests of the people.

**Only with Grassroots support can we convince our Governor to support a candidate who will fight for Nevada and our shared values.**

Thank you for your continued support and for standing with us during these crucial times.

For Nevada,

Noah Ameur

clean_body: Tell Governor Lombardo he needs to reconsider | | | | | | Hey Peter, We wanted to bring to your attention a recent development that could significantly impact our race for Congress. There are whispers that Governor Lombardo is considering endorsing former Democratic Mayor John Lee, who's now running as a Republican in the very same race that David Flippo is in. Call Governor Lombardo's office at 775-684-5670 to let him know what you think. We both know that Lt. Col. Flippo is the combat-ready conservative we need to defeat Steve Horsford, and we can win without forsaking who we are. Here's why this matters: FACT: In his last year as a Nevada Senator, John Lee voted for two significant tax increases. SOURCE: Assembly Bill 219-2011 and Senate Bill 432-2011 FACT: John Lee supported and voted in favor of Obamacare, a policy that has had wide-reaching implications for our healthcare system. SOURCE: Assembly Bill 309-2011 Given these facts, we're reaching out to ask for your help. FACT: As Mayor of North Las Vegas, John Lee defunded the police by 100 million dollars SOURCE: Here's what you can do: Call Governor Lombardo's office at775-684-5670. If someone picks up, share your concerns, if you get a voicemail machine, please leave a voicemail. Please be respectful and courteous in your conversation. We all want what's best for Nevada. Share your concerns about the potential endorsement of John Lee, especially given his voting record. If you have friends or family who are also concerned about the direction of our state, please encourage them to make their voices heard as well. David Flippo's commitment to Nevada is unwavering, and with your help, we can ensure that our leaders make decisions that truly reflect the will and best interests of the people. Only with Grassroots support can we convince our Governor to support a candidate who will fight for Nevada and our shared values. Thank you for your continued support and for standing with us during these crucial times. For Nevada, Noah Ameur Political Director David Flippo for Nevada | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | "Paid for by The Committee To Elect David Flippo" | | Copyright © 2023 Committee To Elect David Flippo, All rights reserved.

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: One week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
We already know what's coming, which is why we need to be ready.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=647%2E791427%2EAY2rDQ)

Hey team, it's Ilhan. Please allow me to be very direct:
I'm reaching out this morning because one week from today, we're closing the books on our October fundraising numbers, and I need to ask if you can **[make a $3 contribution to our campaign before then.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct23.jei10D&refcode=em231024-1-t1t2&t=2&akid=647%2E791427%2EAY2rDQ)
October 31 marks our final monthly deadline before we're less than a year from Election Day 2024 — when this race will truly begin to heat up.
The right-wing GOP, the corporate Democratic establishment, and the billionaires who fund them both have already made it crystal clear that I'm one of their top targets in Congress this cycle.
They'd all love nothing more than to defeat the movement we've spent years building together, and are going to pour millions of dollars of dark money into Minnesota to try.
We already know what's coming. Which is why we _need_ to be ready.
It's going to take a lot of resources. And as you know, we're funding this campaign the right way — _together_. That's why it'd mean so much to have your support, especially today.
So please:
**[Can you make a $3 contribution to stand with me and our re-election campaign today? Every donation — no matter how big or small — goes a long way.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct23.jei10D&refcode=em231024-1-t1t2&t=3&akid=647%2E791427%2EAY2rDQ)

As always, thank you. For chipping in if you can, and for everything that you do for this movement.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

name: GIFFORDS
subject: Beyond the headlines
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Gun violence knows no boundaries
#

Friends -
More than 110 people will die from gun violence today.
It’s an epidemic that knows no boundaries.
It happens to people walking down the street. It happens in public spaces. It happens at home. It can happen anywhere, to anyone.
There are countless victims whose lives are stolen by gun violence—whose stories never make the national news.
So while we fight each and every day at GIFFORDS to create a world where we no longer see the devastating headlines of another mass shooting, we’re also fighting to end the day-to-day violence that happens beyond the headlines.
It’s the violence we don’t always see, but it is always there, devastating communities and families each and every day.
[**We need you with us in the fight to end gun violence in America. Please, make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today to stand with us and fuel our lifesaving work.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-oct23.zcsGXG&refcode=em231024-1-30&t=1&akid=6770%2E3935704%2EipWG9t)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-oct23.j_Pk1L&amount=3&t=20&akid=6770%2E3935704%2EipWG9t)**

body:
| | |
---
Friend, despite losing the 2020 election, inciting an insurrection and facing multiple criminal charges, **Donald Trump is polling ahead of his competitors in the 2024 primary!**
Every day, it's looking more and more likely that Donald Trump will be the GOP nominee to take on President Biden — and the stakes couldn't be any higher.
President Biden has spent the last two and a half years rebuilding our country and our democracy from the wreckage of the Trump administration. But now, Trump could be on track to retake power and destroy all the progress we've made!
Grassroots people like you defeated Trump in 2020 — but we need to know that you'll stand against him again. **That's why we've chosen you to represent 43614 in our exclusive online poll. So please, respond before 11:59 p.m. to tell us where you stand:**
**Do you approve of Donald Trump?**
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72095225/434275522/-1337737924?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4524-su-nd&refcode=jtk4524-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDllMjliMy03ZTcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aNAABU5R7W4rVUQ0tE5nKRa11VVyAIW7Vvq_Kj6vuYY=&emci=e9527b37-9b71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=249e29b3-7e72-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)

|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72095227/434275524/1575385346?code=jtk4524-su-nd&refcode=jtk4524-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDllMjliMy03ZTcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aNAABU5R7W4rVUQ0tE5nKRa11VVyAIW7Vvq_Kj6vuYY=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72095228/434275525/1575385346?code=jtk4524-su-nd&refcode=jtk4524-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDllMjliMy03ZTcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aNAABU5R7W4rVUQ0tE5nKRa11VVyAIW7Vvq_Kj6vuYY=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72095229/434275526/1575385346?code=jtk4524-su-nd&refcode=jtk4524-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDllMjliMy03ZTcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aNAABU5R7W4rVUQ0tE5nKRa11VVyAIW7Vvq_Kj6vuYY=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Virginia Election Alerts [via Team Kiggans]

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Making sure you saw Betsy DeVos’ tweet
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Hey there,
I wanted to make sure you saw the below from my team last week. Betsy DeVos is finally saying the quiet part out loud: Despite serving as Secretary of Education for four years, she doesn’t believe that the Department of Education should exist.
And although she’s no longer a cabinet member, she and the rest of the DeVos family are still working to influence our education system -- by supporting candidates who will advocate for their particular policies at the national level. **Late last month, the DeVos family contributed $46,200 to one of my potential Republican opponents, former Congressman Mike Rogers, because they know that when he’s elected he will advocate for those same burn-it-down policies in the Senate -- even if it comes at the expense of Michigan families.**
Unfortunately, this is just the beginning of the support from big money culture war donors that my eventual Republican opponent will receive. [**That’s why I would love to earn your support today: When we all come together and chip in, it serves as a strong rebuttal to the DeVos-level influence in this race. Will you chip in now?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23.ttRNnI&refcode=em231024-1-30&t=1&akid=745%2E135344%2Eyw6MRL)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23.ttRNnI&refcode=em231024-1-30&t=2&akid=745%2E135344%2Eyw6MRL)**
Thank you,
Elissa
\---------- Begin forwarded message ---------
From: ElissaSlotkin.org
Subject: Re: Betsy DeVos’ mind-blowing tweet
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23.ttRNnI&refcode=em231024-1-30&t=3&akid=745%2E135344%2Eyw6MRL)

Friend,
As Michiganders know, for decades the DeVos family’s #1 issue has been weakening Michigan's, and the country's, public education system. Betsy DeVos used Michigan as her petri dish before becoming Trump’s Secretary of Education, and his longest serving cabinet secretary – just about the full four years. That’s why Betsy DeVos’ tweet and article this week are particularly head-shaking:
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23.ttRNnI&refcode=em231024-1-30&t=4&akid=745%2E135344%2Eyw6MRL)
She’s finally saying the quiet part out loud: Betsy DeVos was Trump’s longest serving cabinet secretary and oversaw a department she didn’t even believe should exist. She took a salary and traveled on the taxpayers’ dime, all while working to run the organization she was leading into the ground.
But that fight didn’t end when Betsy DeVos left her cabinet position. For years, the DeVos family has funded candidates who will push their particular policies at the national level. And just this week, we got a glimpse into who they’re backing to be Michigan’s next Senator when former Congressman Mike Rogers filed his FEC report. **In the first month of his campaign, the DeVos family has shown they’re all-in on sending Mike Rogers to the Senate – contributing over $46,200, all in one day.**
We know that this is just the beginning of the support Mike Rogers will receive from big money donors. This is why we’re asking: [**Will you help us push back against the influence of the DeVos family in our race by chipping in $3 today? It really does all add up – their big checks don’t hold a candle to the power of lots and lots of people giving a little at a time.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23.ttRNnI&refcode=em231024-1-30&t=5&akid=745%2E135344%2Eyw6MRL)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23.ttRNnI&refcode=em231024-1-30&t=6&akid=745%2E135344%2Eyw6MRL)**
Thank you,
Team Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=7&akid=745%2E135344%2Eyw6MRL).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Setting a winning pace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
We need to lace up our shoes ahead of 2024.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72096012/434279521/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjdiMGRmYS04MDcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YPPf2A4hxHQHFvnvq3OL8GKP3xrCXu_TeJQebFvJNJw=&emci=562302f4-8072-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=a27b0dfa-8072-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)
---

| | I want to start by saying thank you to everyone for signing my birthday card. Serving Oregon in the Senate is the greatest birthday present, and I'm thankful every day to be representing people like you. Every birthday I am reminded of all the progress we've achieved throughout the years — but I know there's more to do, and that's why I'm not slowing down! On Saturday, November 4, I will complete 67 laps on a track – one for every year of my life. With every lap, I'll be thinking about the tough races we're fighting to win and the movement we're growing to defend the Democratic Senate Majority by winning competitive races in Montana, Ohio, Arizona, Nevada, Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, and Michigan.**T****hat goal will keep me on track as the miles add up.** Across the country, there are many tough races we need to win to retake the House majority, keep the Senate majority, and hold on to the White House. I'm focused on winning tough Senate seats in 2024, and that's why I'm running laps to raise money for the most competitive races. [**You can help save the Senate by sponsoring a lap, a mile, or the whole race. clean_body: We need to lace up our shoes ahead of 2024. | | | | I want to start by saying thank you to everyone for signing my birthday card. Serving Oregon in the Senate is the greatest birthday present, and I'm thankful every day to be representing people like you. Every birthday I am reminded of all the progress we've achieved throughout the years — but I know there's more to do, and that's why I'm not slowing down! On Saturday, November 4, I will complete 67 laps on a track – one for every year of my life. With every lap, I'll be thinking about the tough races we're fighting to win and the movement we're growing to defend the Democratic Senate Majority by winning competitive races in Montana, Ohio, Arizona, Nevada, Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, and Michigan.That goal will keep me on track as the miles add up. Across the country, there are many tough races we need to win to retake the House majority, keep the Senate majority, and hold on to the White House. I'm focused on winning tough Senate seats in 2024, and that's why I'm running laps to raise money for the most competitive races. = Onward! Jeff | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Lose Cruz HQ
subject: You ≠ 🏧
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOSE CRUZ PAC
body:
Here's what makes our email program unique.
# [](https://act.losecruzpac.com/go/128?t=1&akid=124%2E623276%2Ec9_fVm)
With the end of another month approaching, we know you’re probably getting _a lot_ of fundraising emails right now.
A lot of these emails will try and convince you that the world will end if every single person reading their email doesn’t donate _immediately._ Other programs will try to outright deceive you with tactics such as fake “matches” that don’t actually exist.
**That's what makes us different.** We won't ever deceive you, or tell you the world will end if you can't contribute to our emails. [**(With that being said, if you're in a position to chip in $5 to help us Lose Cruz, click here!)](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231024?refcode=em20231024&amount=5&refcode2=124_623276_c9_fVm&akid=124%2E623276%2Ec9_fVm)**
While taking on Ted Cruz and beating him next November certainly won’t be an easy task, we’re committed to building a grassroots coalition to send our part-time senator into retirement for good.
With the stakes as high as they are, we understand that not everyone who gets our emails will always be in a position to contribute — and that’s okay! We’re grateful to have you on this team and a crucial part of our grassroots campaign to Lose Cruz.
**We're in this for the long haul, and we're here to do it the _right_ way.** We have a unique opportunity to part ways with our part-time senator for good and we know that a massive grassroots coalition built on shared interests and mutual respect will be stronger than the powerful special interests bankrolling Ted’s campaign.
[**If you're in a position to do so today, please pitch in $5 or anything that works for you to make sure we Lose Cruz in 2024.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231024?refcode=em20231024&amount=5&refcode2=124_623276_c9_fVm&akid=124%2E623276%2Ec9_fVm)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231024?amount=5&refcode=em20231024&refcode2=124_623276_c9_fVm&akid=124%2E623276%2Ec9_fVm)**
Thank you for your support!
LCHQ

* * *
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-footer?refcode=em-124&t=2&refcode2=124_623276_c9_fVm&akid=124%2E623276%2Ec9_fVm)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.losecruzpac.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=124%2E623276%2Ec9_fVm)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.losecruzpac.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.losecruzpac.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=124%2E623276%2Ec9_fVm)

To give by check:
Lose Cruz PAC
1835 7th St NW, Ste 203
Washington, DC 20001
Email us: [losecruz@e.losecruzpac.com](mailto:info@losecruzpac.com)
PAID FOR BY LOSE CRUZ PAC. LOSECRUZPAC.COM. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE COMMITTEE.

| | Patriot,

---
Can you believe the Republicans are doing _ANOTHER_ debate?
---
They’re once again going to spend the entire night attacking me, playing right into Crooked Joe’s hands.

---
_This will effectively be a 2-hour long pro-Biden primetime commercial.
_
---
**But you know that your all-time favorite, very intelligent President – who is always two steps ahead of the RINOs – wouldn’t let them get away with it, right?**
---
I will once again drown out the little league debate with an event of my own.

---
I’m holding a rally in the GREAT STATE OF FLORIDA on the night of the debate.

---
And to make it special, YOU could be my VIP for this very special rally.

---
I’m going to fly one lucky patriot (and a guest of your choice) to Florida, put you up at a hotel, and we’ll even take a picture together so that you can remember the night forever.

---
**So, what do you say? Will YOU be my VIP?**

clean_body: (Yes, I can’t believe it either. They’re really doing another debate...) | | | | | Patriot, Can you believe the Republicans are doing ANOTHER debate? They’re once again going to spend the entire night attacking me, playing right into Crooked Joe’s hands. This will effectively be a 2-hour long pro-Biden primetime commercial. But you know that your all-time favorite, very intelligent President – who is always two steps ahead of the RINOs – wouldn’t let them get away with it, right? I will once again drown out the little league debate with an event of my own. I’m holding a rally in the GREAT STATE OF FLORIDA on the night of the debate. And to make it special, YOU could be my VIP for this very special rally. I’m going to fly one lucky patriot (and a guest of your choice) to Florida, put you up at a hotel, and we’ll even take a picture together so that you can remember the night forever. body:
it’s that simple.
|
Team, **In two weeks, we’ll have the opportunity to vote to protect reproductive rights in the Ohio Constitution.** Voting YES on Issue 1 on Election Day would enshrine access to abortion, contraception, miscarriage care, and fertility treatment. It would protect our freedom to make health care decisions for ourselves and our families. Yes, it’s really that simple. **[Chip in right now to help pass Issue 1 and preserve our reproductive rights>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72096898/434282172/1558722533?refcode=odp_em_231024_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTExMTgzMi04MjcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YwmtqGVGN0mjJ8Tst0c3zqMNkBjzpGInand75Ppo9iw=)** Thank you, The Ohio Dems | **************A reproductive rights initiative is on the Ohio ballot this November. name: =?utf-8?Q?Max=20Ukropina?=
subject: Trump got the border right
body:
There's only one obvious solution to this crisis.

Peter, Border Patrol announced over the weekend that 2023 is now officially the worst year on record for migrant encounters.

169 people on the terrorist watch list have been caught this year ... another record high. Now Border Patrol is warning that Hamas terrorists may try to enter our wide open southern border!

It's beyond obvious to people like you and me that Biden's border policy - if we can even call it that - isn't working. It's a disaster. It's endangering our national security.

There's only one obvious solution...

I'm calling for an immediate return to the Trump Administration's approach to securing the border.
President Trump's approach worked. The numbers don't lie. All of the border policies that Biden arrogantly repealed when he took office need to be reinstated ASAP.

If you agree it's time to go back to President Trump's border policies, will you add your name to our petition so I know you're standing with me? (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/add_name_border_security?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Trump_BorderSecurity_Sign2&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=6246aa5dc6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
SIGN THE PETITION (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/add_name_border_security?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Trump_BorderSecurity_Sign2&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=6246aa5dc6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Getting President Biden out of office won't end this crisis. We need to go back to smart, proven, effective border security policies that worked just a few short years ago.

If we're in this together, we can win this election and secure our border now!

I hope you're standing with me,

Max Ukropina

Fellow American,

I haven’t spent my career in politics. I spent most of it as a reporter taking on Communist dictators like Nicolas Maduro, Augusto Pinochet, and even Fidel Castro. **I wasn’t intimidated by them, and I’m _CERTAINLY_ not scared of going toe to toe with socialist Democrats who attack me and other Republicans.** My experience as a reporter taught me that the truth is ALWAYS worth fighting for. Today in Congress, I’m working to defend America’s truth. We’re a country of freedom, opportunity, and hope - but in 2024, the radical Left is fighting to take that all away. Because I am so outspoken, liberals have announced my district has a top target. They hate that I’m calling them out and telling the TRUTH. It’s going to take us all to defend my seat, but together, I know we can do it. **[Can you contribute to my campaign? $5, $10, $20 goes a long way.](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=8c19ffa99ea2494cba9c477dd141c5c1&_e=TYJCsukHnYyf10gPqYWa27Q3vlc10r2ZvVo_rVxZjWEnI-Un6dOrskHBRHUkBsa0cG9HIgiuwKak9BgsnjkJ1TM9k9MHYttQQU4o4Tj-0aoimJASci4VHo1y39-ec13sPdOFTL5IW2GmZB3OX8NZ13g6a3aiTEd03pA6lmes2nxiVHqisz3vn9Udk9wBpIvuwIuMnZ4aFbLJDVpSm85-KyKh49kCTWRdo6S8rIxVQY3qOyvliJrzxAv7wy7QVgnXWodst636eFL3Uf4eb7dy-oUl1BXZ96VCj3V1ezJ8FnkEMuL6ZdE9wanVCTNIaudnmASP_8wNIINo8vN8P0ehqvEFJkTrOVz7AsWa4AkeQvY%3D)**

My experience as a reporter taught me that the truth is ALWAYS worth fighting for. Today in Congress, I’m working to defend America’s truth. We’re a country of freedom, opportunity, and hope - but in 2024, the radical Left is fighting to take that all away. Because I am so outspoken, liberals have announced my district has a top target. They hate that I’m calling them out and telling the TRUTH. It’s going to take us all to defend my seat, but together, I know we can do it. Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar | | | | | | Paid for by Salazar for Congress | | Unsubscribe from future emails

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Bergman out of Speaker race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Breaking News - My opponent, Rep. Jack Bergman, is off the ballot for House Speaker.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
CONTRIBUTE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
During the second round of voting in the GOP conference, Jack Bergman's bid for Speaker failed and fizzled out this morning, which may have elicited a collective sigh of relief from every informed voter in Northern Michigan and the UP.
Why is the GOP in disarray and fractured with an inability to govern? The answer may lie in the fact that we elected the wrong leaders.
I sincerely hope the GOP nominates a Speaker who can unite both parties and solve problems. We knew that person wasn't Bergman, and now the Nation knows he's not the uniter he thought he was.
To get better leadership in Washington, to improve our Nation's progress, and to solve real issues in a functioning government, we must start by making better choices on the local ballot.
Join me in unseating Jack Bergman once and for all so he can never come close to leadership again. [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] We must de-elect Jack Bergman and encourage a new type of politics based on collaboration, cooperation, and a collective vision to get things done for the American people.
Let's work together to save Social Security, fight for Medicare for All, and put American workers back on the pedestal where they belong.
I need you with me.
Thank you for your support, loyalty, and generosity.
V/R
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan and the UP
Democrat, MI01

name: Judicial Watch Action
subject: CENSORED AND CONTROLLED: Unmasking the Deep State’s War on Free Speech in America
body: “Censored and Controlled" is a documentary that details the coordinated effort by the government and Big Tech to censor and suppress information on topics such as Hunter Biden’s laptop, COVID-19, and election debates. [Action] CENSORED AND CONTROLLED: UNMASKING THE DEEP STATE’S WAR ON FREE SPEECH IN AMERICA [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65518&L=30530&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1tTnZjd1BKcktIOCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1hY3Rpb24rYWxlcnQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=26a6e127f49861edb5d54492b042f18484207103899c44c282e965cd67ca774b] “Censored and Controlled" is a documentary that details the coordinated effort by the government and Big Tech to censor and suppress information on topics such as Hunter Biden’s laptop, COVID-19, and election debates. The documentary features interviews with people who have taken leading roles in exposing the collusion between government and social media to control what Americans see and hear. Included in the lineup of experts is: Senator Eric Schmitt (R-MO) who was attorney general of Missouri filed a lawsuit in 2020 against President Biden and other administration officials, alleging they were working with social media platforms to censor information related to COVID-19 and other topics. Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH), who is chairman of the House Judiciary Committee. Jordan’s committee is leading the House investigation into government-led censorship on social media. Journalist Matt Taibbi, one of the journalists who covered the release of the “Twitter Files,” which exposed government involvement in Twitter and other Big Tech censorship of Americans. Taibbi testified before Congress about what the “Twitter Files” revealed about the partnership between the government and social media to censor information and opinions. Chris Nelson, senior investigator at Judicial Watch, formerly a career counterintelligence officer with the U.S. Government. And, Tom Fitton, president of Judicial Watch, which has filed Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuits and other litigation concerning government and Big Tech censorship. WATCH NOW! name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want you by my side, Friend
body:
Will you join my exclusive Ambassador’s Circle?

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbmgp5la0is2poa8vgp4tq4p0u29vf4rcbua16u0_rp22sh2s8i66p70shjmao76c9h2bs)
---

_Friend, I wanted to extend an exclusive invitation to you..._

My team is having a membership drive from today until November 8 to get as many new Ambassador's Circle members as we can to join our team **ahead of the THIRD presidential debate.**

So, I have an important question to ask you.

**[Will you please show your support ahead of the debate by becoming a member of my Ambassador's Circle?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zckrh4bhdb5884eif3rmmg8u13ihd2jat4o10pfg_rp22sh2s8i66p70shjmao76c9h2bs "Will you please show your support ahead of the debate by becoming a member of my Ambassador’s Circle?")**

All it takes is**[$15 to activate your membership](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2v9ofi3in1ltl2dmvr6stpeu0fv1rfv789gcor0_rp22sh2s8i66p70shjmao76c9h2bs "$15 to activate your membership")** and join my exclusive team of patriots who are helping pave the way for a brighter future.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztajpca2cdr2s0luhfg18brfa3c1321v5r6h81vg_rp22sh2s8i66p70shjmao76c9h2bs)
---
| | [ACTIVATE YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z88n6cnjk6tnbqecie0k4g68h36a5dhvfthf7rfg_rp22sh2s8i66p70shjmao76c9h2bs)
---

After winning the first two debates, my campaign saw a surge of momentum, I moved to SECOND place in the national polls, and the support is still flooding in.

But, keeping this momentum going ahead of the third debate and having the resources to capitalize on momentum after the debate will be critical for my campaign.

**[That's why it's so important that you join my team as an Ambassador's Circle Member ahead of the THIRD debate on November 8.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6shrt4c7ti4ip9lc1r8pj6478pg8v0n75eocqa8_rp22sh2s8i66p70shjmao76c9h2bs "That’s why it’s so important that you join my team as an Ambassador’s Circle Member ahead of the THIRD debate on November 8.")**

The best part is - as an Ambassador's Circle Member, you will be unlocking access to: **• Exclusive news and updates
• Discounted merchandise offers
• Behind the scenes footage on the campaign trail
• AND MORE...**
**[Friend, will you join my team by rushing in $15 or more to activate your membership today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbjfk3npqhs2f5ri7edmq43do5nq3qdfv04f2ss8_rp22sh2s8i66p70shjmao76c9h2bs "Friend, will you join my team by rushing in $15 or more to activate your membership today?")**

---
My very best,

Nikki Haley

---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqvi5k6rj6ktvf69c49vtiqot1rd0f15b8b5neio_rp22sh2s8i66p70shjmao76c9h2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq0a17vd0rc09uqchug2e9pvdd7gjr2t2titban0_rp22sh2s8i66p70shjmao76c9h2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zho29bme6aj6rcr9eeiidq63qf88g960q6edvqsg_rp22sh2s8i66p70shjmao76c9h2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. name: Fair Fight Action
subject: Modern-day Jim Crow laws
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
This is a key way that anti-voter lawmakers try to suppress the vote. We’re fighting back. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72097771/434285471/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20231024_f_voterid_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDFjOTZlZC04NDcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G-m2mWuRz2mEI-QlhuETzMnJVqDGlQ_5CbKK8vuZwWk=&emci=24e60124-cf71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=441c96ed-8472-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | There’s a difference between having the _right_ to do something and having the ability to do something. Just look at voting during the Jim Crow era. On paper, Black men and Black women had the right to vote after the 15th and 19th Amendments were ratified, respectively. However, in Southern states, literacy tests, poll taxes, and violent intimidation prevented Black people from exercising that right. White lawmakers were desperate to stop communities they viewed as undesirable voting blocs from wielding power at the ballot box. It was one of the ugliest chapters of our nation’s history. And its legacy still lives on through modern-day restrictions on the right to vote — including **burdensome voter ID laws that disproportionately target Black, brown, elderly, student, rural, and low-income voters.** **Where do voter ID laws come from?** In 2002, Congress passed a law that gave states different options for verifying voters’ identities, opening the door for particularly strict requirements. Indiana took the ball and ran with it, enacting what was seen as the strictest voter ID law in the country. In 2008, the Supreme Court upheld it — giving other states the green light to follow suit. The floodgates opened even further in 2013, when the Supreme Court gutted the Voting Rights Act. States with a history of voting discrimination no longer had to get new voting laws pre-cleared by the Justice Department. _That very same day_ , Texas implemented a strict photo ID requirement for voting. Now, 36 states have voter ID laws, with 19 requiring photo IDs. **Who gets hurt by restrictive voter ID requirements?** Plenty of eligible voters don’t have any form of photo ID, but the numbers are particularly high for certain communities: 25% of voting-age Black Americans, 18% of citizens aged 65 or older, 16% of Latino voters, and 15% of voting-age Americans who make less than $35,000 a year. And **the racial turnout gap has grown in states that have passed strict voter ID laws.** If someone can’t take time off work to go get a driver’s license, doesn’t live somewhere where they can take public transit to get to the DMV, or has to pay fees to get an acceptable ID, that requirement serves as a type of poll tax. And the different types of IDs that states accept can have discriminatory effects. **Texas, for example, allows handgun licenses but not student IDs** — throwing a roadblock in front of young voters who may not have another way to prove their eligibility. **Do these laws solve any actual problems?** Anti-voter lawmakers claim that strict voting ID mandates can prevent so-called “voter fraud.” But studies have shown that cases of alleged voter impersonation usually come from clerical errors or bad data matching. The same studies found that the incidence rate is extremely low — between 0.0003% and 0.0025%. The Brennan Center claimed it’s more likely an American “will be struck by lightning than that he will impersonate another voter at the polls.” **It’s clear: Harsh voter ID laws limit the freedom to vote, particularly for communities that have already been marginalized.** **At Fair Fight Action, we’ll continue to advocate against burdensome and restrictive voter ID mandates — because all eligible voters should be able to make their voices heard at the ballot box.** And you help make this work possible, alongside a team of activists across the country. Thank you for your steadfast support. Side by side, we’ll continue to fight for free and fair elections. Together, The Fair Fight Action Team | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72097772/434285472/1008351422?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20231024_f_voterid_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDFjOTZlZC04NDcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G-m2mWuRz2mEI-QlhuETzMnJVqDGlQ_5CbKK8vuZwWk=)

name: Team Chrissy
subject: It’s time to put an end to the GOP’s antics
body:
It’s time to put a stop to the extremist House Republicans.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72098702/434289094/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjllMTk2Ny04NjcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ed76ypFVPYb1S7sRntPsou93sd53LnZGojePUs2UVc=&emci=7484f774-c171-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=169e1967-8672-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek,

We keep thinking we’ve seen the worst of the Republican Party: Denying the 2020 election, banning abortion, mocking bipartisanship, undermining our national security by holding up a long list of military promotions, and more. But they keep **proving us wrong.**
They’ve spent 2023 trying to reverse the progress we made during the first two years of the Biden-Harris administration (and the last two years of Nancy Pelosi’s historic tenure as Speaker) – like when they tried to elect far-right MAGA extremist Jim Jordan as Speaker, or when they decided to waste the American people's time and money on a bogus impeachment inquiry into President Biden.
And when the American people faced a government shutdown earlier this month – which would have put the livelihoods of MILLIONS on the line – they were all too eager to let Americans foot the bill for their political posturing.
Derek, it’s time to put a stop to the destructive antics of the extremist Republicans – and the moderates in their party who seemingly enable them.
**Chrissy is fighting _every day_ to deliver for you and your family – but she depends on supporters like you to power her work. [Will you chip in $5 now to support Chrissy’s fight _for_ progress and _against_ the MAGA extremists getting in the way of a more progressive future for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72098707/434289097/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk895-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjllMTk2Ny04NjcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ed76ypFVPYb1S7sRntPsou93sd53LnZGojePUs2UVc=)**
| | [GIVE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72098711/434289101/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk895-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjllMTk2Ny04NjcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ed76ypFVPYb1S7sRntPsou93sd53LnZGojePUs2UVc=)

name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: Support World War II heroes at AVC's Conference
body:
I wouldn't ask for your help if it weren't urgent.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35599%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wbYJW93otAi7JqcHfnIeNw&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American, I wouldn't ask for your help if it weren't urgent. **This year, the American Veterans Center is expecting our BIGGEST gathering of World War II heroes for our Annual Veterans Conference in nearly 20 years.** And while the budget for this year's Annual Veterans Conference has already been spent, the American Veterans Center team is _still_ hearing from World War II veterans who would like to attend. The **Gary Sinise Foundation** is generously providing lodging ... **American Airlines** is providing flights ... and I hope that you, Fellow American, would consider helping to cover lunch and dinner for our World War II heroes during this year's Veterans' Conference.
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35599%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wbYJW93otAi7JqcHfnIeNw&sysid=1)
---
**[Can I count on your urgent gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or more before Wednesday, October 25 to help cover the meals for our World War II heroes at this year's Conference?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35590%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DN9zhpHAigX8xbCmujv%2b%2fg&sysid=1)** On average, it costs $100 for each day of meals we provide to a World War II veteran. To make sure we can cover all the meals for the veterans we expect, I'm urgently raising $3,000 before Wednesday, October 25.
---
[Give $25 -- Cover 1 Veteran's Breakfast](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35591%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rTUWvXJyxhcY%2fGYlpDD0hA&sysid=1)
---
[Give $50 -- Cover 1 Veteran's Dinner ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35592%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ONOY2%2fdF4yYx7rxqv2I%2bew&sysid=1)
---
[Give $100 -- Cover 1 Veteran's Day](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35593%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bAKNXui9wyhodZVIkEpFtg&sysid=1)
---
[Give ANY amount to help](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35594%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DKMMvAJzYMHPxVm%2bJ8zhfg&sysid=1)
---
Every year, generous and patriotic Americans like YOU help the American Veterans Center honor our nation's heroes, from World War II to today, at the Annual Veterans Conference. At this special, one-of-a-kind event, veterans have the opportunity to share their stories with young people and military cadets in attendance. They can reconnect with their brothers- and sisters-in-arms. And, just as important, they can know that their stories are professionally recorded and preserved by AVC, so their legacy is passed on to the next generation.
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35599%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wbYJW93otAi7JqcHfnIeNw&sysid=1)
---
The AVC Annual Veterans Conference is a monumental occasion for veterans of every generation. _But it's particularly moving for our World War II heroes, who will see firsthand how their service and sacrifices are still being honored, 80 years later._ **[Before Wednesday, October 25, the American Veterans Center is urgently raising $3,000 to provide all the meals to our World War II heroes at this year's Conference. If these WWII veterans can count on your support, please make your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35505%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E7KcO67KOA%2bH%2b2MVbIn0%2fQ&sysid=1)**
---
[Support a WWII hero at AVC's Annual Veterans Conference](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35506%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pUGPX6UlCRLulcnz3mAp0Q&sysid=1)
---
Your generosity today will ensure the Greatest Generation's legacy lives on, making their bravery immortal and safeguarding the firsthand accounts of their valor and service for generations to come. **[Please -- if you'd like to help support a WWII hero at this year's Conference -- make your most generous gift right now.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35507%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=P4vdhmK%2bO3WcI39e7JBeCg&sysid=1)** Thank you for your support and thank you for playing a critical role in honoring our World War II heroes at this year's Conference. Tim Holbert President American Veterans Center P.S. Your contribution to this special mission doesn't just make a difference -- it makes history. Let's ensure every World War II veteran who wishes to attend this year's Annual Veterans Conference can have all their costs fully covered! **[Please make your most generous gift today.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35508%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Kg4hizhyctsztIm%2bzh%2fSlQ&sysid=1)**
---
[Support a WWII hero at AVC's Annual Veterans Conference](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35506%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pUGPX6UlCRLulcnz3mAp0Q&sysid=1)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

clean_body: I wouldn't ask for your help if it weren't urgent. | | | Fellow American, I wouldn't ask for your help if it weren't urgent. This year, the American Veterans Center is expecting our BIGGEST gathering of World War II heroes for our Annual Veterans Conference in nearly 20 years. And while the budget for this year's Annual Veterans Conference has already been spent, the American Veterans Center team is still hearing from World War II veterans who would like to attend. The Gary Sinise Foundation is generously providing lodging ... American Airlines is providing flights ... and I hope that you, Fellow American, would consider helping to cover lunch and dinner for our World War II heroes during this year's Veterans' Conference. On average, it costs $100 for each day of meals we provide to a World War II veteran. To make sure we can cover all the meals for the veterans we expect, I'm urgently raising $3,000 before Wednesday, October 25. Every year, generous and patriotic Americans like YOU help the American Veterans Center honor our nation's heroes, from World War II to today, at the Annual Veterans Conference. At this special, one-of-a-kind event, veterans have the opportunity to share their stories with young people and military cadets in attendance. They can reconnect with their brothers- and sisters-in-arms. And, just as important, they can know that their stories are professionally recorded and preserved by AVC, so their legacy is passed on to the next generation. The AVC Annual Veterans Conference is a monumental occasion for veterans of every generation. But it's particularly moving for our World War II heroes, who will see firsthand how their service and sacrifices are still being honored, 80 years later. Your generosity today will ensure the Greatest Generation's legacy lives on, making their bravery immortal and safeguarding the firsthand accounts of their valor and service for generations to come. Thank you for your support and thank you for playing a critical role in honoring our World War II heroes at this year's Conference. Tim Holbert President American Veterans Center P.S. Your contribution to this special mission doesn't just make a difference -- it makes history. Let's ensure every World War II veteran who wishes to attend this year's Annual Veterans Conference can have all their costs fully covered! The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201 Your America News Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About The Coming Crisis** **This might be your only warning...** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **" Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: " Food shortages are coming." Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... name: Trump News HQ
subject: Central Bank: “Final stage” beginning now
body:
The end is near...

| **Central Bank: “Final stage” beginning now** [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4im684pvoin9aq72hrfjkiccl8iehtl268c8p48_rp22sh2s8i66p70shjmeor6cph2bs) The end is near... Our financial system is about to be transformed in a way that would’ve been unthinkable just a few years ago. And almost nobody is prepared for the chaos that follows. According to Bank of America, this overhaul is imminent – And Dr. Nomi Prins says the final stage begins in the months ahead, with the rollout of the FedNow system. To show you everything you need to know about the FedNow system – and to help you prepare – Dr. Prins has recorded a free presentation with all the details. It’s controversial, but Nomi’s interview is a must-watch for anyone with more than $2,500 in an American bank or retirement fund. **[Click here to find out what you need to do to prepare for this historic transformation.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztist0tcbhdk7hgp424d244u5r8ql5oc72s270u8_rp22sh2s8i66p70shjmeor6cph2bs)**

name: Dan Steiner, PreBorn!
subject: Fear and death v. hope and life
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjk3LTBjMWY1ZDYzZWRhODQ0ZWNhMjY1NWQ2ZDc1NWZiZjg5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3ByZWJvcm4uYmFieS9BRUwxMDIzRU0yIn0/tldJPmqJ3irqlsKK6MDCEw)
---
Friend, **Last year, PreBorn!, through the Lord's work, was able to save more than 53,452 babies and lead 9,544 mothers to commit themselves to Christ.** Will you help save a preborn baby's life today? _One abortion occurs every minute in America. More than 1,600 abortions occur every day._ But when a mother facing an unplanned pregnancy receives a free ultrasound session from PreBorn! -- when she sees her baby's tiny hands and feet and hears her baby's heartbeat -- by God's grace, everything changes. When she sees her baby on an ultrasound, she will choose life (instead of abortion) 80% of the time. Without an ultrasound, one out of every three preborn babies will tragically perish. **[Friend, will you make a gift of $28 today so that PreBorn! can provide ONE MORE free ultrasound session to a young mom at a crossroads?](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjk3LTBjMWY1ZDYzZWRhODQ0ZWNhMjY1NWQ2ZDc1NWZiZjg5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3ByZWJvcm4uYmFieS9BRUwxMDIzRU0yIn0/Rpp6ejW_NrKGXIn87jZdVg)**
---
[Sponsor 1 life-saving ultrasound ($28)](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjk3LTBjMWY1ZDYzZWRhODQ0ZWNhMjY1NWQ2ZDc1NWZiZjg5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3ByZWJvcm4uYmFieS9BRUwxMDIzRU0yIn0/vJj0UrPNzS5pzTlysmFCoA)
---
[Sponsor 2 life-saving ultrasounds ($56)](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjk3LTBjMWY1ZDYzZWRhODQ0ZWNhMjY1NWQ2ZDc1NWZiZjg5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3ByZWJvcm4uYmFieS9BRUwxMDIzRU0yIn0/TBFVjaVYhW-y4KYgo2_nUw)
---
[Sponsor 5 life-saving ultrasounds ($128)](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjk3LTBjMWY1ZDYzZWRhODQ0ZWNhMjY1NWQ2ZDc1NWZiZjg5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjQiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3ByZWJvcm4uYmFieS9BRUwxMDIzRU0yIn0/xfkgY6ME115mIIfsY3eTfw)
---
Our Christ-centered, church-based, and integrity-focused ministry was started to help save lives created in God's image - and to give young moms the opportunity to hear the Gospel of Jesus Christ, _perhaps for the first time in their lives_. **[Your gift of $28 will provide a free ultrasound for one mother -- $56 will reach two mothers in need -- $128 will reach five mothers -- and rescue their children from abortion.](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjk3LTBjMWY1ZDYzZWRhODQ0ZWNhMjY1NWQ2ZDc1NWZiZjg5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjUiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3ByZWJvcm4uYmFieS9BRUwxMDIzRU0yIn0/qboxV6Qo0tSheX7cU9zVuQ)**
---
[Sponsor a life-saving ultrasound!](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjk3LTBjMWY1ZDYzZWRhODQ0ZWNhMjY1NWQ2ZDc1NWZiZjg5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjYiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3ByZWJvcm4uYmFieS9BRUwxMDIzRU0yIn0/WBpJkDa_-6YTWr60M6lGqw)
---
While the abortion debate rages in state legislatures and courtrooms, PreBorn! has taken a different approach: leading the nation in empowering women facing unplanned pregnancies by offering compassionate, Christ-centered care. **Please let me tell you the story of just one young woman that PreBorn! has reached.** Lauren was terrified when she discovered her unplanned pregnancy. Facing extreme pressure from her boyfriend, she sought an abortion in her home state of Ohio ... but she was turned away due to the state's new legislation. Lauren's boyfriend put her on a plane to Washington, D.C. to send her to the largest abortion clinic in the region. But on her way to the abortion clinic, Lauren got lost - and when she walked into the doors of the PreBorn! Network Clinic, she was embraced with compassion and love like she had never known. **_Lauren saw her preborn baby thanks to a free ultrasound and heard the steady "whoosh" of her little one's beating heart. Lauren heard the Gospel, opened her heart to Jesus' abundant grace and love ... and she chose life!_** Friend, every day we hear more stories like this. We praise God for His intervention on behalf of these women and their children. To Him alone be the Glory! **[To help more women see their preborn babies on an ultrasound and choose life, please support PreBorn! with your gift of $28 or more today.](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjk3LTBjMWY1ZDYzZWRhODQ0ZWNhMjY1NWQ2ZDc1NWZiZjg5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjciLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3ByZWJvcm4uYmFieS9BRUwxMDIzRU0yIn0/uwoFXf8dXEWitTy9b7jmrA)**
---
[Sponsor a life-saving ultrasound!](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjk3LTBjMWY1ZDYzZWRhODQ0ZWNhMjY1NWQ2ZDc1NWZiZjg5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjgiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3ByZWJvcm4uYmFieS9BRUwxMDIzRU0yIn0/caEU9_BXyBVCCyGA-2fBEw)
---
With the support of our pro-life friends like you, Friend, we can continue saving babies ... and saving souls ... by the power of the Gospel! Please join us in praying that the Lord will bless our efforts this coming year, trusting and believing that He will help us accomplish the goals He has placed on our hearts for 2023. Choosing life, Dan Steiner
PreBorn!
---
[Sponsor a life-saving ultrasound!](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjk3LTBjMWY1ZDYzZWRhODQ0ZWNhMjY1NWQ2ZDc1NWZiZjg5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjkiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3ByZWJvcm4uYmFieS9BRUwxMDIzRU0yIn0/piVj-HDip0G5K8b_Fs1pLg)

name: Colin Allred
subject: I hate doing laundry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, my wife Aly and I share the work of running our household and raising our boys evenly, but to be perfectly honest with you, my smile is forced in this picture – I hate doing laundry .
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
But here's one laundry list even I can get behind: the list of reasons we need to fire Ted Cruz:
*
Ted
Cruz
viciously
attacks
our
fundamental
rights
and
reproductive
freedoms
–
even
though
six
in
10
Texans
support
abortion
access.
*
Texans
deserve
a
leader
who
will
fight
for
them
–
rather
than
podcasting
three
times
a
week
or
running
off
to
vacation
when
he's
needed
most.
*
Ted
Cruz
has
parroted
dangerous,
far-right
conspiracy
theories
that
endanger
the
safety
and
accessibility
of
our
democracy
for
working
Texans.
Friend, Ted Cruz has a lot of dirty laundry – and I could keep going on for pages and pages.
But the bottom line is this: Texans can't afford six more years of an extremist like Ted Cruz. Not when he's proven that his loyalties lie only with the special interests and the mega donors that keep him in power.
Right now, polls show that Ted Cruz and I are neck and neck. We can send him and his dirty laundry packing for good, but it's going to take a huge outpouring of grassroots support to reach the millions of voters we need to win.
Can you split a donation of $5 or $10 right now between my campaign and Serve America to power my campaign to defeat Ted Cruz? His mega donors are pouring millions of dollars into his race, and I'm depending on grassroots supporters like you to help me keep up → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thank you for being a part of this team, friend. Let's do this.
Colin

clean_body: Friend, my wife Aly and I share the work of running our household and raising our boys evenly, but to be perfectly honest with you, my smile is forced in this picture – I hate doing laundry . [] But here's one laundry list even I can get behind: the list of reasons we need to fire Ted Cruz: Ted Cruz viciously attacks our fundamental rights and reproductive freedoms – even though six in 10 Texans support abortion access. Texans deserve a leader who will fight for them – rather than podcasting three times a week or running off to vacation when he's needed most. * Ted Cruz has parroted dangerous, far-right conspiracy theories that endanger the safety and accessibility of our democracy for working Texans. Friend, Ted Cruz has a lot of dirty laundry – and I could keep going on for pages and pages. But the bottom line is this: Texans can't afford six more years of an extremist like Ted Cruz. Not when he's proven that his loyalties lie only with the special interests and the mega donors that keep him in power. Right now, polls show that Ted Cruz and I are neck and neck. We can send him and his dirty laundry packing for good, but it's going to take a huge outpouring of grassroots support to reach the millions of voters we need to win. Can you split a donation of $5 or $10 right now between my campaign and Serve America to power my campaign to defeat Ted Cruz? His mega donors are pouring millions of dollars into his race, and I'm depending on grassroots supporters like you to help me keep up → [] Thank you for being a part of this team, friend. Let's do this. Colin [] DONATE [] [] [] [] [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . Peter,
Like many of you, I was horrified to learn the news of the shooting at the Texas State Fair.
We should not have to live like this.
Our children shouldn’t have to live in fear when they go to school, the grocery store, the mall, and now the State Fair.
And let’s be clear, Peter: The problem is the loose gun laws in Texas that allow anybody that’s 18 and up to buy a gun like it’s a slurpee at 7-Eleven.
This is a terrifying reality we’re living in, and it’s the direct fault of the Republican politicians in Texas right now.
The loose gun laws that Ted Cruz supports terrorize Texans and make us less safe. He’s everything that’s wrong with Washington and more. He’s spent years blocking common-sense gun violence prevention measures to keep us safe.
I’ve had enough, and I know you have too.
I have worked tirelessly to advance legislation to reduce gun violence in Texas, and I’m ready to escalate this fight. This has got to come to an end. But I need your help.
Please consider making a small contribution to my campaign against Ted Cruz — against gun violence — against the gun lobby — and for the people of Texas. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
Thank you for your support.
Roland Gutierrez
Democrat Roland Gutierrez is running for US Senate to defeat Ted Cruz. Texans deserve leaders who will look out for their best interests. We need you in this campaign. Can you donate $5 right now to help Roland win this race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

name: Sen. Cory Booker
subject: The progress we’re making
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Joe and Kamala need to know that they can count on supporters like you, Peter. | | |
---
Hi Peter -- it's Senator Cory Booker. There’s a reason why I’ve stood by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. Why I’ve always believed in our work to create greater opportunity for people across the country, from rural communities to big cities. Why I’ve known without a doubt that together, we would fight for a country that puts love over hate, hope over fear, and generosity over greed. It’s because of _you_ , Peter. Because I know that with every piece of legislation that the president signs into law, every policy decision Joe and Kamala make, every step forward they take to make the lives of everyday Americans just a little bit easier -- **they’re thinking about how they can keep making progress for people all over the country.** **So I hope you’ll take my word for it when I say that Joe and Kamala can’t do this without you. They need grassroots supporters like you to make sure that we can keep rising to the challenges of the future and fight for progress well into 2024 and beyond.** ******[That’s why I’m humbly asking you now: Can Joe and Kamala count on you to chip in $25 or any amount to their campaign before their end-of-month fundraising deadline to hit their campaign’s fundraising goal?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZMfJjR1YRsu2onYECWuIPGERAqR1hIndceQ2ng9uEZ0hZ1PyVW1VN6nNx6R2qfNcaezXIvoC_GV5JBOSIEMwHZsuKAQlbqqxEKphTY7rGSA7Vf9Vso3SUNET4hpaKBP_cucxWiC-Y5yDanbJ3dWvo9EyZPKOdF4bBJcfwI0P9dZ_gp927iTQ0jh0NfXNWrjmlC14X08K2E3vc23gnB6FfAri16Ad7enHsFDN2mPHtAl4uKmorGvh-RDCZuE4Z7QM268LaTI0yvEBzvVZhblIRJjTAEron3nxzXDKcUsiF-RkP3l7EAJ6NK1P37BAITOi4C7fIIhBjwwRl1Gq-4-BL-2ohjwjxzX9L70XSZq_-DW4/40p/7R2WXvkRQ_6Z0i8D7Zbv8A/h0/quzqBqgflz11aDShrjfa1urr7k9TkmphSmP7IybRALU)** | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Joe and Kamala need to know that they can count on supporters like you, Peter. | | | Hi Peter -- it's Senator Cory Booker. There’s a reason why I’ve stood by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. Why I’ve always believed in our work to create greater opportunity for people across the country, from rural communities to big cities. Why I’ve known without a doubt that together, we would fight for a country that puts love over hate, hope over fear, and generosity over greed. It’s because of you , Peter. Because I know that with every piece of legislation that the president signs into law, every policy decision Joe and Kamala make, every step forward they take to make the lives of everyday Americans just a little bit easier -- they’re thinking about how they can keep making progress for people all over the country. So I hope you’ll take my word for it when I say that Joe and Kamala can’t do this without you. They need grassroots supporters like you to make sure that we can keep rising to the challenges of the future and fight for progress well into 2024 and beyond. **** | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | As a member of the Biden-Harris campaign’s National Advisory Board (and someone who’s run for office a few times myself), I know firsthand how important it is to hit our fundraising goals every month -- it means that we’ll be able to reach more voters early to spread Joe and Kamala’s message. amount that you pitch in makes a huge difference, and I know it means the world to Joe and Kamala. Thank you for your support, now and always. With love and gratitude, Cory Cory Booker U.S. Senator, New Jersey | |
