name: Lorinser for Congress
subject: Official Statement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Bob Lorinser for Congress
IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Tues. Oct. 24, 2023
pr@votedrbob.com [pr@votedrbob.com?subject=Press%20Release%20Reply]
Lorinser's Statement on Rep. Bergman's failed Speaker bid
During the second round of voting in the GOP conference, Rep. Jack Bergman's bid for Speaker failed this morning, which may have elicited a collective sigh of relief from every informed voter in Northern Michigan and the UP.
I sincerely hope the GOP nominates a Speaker who can unite both parties and solve problems. We knew that person wasn't Jack Bergman. He misrepresented himself as a "unifier" without an agenda, but it's far from the truth.
Jack Bergman does not live in the district he represents. He voted against certifying the 2020 Presidential Election, and his inappropriate actions in an election lawsuit ignited the Big Lie that led to Jan. 6. He votes against our district and with the Freedom Caucus 90% of the time.
Bergman has "F" grades from every organization that represents everyday American workers, and he voted in favor of unfunded tax cuts for billionaires and giant corporations that led to the third-largest deficit in US history.
My opponent also wants to cut Social Security and privatize Medicare.
To get better leadership in Washington, to improve our Nation's progress, and to solve real issues in a functioning government, we must start by electing better leaders. Every day, I strive to be that for residents in Northern Michigan and the UP.
In 2024, we must defeat anyone who violated their oath to the US Constitution and encourage a new type of politics based on collaboration, cooperation, and a collective vision to get things done for the American people.
Let's work together to save Social Security, fight for Medicare for All, and put American workers back on the pedestal where they belong.
actblue.com/donate/about-bob [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]

name: HER Time
subject: A real shot at codifying the Equal Rights Amendment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72100801/434295887/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231024_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTJlZDAyZDEtODk3Mi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8V03QQ6eW8v0rN_hXV3zI1YRxK1SZLLYGLviMIXwaqs=)
---
Have you seen the news, Peter? A group of Congressional women have introduced a joint resolution to finally codify the Equal Rights Amendment into the Constitution after 100 years. The Equal Rights Amendment would guarantee equal rights under the law regardless of sex. The vast majority of Americans support this amendment, and it’s been ratified by the required 38 states needed to amend the Constitution. Now, this resolution recently introduced in Congress would circumvent the arbitrary deadline set many years ago so we could FINALLY see equal rights under the law — a game changer for reproductive rights and gender equality. [_**We’ll need a flood of support to see this passed through Congress. Will you add your name today to show your support for passing the Equal Right Amendment after 100 years?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72100802/434295888/-1378988640?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231024_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTJlZDAyZDEtODk3Mi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8V03QQ6eW8v0rN_hXV3zI1YRxK1SZLLYGLviMIXwaqs=&emci=9583e4ca-8972-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=e2ed02d1-8972-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=1720400) | [SUPPORT THE ERA](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72100803/434295889/-1378988640?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231024_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTJlZDAyZDEtODk3Mi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8V03QQ6eW8v0rN_hXV3zI1YRxK1SZLLYGLviMIXwaqs=&emci=9583e4ca-8972-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=e2ed02d1-8972-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=1720400)

subject: Early voting begins this Saturday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Gaughran for Congress _
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f1eef49c0086/party-12748266?e=a6aa651d40)
---
| | [ ](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=0ac8af3c43&e=a6aa651d40)
---
| |
**Dear Friend** ,
Early voting kicks off this Saturday, and I want to encourage you to head to the polls and cast your vote for Dave Calone for Suffolk County Executive and our great Democratic candidates for County Legislature and town office.

I’ve spent my entire political career advocating for making voting easier and more accessible. In fact, one of my first actions as State Senator was to expand voting rights by cosponsoring a bill to make early voting a part of every election. The GOP has always opposed making voting easier because they know working people can have a harder time getting out to vote on Election Day. Let’s show them the power of early voting in this election!

Check out the information below to find your early voting site and hours of operation.

**Early voting hours in Suffolk County, October 28 through November 5**
* Saturday, October 28 – 10:00am - 6:00pm
* Sunday, October 29 – 10:00am - 6:00pm
* Monday, October 30 – 10:00am - 6:00p
* Tuesday, October 31 – 7:00am - 3:00pm
* Wednesday, November 1 – 7:00am - 3:00pm
* Thursday, November 2 – 12:00pm - 8:00pm
* Friday, November 3 – 12:00pm - 8:00pm
* Saturday, November 4 – 10:00am - 6:00pm
* Sunday, November 5 – 10:00am - 6:00pm

Head [here](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=cded014ae9&e=a6aa651d40) for a list of early voting poll sites in Suffolk County.
**Early voting hours in Nassau County, October 28 through November 5**
* Saturday, October 28 – 9:00am - 6:00pm
* Sunday, October 29 – 9:00am - 6:00pm
* Monday, October 30 – 6:00am - 5:00pm
* Tuesday, October 31 – 10:00am - 7:00pm
* Wednesday, November 1 – 10:00am - 7:00pm
* Thursday, November 2 – 10:00am - 7:00pm
* Friday, November 3 – 10:00pm - 6:00pm
* Saturday, November 4 – 9:00am - 6:00pm
* Sunday, November 5 – 9:00am - 6:00pm

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Friend , Early voting kicks off this Saturday, and I want to encourage you to head to the polls and cast your vote for Dave Calone for Suffolk County Executive and our great Democratic candidates for County Legislature and town office. I’ve spent my entire political career advocating for making voting easier and more accessible. In fact, one of my first actions as State Senator was to expand voting rights by cosponsoring a bill to make early voting a part of every election. The GOP has always opposed making voting easier because they know working people can have a harder time getting out to vote on Election Day. Let’s show them the power of early voting in this election! Check out the information below to find your early voting site and hours of operation. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=287270a982eb45d3a7577fb7c4cc6667&_e=z7xXPKflYNQ82ITVG2kYEWe1MFlGrP7RzJZh50DSuaYPSLIBgu1GU7BMC9IJ6meI9hrujYxOCGXBdMdqUJ_bcHzFUl8feOpLhUQtIN7ZO6dfQuE0OZYEzYm7lmO8Qpe28iu7cSXLOfPE8X_zfgIqpQJgi5sg0X48r4LOuR-1A4QFhec0TjSh0VyfV8cTXszx50VSPcAWF2beCx17pDNClMBUuAK8KGiBMOtb25KASfl0F0l5Fg7TrPmpWYGNnhPZM24NZ_-_D0h08u-oOpJOvNHy6yXx9QvIVDuFdpi_QD7PgWNAVWcMD69fV8E4dW2ez9LRqJOKaXzmXEChcdyJoZVlh-z9hjdlnh2lk_Z5QKt62pU0_DkGSJUX9djRIqIyQwKzxLdxpUdMLPQZEXanAg%3D%3D)

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About The Coming Crisis** **This might be your only warning...** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **" Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=036b404da1244bbaa3d1ad30842386a9&_e=Tyza3c1p2diVo7fAFCnfjK_J4R1SB5LZkuyER2_MZiUyjQFYRwA46op3WUlDnf0Xf-ys_9gxMhqT5J5-Vl_Q4Wwn9VypXFBVa-msvnA_TmYolewX7F4ZPOnGF-i3Jv8Ndj_g51lAcht8purt3zKJmMWJo2qLN_hngfLBRPyIAqCnqKLJh-WWIlKBLS72ginM2hm7L6y_uBnAWAKCOA2loLgd-MYoVrdXbrVB6qcBSFhH7lRLvcSllxLuJiw9EBkmLaDlZ2nAD4fZ4e8XjSJiDihd3Bj0x9n3QdbonxNQx9o%3D). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=036b404da1244bbaa3d1ad30842386a9&_e=Tyza3c1p2diVo7fAFCnfjK_J4R1SB5LZkuyER2_MZiUyjQFYRwA46op3WUlDnf0Xf-ys_9gxMhqT5J5-Vl_Q4Wwn9VypXFBVa-msvnA_TmYolewX7F4ZPOnGF-i3Jv8Ndj_g51lAcht8purt3zKJmMc07VahmOGYJi66QIONb0xejCNk_DWbjlIpyGyZ_AmCG-VHY1YPNVC-01v04Pj0T9DWGP4f9Ffax3iBcMTRSTlVD5PhQaebDFjznU-0gYE0_Vtt65fu9hxWcbj17aT4gaf-cqPbIFugBF4kIXZAFOU%3D) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.

And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling . When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can. Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

disclaimer_text: paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72101291/434297772/-160682307?amount=15&refcode2=bcdd11e4-8a72-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&refcode=ss_em_fr_OP_231024&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmNkZDExZTQtOGE3Mi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TRYx6EQbS-6jqd5u-k4w_3oigumB7XFTQEBLP1Q-H9E=) **After years of dedicated work, we achieved a significant victory this year. We successfully passed a new law that restores the right to vote for 55,000 Minnesotans who have left prison behind.** However, our progress faces an unexpected challenge. _**A single judge, without proper legal authority or prompting, has declared the new law unconstitutional and imposed probation sentences that include a ban on voting.**_ I have joined forces with Attorney General Keith Ellison and we are confident that we will be able to rectify this situation and protect the rights of those impacted by this decision. [**With an election in just days, we must make sure that every eligible voter can exercise their right. We need your help to ensure we continue to spread our message. Team, this is a call-to-action. I need 5,000 to help me amplify my message before our end-of-month fundraising deadline by chipping in any amount. clean_body: | = After years of dedicated work, we achieved a significant victory this year. We successfully passed a new law that restores the right to vote for 55,000 Minnesotans who have left prison behind. However, our progress faces an unexpected challenge. A single judge, without proper legal authority or prompting, has declared the new law unconstitutional and imposed probation sentences that include a ban on voting. I have joined forces with Attorney General Keith Ellison and we are confident that we will be able to rectify this situation and protect the rights of those impacted by this decision. = | | = This serves as a reminder that we need to stay strong in safeguarding the freedom to vote. We should always be on the lookout for any attempts to undermine this fundamental right. As your Secretary of State, you have my word: I will always be fighting to ensure all who are eligible can vote. There will be more bumps along the way but you can count on me to be on the front lines fighting for you. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing with us. Steve | = | = With Steve’s leadership, Minnesota has led the nation in voter turnout for the past three out of four elections. name: Craig Segall, Evergreen
subject: What big truck manufacturers aren't telling you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN COLLABORATIVE
body:
Electrifying our trucks is possible—and here's how
| | | | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3139?t=2&akid=13761%2E53494%2EZR9LT3)
---
| | Friend, Publicly, big truck manufacturers and their trade associations love bragging about their commitments to electrify their fleets—and they've taken millions in public funding to make the switch.

**What they don't want you to know is that behind closed doors they are lobbying against the very same clean truck standards they applaud in public.**

And it's clear why truck companies would want you to think they support EPA's rules. Strong standards would protect tens of thousands of people from transportation pollution, clean up our air, and get more electric vehicles on the road.

We did the research and are calling out industry bluster—and you can too. **[Here's what you need to know and how to take action.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5042?t=3&akid=13761%2E53494%2EZR9LT3) **

---
[LEARN MORE + TAKE ACTION](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5042?t=5&akid=13761%2E53494%2EZR9LT3)
---
The reality is that **a strong clean trucks rule is possible** thanks to billions in funding for electric vehicles and charging infrastructure. And it's **absolutely necessary** to clean up our air, acknowledging that transportation pollution has disproportionately harmed communities of color.

It's time to build the future that we know is possible—an economy run on clean energy that supports healthy communities. **[Here's how.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5042?t=6&akid=13761%2E53494%2EZR9LT3)**
---
[READ NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5042?t=8&akid=13761%2E53494%2EZR9LT3)
---
Onward, Craig SegallVice President of Policy Evergreen Collaborative
---
| | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/337?t=9&akid=13761%2E53494%2EZR9LT3)| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/338?t=10&akid=13761%2E53494%2EZR9LT3)| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/336?t=11&akid=13761%2E53494%2EZR9LT3)| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4575?t=12&akid=13761%2E53494%2EZR9LT3)

name: Bill Spadea
subject: Your banquet invitation
body:
Peter, You're invited to the inaugural Project 29:2 Banquet, happening on November 9, 2023 at Trump National in Bedminster.
|
---
| Peter, **You're invited to the inaugural Project 29:2 Banquet, happening on November 9, 2023 at Trump National in Bedminster.** Project 29:2 is dedicated to educating, activating, and mobilizing faith leaders and people of faith, helping them leverage their influence and have an impact within the civic, governmental, and political arena.
---
|
---
Bill Spadea will be your Emcee for the evening, and Governor Mike Huckabee will be headlining with a keynote address. **[Click here to learn more and grab your tickets.](https://xtz223.keap-link003.com/v2/click/dff8e27ad4cb374ff82d5f9f363984bd/eJyNkMsKwjAQRf9l1tXY1Ad2V4qU0upCdC2hGTBqk5BOxSr9d-MDVwpuZ849w50bEGqhKZcQw4WunEcQgMNKWYWaUqNJVM8tn4zDKAzgpPQxc6a1EN--hj_AYxxOR-MAqLPokc06SYt8le3KfFV40grnb_zniWb841ksk7yEvv8pxlrR4uzdDcTkWnw0ksq3oq07eX5PZJuYsQar1uFQaJSGhpWpmXXm4LEBn3MmjRaEXiesRS3fvyiwe0n7O4dbZ0g=)** This banquet will be the first of its kind and every ticket will include dinner and access to the full lineup of speakers throughout the event.
---
| Bill Spadea, when discussing the upcoming event, remarked:
“It’s a true honor to stand alongside New Jersey's faith community's influential leaders. This gathering is more than an event; it's the beginning of a united front, bringing together believers from all backgrounds. The road ahead is undeniably demanding, but the potential rewards are monumental. The urgent mission to reintroduce common sense into the New Jersey government will pave the way for triumphs that resonate with every New Jerseyan.” **Now, more than ever, our nation yearns for the voices, values, and active participation of the faithful. That's precisely the mission of Project 29:2.** [**Click here to be part of an evening that promises profound impact for a worthy cause.**](https://xtz223.keap-link003.com/v2/click/c8e0dfdcb564cbf7153429437a5e6edd/eJyNkMsKwjAQRf9l1tXa1Gd2RURKqwvRtYRmwGibhHQqVum_Gx-4UnA7c-4Z7tyAUAtNqQQOF7oyFkMADgtlFWqaG02ieG7ZaBjFUQCl0qelM40Ffvsa_gCPcTQeTAOg1qJHtptknqXr5T5P15knrXD-xn-eeMI-nsUqSXPoup9irBQtzt5dAyfX4KORVL4V7Vzp-QORrXkY1lg0DvtCozTUL0wVWmeOHuuxGQul0YLQ64S1qOX7Fxm2L2l3B4q_Z0w=) We hope to see you next month, The Common Sense Action Team
---
|
---

---

name: Caroline Colarusso
subject: We Need Your Signature !
body:
Stop and Shop in Stoneham Saturday 10-12 noon
| | | |
---
| [Visit our Website ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s9FelDqEz3Ixll8AA9HTUjh9A_ka_zSXJkLw-XoTNLw9nQFmcY7hwLxrETscMBIFchXCHpnoDmTJX6OjA2ExZT4uPYH4Pw2lCnJJ_AFXCJKXTSfkAvxVXs9yiNDC5brPd5j2967gdLlXxWGgKykFtNSQ1Ad10Ncr84aAN4xLQ9rhUfLSd3FARaURhJQUJIfOnzijripDgQ4=&c=m5XZKM8VKcF_alkWSqyWfulPIuQ0Fjtg7SsAg0sfHbkgQMfDXGH_7w==&ch=WJmcr2vzKhM-f9UZ1ktEXNTE-uUfwEJeJrMrHjB3Fr4ceHxtAsSz-g==)
---
Friends,
We have been out collecting for the VOTER ID ballot initiative in your area. We need a big weekend this weekend because the rain has hindered our efforts almost every weekend so far.
If you believe in VOTER ID in Massachusetts, please help get it on the ballot in our state by signing our petition!
I will be at STOP and SHOP in Stoneham from 10 am to 12 noon this Saturday October 28th and I would love to have your signature.
Later in the week you can check out our website to locate a signing event in your area! We must keep standing up for election integrity, voter ID is a huge step in that direction.
PLEASE STOP BY DATE: Saturday October 28th Time: 10:00 am to 12:00 pm Where: Stop and Shop Main Street Stoneham
Thank you, Caroline Colarusso

---
| | | | | | | Caroline Colarusso | 4 Patrick Circle, Stoneham, MA 02180

clean_body: Stop and Shop in Stoneham Saturday 10-12 noon | | | | | == Friends, We have been out collecting for the VOTER ID ballot initiative in your area. We need a big weekend this weekend because the rain has hindered our efforts almost every weekend so far. If you believe in VOTER ID in Massachusetts, please help get it on the ballot in our state by signing our petition! I will be at STOP and SHOP in Stoneham from 10 am to 12 noon this Saturday October 28th and I would love to have your signature. Later in the week you can check out our website to locate a signing event in your area! We must keep standing up for election integrity, voter ID is a huge step in that direction. PLEASE STOP BY DATE: Saturday October 28th Time: 10:00 am to 12:00 pm Where: Stop and Shop Main Street Stoneham Thank you, Caroline Colarusso | | | | | | | Caroline Colarusso | 4 Patrick Circle, Stoneham, MA 02180 | | Sent by mailto:carolinecolarusso@gmail.com powered by

body:
| Our October fundraising deadline is one week away.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1383%2E35263%2EWPq8N8)
Peter, In what’s gearing up to be Tammy’s most competitive reelection battle yet, _every deadline could be a turning point for our campaign._ **That’s because, as we write this, TWO right-wing megamillionaires are preparing to enter this race to defeat Tammy.** As she prepares to face off against opponents with virtually unlimited warchests, each and every one of our fundraising deadlines will determine whether or not our campaign has the resources to fight back. When grassroots supporters like you pitch in $5, $10, or $25 at a time to help us reach our goals, you’re helping our campaign defend Tammy’s seat and our Democratic majority in the Senate. But with our October fundraising deadline just one week away, we need to make up ground — fast. We simply can’t afford to fall short with potential megamillionaire opponents about to jump into this toss-up race. **[Will you make a donation to reelect Tammy before our end-of-month deadline, Peter? subject: The GOP is AWOL
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
#
Derek,
An excerpt from an article in Axios yesterday:
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.zemByr&refcode=em231024-2-30&t=1&akid=17557%2E3013755%2E7YMIO9)
These are the moments where Americans of both parties must come together to do the right thing to keep our country safe and avert conflict around the globe. To keep the women and men of our Military out of danger. To save lives.
Democrats are ready. President Biden and his administration have been working around the clock. But at a time of “epic concern and historic danger,” where are the GOP?
In the House, completely AWOL.
In the Senate, the GOP has completely frozen the senior leadership of our Military. Yes — the entire GOP. Tuberville’s holds are the issue, but not one Republican has taken a vocal and public stand to get him out of the way. McConnell and Senate GOP leadership are complicit, just as guilty as Tuberville.
If we can’t trust the GOP at a time like this, when can we trust them?
This is why we do the work we do. This is why taking back the House in 2024 is so important. It is why we must hold the Senate GOP accountable, why we have to expand our control in that chamber.
**[VoteVets was one of the largest outside spenders in 2020 and 2022. Help support our work again in 2024. Make your first donation of $10 to VoteVets today.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.zemByr&refcode=em231024-2-30&t=2&akid=17557%2E3013755%2E7YMIO9)

name: Team DeSantis
subject: We have what'll set us free
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b2a9a7ed6436b0ba91b959b1e1ce0c65cfb10768b41e61fe1c8acf846270f43c80c0424ca3357e1217e8178352b948ec47f9add2433c9909c44a053b2a7b388882d04cb4603c55a6cfd40b1705f35154

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e8eddf02ef6f44285495ab6382b28e0f5972fe549a27b386c0b20aaa3027fd891c9fbdd1596c5359a3952baf9451145831317cd65ca03b8688b5915149a7f3c8

Friend,

2024 is going to be a referendum on Joe Biden. The American people want their voice back, and if there's one thing we know for sure, it's that Joe Biden does NOT speak for:

-
The children being indoctrinated in left-wing schools.
-
The parents fighting to raise their own kids as they see fit.
-
The Americans losing their livelihoods, safety, and jobs to illegal immigrants taking over our country.
-
The families and small business owners struggling to make ends meet in Biden's crippling economy.

And it's not just Republicans seeing the disaster Biden has imposed across our country. The Democrats can't handle any more of Biden's madness either.

“What the White House has not come to terms with is, next year’s election is going to be a referendum on the president — and right now he is losing that vote” — The Hill

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e8eddf02ef6f4428f38d23aa854e0ad8bc261731d9d1e3991c92fccd8b74bf8396540cf4045269a68bf2a65d70a3be005c157d10e73508472fdfbc23090a2c27
RUSH IN $25 TO FIRE BIDEN IN 2024

Everyone is sick of Biden. While he's asleep at the wheel and letting threatening foreign countries run laps around us, Ron DeSantis is leading in Florida.

✅ Rescuing hundreds of stranded Americans across the world.

✅ Taking definitive stances on policy (while others follow and rip off his ideas later).

✅ Doing the work of a President while our current one flounders and leaves our country weak while taking beach vacations.

STEP UP FOR RON DESANTIS: SEND IN...

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e8eddf02ef6f44286ce071db58d0df0f4b32a3333e6205ec6587d36b885b7bd88dd5e37033d883192452d3c92d6d5928bdf6d4016efca0deb08de0146c03326f
$15

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e8eddf02ef6f44282f354c0be182f577f92b1a7aa28784a20878e1f440f18730b1c94bd926cb7270ea2ade87c145813d6674eb511613bf62b6df6166c0e68656
$47

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e8eddf02ef6f4428913a7447b06324b23029cc20532c6d3c5e5317ba244592ed3f7ee89e1aca4a816ed8308bec519883b62f0d7088afe38febfce40a7330f1bd
$100

We know Joe Biden is an embarrassment to this nation. That's why Ron DeSantis has steppedin... and is counting on us to stepup in support.

Ron DeSantis needs our support, and he needs it TODAY.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e8eddf02ef6f44285495ab6382b28e0f5972fe549a27b386c0b20aaa3027fd891c9fbdd1596c5359a3952baf9451145831317cd65ca03b8688b5915149a7f3c8
Chip in what you can here before October 31st.

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e8eddf02ef6f4428fd3cc562760921751e4fd5a44cdc7ab8b7e9329445e6e609a91892e64ef2488e1a89896061c92cc6b119b23a4666a095f43bc3ee1b422f85
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e8eddf02ef6f442874b8a6228c9b1a79c3e800a1a9dcd74e5daaf6770ce0d92a10d9ca793b5376b55fcd1ccb4f369cd9c56da9cbaab39b27596a75755e58904b
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e8eddf02ef6f44285495ab6382b28e0f5972fe549a27b386c0b20aaa3027fd891c9fbdd1596c5359a3952baf9451145831317cd65ca03b8688b5915149a7f3c8

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e8eddf02ef6f44285495ab6382b28e0f5972fe549a27b386c0b20aaa3027fd891c9fbdd1596c5359a3952baf9451145831317cd65ca03b8688b5915149a7f3c8

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Friend, 2024 is going to be a referendum on Joe Biden. The American people want their voice back, and if there's one thing we know for sure, it's that Joe Biden does NOT speak for: - The children being indoctrinated in left-wing schools. - The parents fighting to raise their own kids as they see fit. - The Americans losing their livelihoods, safety, and jobs to illegal immigrants taking over our country. - The families and small business owners struggling to make ends meet in Biden's crippling economy. And it's not just Republicans seeing the disaster Biden has imposed across our country. The Democrats can't handle any more of Biden's madness either. “What the White House has not come to terms with is, next year’s election is going to be a referendum on the president — and right now he is losing that vote” — The Hill RUSH IN $25 TO FIRE BIDEN IN 2024 Everyone is sick of Biden. While he's asleep at the wheel and letting threatening foreign countries run laps around us, Ron DeSantis is leading in Florida. ✅ Rescuing hundreds of stranded Americans across the world. ✅ Taking definitive stances on policy (while others follow and rip off his ideas later). ✅ Doing the work of a President while our current one flounders and leaves our country weak while taking beach vacations. STEP UP FOR RON DESANTIS: SEND IN... $15 $47 $100 We know Joe Biden is an embarrassment to this nation. That's why Ron DeSantis has steppedin... and is counting on us to stepup in support. Ron DeSantis needs our support, and he needs it TODAY. Chip in what you can here before October 31st. In Freedom, Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Why our $250,000 fundraising goal is so important
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=4293%2E5257348%2EES-9um ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, will
you please give me a chance to explain why [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=oct2023_abs_em.T3bjIO&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231024_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=4293%2E5257348%2EES-9um ]your contribution toward our
campaign’s $250,000 fundraising goal before midnight is so important?

Just take it from the Los Angeles Times:

“Airing an effective television advertising campaign, which can cost millions of
dollars per week in the Los Angeles market alone, is essential for any statewide
campaign courting the Golden State’s 22 million registered voters.”

And the honest truth is,
Derek, that
four of the 30 most expensive media markets in the country are here in
California. That means millions of dollars per week in advertising,
potentially for months — all to reach the voters we need to win:

+--------------------------------------+
|US Rank|Media Market |
|-------+------------------------------|
|2 |Los Angeles |
|-------+------------------------------|
|10 |San Francisco-Oakland-San Jose|
|-------+------------------------------|
|20 |Sacramento-Stockton-Modesto |
|-------+------------------------------|
|30 |San Diego |
+--------------------------------------+

With California’s March 5 primary election just about four months away, we
need to begin booking our ad reservations now — but my team and I have to
know we’ll have the resources to execute our campaign plan.

I don’t take corporate PAC donations. That’s why I’m counting on your
support — we absolutely NEED to hit this must-reach $250,000 goal.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=oct2023_abs_em.T3bjIO&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231024_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=4293%2E5257348%2EES-9um ]Can you chip in any amount before midnight so I can reach my $250,000
fundraising goal and allow my campaign to book the advertising plan we
need to win this Senate race?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=oct2023_abs_em.JN6O-P&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231024_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=4293%2E5257348%2EES-9um ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=oct2023_abs_em.WRlR3Y&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231024_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=4293%2E5257348%2EES-9um ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=oct2023_abs_em.PgaZxK&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231024_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=4293%2E5257348%2EES-9um ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=oct2023_abs_em.RMwRmo&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231024_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=4293%2E5257348%2EES-9um ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=oct2023_abs_em.IFk4qX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231024_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=4293%2E5257348%2EES-9um ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231024_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=4293%2E5257348%2EES-9um ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

These are the brass tacks of campaigning in our country’s most populous
state,
Derek, and
there is no shortage of opponents we’re up against.

Thanks for pitching in what you can to help us get over the finish line.

— Adam

With Cameron and his allies spending more than $21 million to attack Andy, we need to ensure we can take on any attack that comes our way over these next two weeks.

[**Will you chip in before our final end-of-month fundraising deadline to help us win this race and continue moving Kentucky forward?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72104034/434307537/1286826882?refcode=em23_231024_eom1_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231024_eom1_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=cd48ecb8-9072-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDQ4ZWNiOC05MDcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7clceGWJc0zouoq_3cKix5Mvk__AO84DMRsDbbtieFk=)

This will be the most competitive race in the country this year, so we need everyone's help to re-elect Andy.

Thanks,

clean_body: The outcome on November 7 will shape the future of our Commonwealth This is it, Peter: We have just two weeks until Election Day. The stakes couldn't be higher – the outcome on November 7 will shape the future of our Commonwealth. Whether we continue to move Kentucky forward or lose the progress we've made all depends on who wins this crucial race for governor. We can't afford to let Andy's opponent, Daniel Cameron, drag Kentucky backward. But this is still anyone's race so we need to keep pushing until the last ballot is counted. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- We'll be frank: Cameron is not concerned about doing what's best for Kentuckians. He's spent his time on the campaign trail trying to nationalize the race and relying on the support of outside super PACs to help him win. With Cameron and his allies spending more than $21 million to attack Andy, we need to ensure we can take on any attack that comes our way over these next two weeks. = This will be the most competitive race in the country this year, so we need everyone's help to re-elect Andy. Thanks, Team Beshear | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign? = = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

body:
What Derek's been working on:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72104128/434307849/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTBmNjExZGYtOTA3Mi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vJzoanV_QKFJ49Ku5Mn4YxmY_-ev1KEPMNyzZlLtESs=&emci=0cfb3d3d-e171-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=a0f611df-9072-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

Peter,

Amid the chaos in Congress and the ongoing search for a speaker of the House, Derek has continued working and fighting for the people of Washington.

Just over the last few months, our nation has faced near-default, government shutdowns, and now, a vacant speaker's chair. The American people deserve better. It's time to choose unity over division, cooperation over chaos. _That's why Derek is committed to finding real bipartisan solutions that move our nation forward._

**Just take a look at some of what Derek has been working on:**

• **Economic Recovery:** Derek has been working hand-in-glove with the Biden Administration on standing up the RECOMPETE Program that he authored to help communities and create jobs.

• **Healthcare:** On top of continuing the fight for affordable healthcare access for all, Derek recently unveiled the _Mental Health Infrastructure Improvement Act_ to increase mental health and substance use disorder care access in underserved regions.

• **Education:** Derek joined a group of bipartisan legislators to reintroduce the _Supporting Early-Childhood Educators’ Deductions (SEED) Act_ , which aims to expand tax credits for early childhood educators and seeks to provide additional financial support to those working in the early childhood education sector.

• **Environmental protection:** Derek will never stop pushing for green energy solutions and policies to protect our environment for future generations, and recently announced over $18 million in funding for culvert restoration to improve fish passage across Washington's 6th District.

• **Read More:** [**Check out this recent opinion piece from _The Seattle Times_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72104129/434307850/-570131345?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTBmNjExZGYtOTA3Mi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vJzoanV_QKFJ49Ku5Mn4YxmY_-ev1KEPMNyzZlLtESs=&emci=0cfb3d3d-e171-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=a0f611df-9072-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835) that highlights Derek's journey toward a more productive, bipartisan, and responsive Congress.

Look, Peter, here's the bottom line: The road to change is never easy, and recent events have shown us that Congress is facing unique challenges. But, rather than being discouraged by gridlock, Derek knows that we have a profound opportunity to effect positive change in the weeks, months, and years to come. It's an opportunity we can't afford to waste.

clean_body: What Derek's been working on: Peter, Amid the chaos in Congress and the ongoing search for a speaker of the House, Derek has continued working and fighting for the people of Washington. Just over the last few months, our nation has faced near-default, government shutdowns, and now, a vacant speaker's chair. The American people deserve better. It's time to choose unity over division, cooperation over chaos. That's why Derek is committed to finding real bipartisan solutions that move our nation forward. Just take a look at some of what Derek has been working on: • Economic Recovery: Derek has been working hand-in-glove with the Biden Administration on standing up the RECOMPETE Program that he authored to help communities and create jobs. • Healthcare: On top of continuing the fight for affordable healthcare access for all, Derek recently unveiled the Mental Health Infrastructure Improvement Act to increase mental health and substance use disorder care access in underserved regions. • Education: Derek joined a group of bipartisan legislators to reintroduce the Supporting Early-Childhood Educators’ Deductions (SEED) Act , which aims to expand tax credits for early childhood educators and seeks to provide additional financial support to those working in the early childhood education sector. • Environmental protection: Derek will never stop pushing for green energy solutions and policies to protect our environment for future generations, and recently announced over $18 million in funding for culvert restoration to improve fish passage across Washington's 6th District. • Read More: that highlights Derek's journey toward a more productive, bipartisan, and responsive Congress. Look, Peter, here's the bottom line: The road to change is never easy, and recent events have shown us that Congress is facing unique challenges. But, rather than being discouraged by gridlock, Derek knows that we have a profound opportunity to effect positive change in the weeks, months, and years to come. It's an opportunity we can't afford to waste. Thank you, Team Kilmer Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign. = = Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma, WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. | =

| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGP2yAQhX_N-GYLBgzm4EO3KD1EWlXqYdtTxAJJJgLs2rjR9tdXjrK9fu9p9D6Ny3Oi88cI-gUQrxRWQATxBRCP8uXnqzq-HW37lu231qpe3vcUvwJi_Zjj_-rzShezo7RTbZswoh_Q-yaOXJmBq4H1prmOavDCnBn3SnMlg3Y4MMOM5KZ_f2daNzQiQ8EZSq6Rib6LSgTJjECvmeDMgGR3Kl2YikvhVpctz52fcpPGa63z-ph0ADys0W9L7O5Ulhj2xs7cn9i6HBfyrr1NVGp73kpYHK1ULq2fcqZaYwQ8FJ-i4tIpPHvWmyB6BeKw1XzKMdCWQdinr9rhOm2LjyCsp5N7Mu_y7OhSQNhPp89kKjWWCsJy1qMCVKeSKICwP6TP5vvt9lc-4OMlwrLfL_1Vp1-vzTKG-U4p0ao0SHbZJ-xy_wIAAP__neGLfA)

Friend,
How many times have you heard the same (RINO) Republicans say they “love” the Constitution?
Some of them even like to put on a big show and carry around a copy of it in their pocket just to prove how “dedicated” they are to the Bill of Rights.
_**But ever since my First Amendment rights were ripped to shreds on Monday after Crooked Joe Biden requested a gag order against me, I haven’t heard a PEEP out of them about the vicious attack on my constitutional rights.**_
_**Actions matter far more than words. And when the moment came to take a stand, the RINOs exposed themselves to be nothing more than wolves in sheep’s clothing.**_
The truth is: these RINOs don’t care about the Constitution. They don’t care about any of the principles you and I hold dear.
They’re after power and money – and NOTHING else.
Meanwhile, I am running for President of the United States and willingly RISKING all of my _money_ through the “corporate death penalty” and all of my _freedom_ through 1,000 years in prison as an innocent man.
And I truly believe that’s why our movement is like nothing else in history.
Voters are used to politicians who are all talk, and no action. They’re used to candidates who talk tough, but drop to their knees in surrender when the battle heats up.
But our campaign is different.
When voters first saw me get wrongfully arrested in April of this year, they knew I meant it with every fiber of my being when I said I was willing to go to jail if that’s what it takes to save our country, drain the swamp, and dismantle the Deep State.
And that’s also why RINOs are so hellbent on stopping me.
They want a president they can control like a puppet – but _**NO ONE**_ can buy me!
Since DAY ONE, I have REJECTED the special interest globalist RINO donors and instead turned to grassroots donors like YOU to sustain our movement.
Now, those same RINOs are working on a plot to try and defeat us and bring the GOP back to the days of open borders, globalist trade deals, and endless wars abroad and endless surrender to the Democrats at home.
While we may not be lined with special interest Super PAC money, we do have MILLIONS of grassroots donors giving even just $1 to SAVE AMERICA!
And when you add it all up, we have even TRIPLED the amount raised by these RINO sell-outs.
Now, let’s do it again!
_(But if you’re doing poorly right now due to all of the many villains destroying our country, please do not even think about donating. I mean it!)_
**[Please make a contribution – even $1 – to CRUSH our Primary Victory Fund goal to WRAP UP the primary ASAP so that we can shift 100% of our focus to the _REAL_ mission: firing Crooked Joe Biden and MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX-NuRGZsRngwKGplVaKlOtuT5FrD8mktqFgira_viLK9vq9p9H7NDZOgYePXjRHAXBnvwgAob4IgLM-vl_w_HY25Vs030qDtd72FL4KgPwx0f_q68qBouWw08YUvgfXgnMF9RV2bYWtrLvi3g_oHGDT_tQIoFTjJA5dBYAIQJqGgnuQoCoJumpAqvpAqLyWnQLXSFXJTmi5cTr4MdngH3le43RwYyxCf895Wp6TTgJOC7l1psPGaSa_N3Zm_1BpI83sbPkYOeVyWJOfLS-cbqUbY-SciQSckguElbYIg5N151WNQp3WHK-RPK9RKPPyxR0u4zo7Eso4vtoXczZOlm9JKPPp9JmMKVPKQplK1oAC8JoCe6HM97_v26X71T6OT_h8iTLy97G-N-HHpZh7P20cAi_YCC1v-4Rd7l8AAAD__xPNi9w)**

clean_body: They’re nothing but wolves in sheep’s clothing | | | Friend, How many times have you heard the same (RINO) Republicans say they “love” the Constitution? Some of them even like to put on a big show and carry around a copy of it in their pocket just to prove how “dedicated” they are to the Bill of Rights. But ever since my First Amendment rights were ripped to shreds on Monday after Crooked Joe Biden requested a gag order against me, I haven’t heard a PEEP out of them about the vicious attack on my constitutional rights. Actions matter far more than words. And when the moment came to take a stand, the RINOs exposed themselves to be nothing more than wolves in sheep’s clothing. The truth is: these RINOs don’t care about the Constitution. They don’t care about any of the principles you and I hold dear. They’re after power and money – and NOTHING else. Meanwhile, I am running for President of the United States and willingly RISKING all of my money through the “corporate death penalty” and all of my freedom through 1,000 years in prison as an innocent man. And I truly believe that’s why our movement is like nothing else in history. Voters are used to politicians who are all talk, and no action. They’re used to candidates who talk tough, but drop to their knees in surrender when the battle heats up. But our campaign is different. When voters first saw me get wrongfully arrested in April of this year, they knew I meant it with every fiber of my being when I said I was willing to go to jail if that’s what it takes to save our country, drain the swamp, and dismantle the Deep State. And that’s also why RINOs are so hellbent on stopping me. They want a president they can control like a puppet – but NO ONE can buy me! Since DAY ONE, I have REJECTED the special interest globalist RINO donors and instead turned to grassroots donors like YOU to sustain our movement. Now, those same RINOs are working on a plot to try and defeat us and bring the GOP back to the days of open borders, globalist trade deals, and endless wars abroad and endless surrender to the Democrats at home. While we may not be lined with special interest Super PAC money, we do have MILLIONS of grassroots donors giving even just $1 to SAVE AMERICA! And when you add it all up, we have even TRIPLED the amount raised by these RINO sell-outs. Now, let’s do it again! (But if you’re doing poorly right now due to all of the many villains destroying our country, please do not even think about donating. I mean it!) | | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

body:
Danica and I both know what it’s like to make history. |
#
---
Peter, My friend Danica Roem, a member of the Virginia General Assembly, is now running for a newly drawn district in the Virginia State Senate – and her election is **just two weeks away!** She needs our support to get over the finish line — [_**will you split a contribution of any amount RIGHT NOW?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72104199/434308226/1817272199?refcode=AU_TK_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231024_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWM2Njk3MC05MTcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tITHaZ8ojqFU48P-bwBibo7IMYxe6pSbw6MqCcmv-ps=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72104200/434308227/1817272199?refcode=AU_TK_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231024_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWM2Njk3MC05MTcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tITHaZ8ojqFU48P-bwBibo7IMYxe6pSbw6MqCcmv-ps=)

Danica is a trailblazer. In 2018, she became the first openly transgender person to both be elected and serve in any state legislature. And, she knows how to govern and get things done!
Danica’s opponent is an anti-trans, anti-abortion extremist. He’s been endorsed (and even supported with a six-figure donation!) by Republican Governor Glenn Youngkin, so it’s going to take _all of us_ working together to get Danica to victory.
What’s more, if Republicans flip the Virginia State Senate this year, they’ll control the Governor’s office and the legislature — meaning they’ll have full power to enact their radical agenda. They’ll get to work right away enacting an abortion ban, stripping away LGBTQ+ rights, making it harder to vote, and more.
**Republicans in Virginia have introduced a slew of anti-trans bills this year.** Fortunately, Democrats have been able to block them all — and that’s why it’s SO important we elect Danica and protect Democrats’ majority in this key state.
Danica’s opponent doesn’t have the best interests of the community at heart and he isn’t even trying to hide it. **Danica cares about working for ALL constituents to help make her community a better and safer place to live.**

name: Add Your Name | Left Action
subject: Sign: Trump should be jailed if he violates his gag order again
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Add your name: Thank the judge who fined Trump for violating gag order — and tell him to send Trump to jail next time >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8977da6b-bcc8-4953-8b6d-ada8fbf924bc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4874b55f-8439-4462-be79-911e44b391d8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Arthur Engoron, the judge overseeing Trump’s $250 million civil fraud trial, imposed a gag order on Trump earlier this month, restricting him from attacking and threatening people involved with the case. It didn’t take long for Trump to violate the gag order – he failed to fully delete a social media post attacking the judge’s law clerk – and he’s been fined $5,000. And he deserves it! Judge Engoron also said that future violations could land Trump in jail (something we would all love to see!) "[Make no mistake](https://default.salsalabs.org/T97fbe94d-10c6-40e1-8c9d-9983a78374e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9): future violations, whether intentional or unintentional, will subject the violator to far more severe sanctions, which may include, but are not limited to, steeper financial penalties, holding Donald Trump in contempt of court, and possibly imprisoning him." We want Judge Engoron to know that he has our full support to punish Trump to the fullest extent for violating his gag order. The people involved in this case are just trying to do their jobs and deliver justice – they don’t deserve Trump’s baseless attacks or to have his angry mob sent after them. [Add your name: Tell Judge Engoron you support punishing Trump for violating his gag order >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6a7d60d3-b2f7-4c57-9efd-36139491bf0f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---

name: Salinas HQ
subject: re: a national abortion ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
We need to send a message – loud and clear – that Republicans’ horrific assaults on our reproductive freedoms are unacceptable and out-of-touch with the needs of the American people.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72105064/434311753/-1808795974?refcode=em_eng_2023.10.24_b1_shq_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjQ2MzU4My05NDcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QZbCyX6_hcDiVK37DkrY1jKudH8_xZ3T120vtAerW2c=)
---
Team – we’ll keep this quick.

House Republicans have nominated a clown car full of anti-abortion candidates to take over as Speaker of the House over the last few weeks. It couldn’t be more clear that they’ll stop at nothing to pass their national abortion ban.

Look, elevating an anti-abortion extremist to one of the highest offices in the American government is nothing short of dangerous – _so all of us here on Team Salinas are ready to fight back._

**We need to send a message – loud and clear – that Republicans’ horrific assaults on our reproductive freedoms are unacceptable and out-of-touch with the needs of the American people.**

subject: Brand new CNN Senate rankings
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
We can’t afford to ignore this news.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=964%2E552475%2EgqDOyp)
**_NEW: CNN MOVES Pennsylvania three spots to 4th Most Likely to Flip Senate Seat of 2024_** [**Pennsylvania is even more competitive than before. Can you rush $5 to support Bob Casey’s re-election campaign and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231024-1?amount=5&refcode=em20231024-1&refcode2=964_552475_gqDOyp&akid=964%2E552475%2EgqDOyp) **[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231024-1?refcode=em20231024-1&refcode2=964_552475_gqDOyp&akid=964%2E552475%2EgqDOyp)**
---
Peter, we had to reach out right away.
**Just one month after our opponent jumped into this campaign, CNN has upgraded Pennsylvania to the #4 most likely to flip Senate seat of 2024 -- meaning the Senate majority could come down to our race.**
**[Donate Now: Fight Back »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231024-1?refcode=em20231024-1&refcode2=964_552475_gqDOyp&akid=964%2E552475%2EgqDOyp)**
CNN said: “The combination of McCormick and his vast personal resources during a presidential year are likely to make this Casey’s **most competitive Senate race yet.** ”
National news outlets know that this race is going to be as close as can be. We can’t leave anything up to chance, so we need to raise serious resources NOW to be able to compete with the millions upon millions that Mitch McConnell and David McCormick are planning to spend in Pennsylvania to defeat Bob.
With our razor-thin Senate majority on the line, we’re launching a 48-hour online fundraising goal to fuel our campaign NOW so we can fight back.
[**Will you pitch in $5, $25 or even $3 to help Bob win in what is going to be one of the most competitive Senate battlegrounds of 2024? Your donation will have a direct impact on the strength of our campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231024-1?amount=5&refcode=em20231024-1&refcode2=964_552475_gqDOyp&akid=964%2E552475%2EgqDOyp) **
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231024-1?refcode=em20231024-1&refcode2=964_552475_gqDOyp&akid=964%2E552475%2EgqDOyp)**
—Team Casey

Team, it’s complete chaos in Washington right now. House Republicans ousted their speaker. Nearly caused a government shutdown over extreme MAGA demands. Tried to nominate a far-right extremist (who hasn't passed a bill in 16 years) for speaker. And continue to hurl the People’s House into dysfunction – all to please Donald Trump. **But there's only one way out of this mess: take back the House for Democrats. And that starts by flipping this New York battleground seat blue with Kevin Thomas.** See, Democrats need to flip just 5 seats to win the House majority, and NY-04 could be the tipping point. _The_ _Cook Political Report_ even rated this race a toss-up and one of the most crucial 2024 House races. But the GOP machine is already pouring millions of dollars into this race to keep their tight grip on power in Washington. **_[We can’t afford to sit by and wait. We’re building an unstoppable people-powered campaign to take on the GOP machine and defeat our opponent, Anthony D’Esposito. name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: A moment to explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

You may have noticed we’ve been in touch more often these last two weeks
asking you to financially support Justice Democrats and our incumbents in
Congress, as the violence in Israel and Palestine worsens. This is a
longer email, but I want to take a moment to explain why.

We are collectively witnessing the state of Israel commit public ethnic
cleansing of Palestinians in Gaza after a long history of violent
occupation and nearly two decades of blockading. What we — our elected
officials, our media, and ourselves as individuals — do in this moment
will undoubtedly have life-changing impacts for generations to come.

While we and every Justice Democrats candidate condemn Hamas's attacks on
Israeli citizens and mourn every innocent Israeli and Palestinian life
taken, we know that collective punishment against 2.2 million Palestinians
(half of whom are under the age of 18) is NOT the answer.

That’s why Justice Democrats-endorsed Representatives Cori Bush, Ilhan
Omar, Rashida Tlaib, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Jamaal Bowman, Summer Lee,
Ayanna Pressley, Pramila Jayapal, and Greg Casar are calling for
de-escalation through a ceasefire and for urgent delivery of humanitarian
aid to Gaza.

You wouldn’t think standing up for human rights and pleading for peace
would generate condemnation and hate — but that is what we’ve received
from Republicans as well as many members of our own party.

The Democratic Party has historically protected incumbents at all costs —
we know this first-hand after being black-listed by the DCCC for
supporting progressive primary challengers and facing multi-million
dollars of AIPAC-fueled attack ads. But now, they are attacking their own
incumbent members with vitriol for criticizing human rights abuses and
calling for an end to bloodshed.

Justice Democrats like Summer Lee were first elected by the people of
their districts in major primary upsets while running on a platform
opposing the violent occupation of Palestine and stopping unconditional
military aid to Israel and other forever wars.

AIPAC spent millions trying to stop them and failed. Now, AIPAC is already
recruiting candidates to challenge these progressive incumbents, while
AIPAC-funded officials like Rep. Josh Gottheimer verbally attack them and
Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries remains silent.

We know the truth: It was never about protecting incumbents — it was about
protecting anyone willing to maintain the status quo.

Now, we stand at a crossroads. The Democratic establishment can choose to
keep attacking their own colleagues, but Justice Democrats and our
collective of progressive Congressmembers will not stop fighting for what
is right, no matter what comes our way.

That’s why we’ve been asking for grassroots contributions from folks like
you in this critical moment: we are powered by people, and the only way
we’re going to re-elect our incumbents and usher in the next generation of
progressive leaders who will unapologetically stand up for Palestinian
human rights is with your help.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231024.kixGmm&refcode=em20231024-31503&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=31503%2E1203867%2E68Mo6C ]If you can afford to, please make a donation of $3 or
more to fuel Justice Democrats and defend progressive leaders standing on
the right side of history as we face an onslaught of attacks before the
2024 elections.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231024.kixGmm&refcode=em20231024-31503&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=31503%2E1203867%2E68Mo6C ]Contribute $3

Without you, there would likely not be a coalition of progressives in
Congress right now standing in solidarity with the people of Palestine
during this pivotal moment in history. The list of ceasefire resolution
cosponsors is growing as we keep pressure on the Party to stand up for the
human rights of ALL.

Your support truly matters now more than ever.

Thank you,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1021&akid=31503%2E1203867%2E68Mo6C ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1022&akid=31503%2E1203867%2E68Mo6C ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231024-31503-footer&t=1023&refcode2=31503_1203867_68Mo6C&akid=31503%2E1203867%2E68Mo6C

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=31503%2E1203867%2E68Mo6C

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Ro Khanna
subject: "Medicare Advantage" is one of the great misrepresentations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

"Medicare Advantage" is one of the great misrepresentations. Only one group is seeing the “Advantage” here – private insurance companies.

A recent report [https://www.levernews.com/insurers-are-gaming-medicare-to-the-tune-of-140_billion/] from The Lever found that corporate insurers are exploiting the trusted Medicare name to privatize the system and deny comprehensive coverage to seniors and Americans with disabilities. They report record profits while taking nearly $140 billion annually from the federal government, money that could go towards providing Medicare patients with the care they need.

Sign if you agree: It’s time to put an end to Medicare Advantage. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/save-medicare-act-petition?contactdata=iIaeKE3j9EjGRYrTaCpk+NB/Tyx/Nv0RcMc14JJWMQDvB0Az98BjgwO1eFRlbP4FRm6LMS4a5EJU8Gxok94X9Ph02I02qnr3kMau/qce/1wG+UKDeCgtZhzVzqqe4BNErsWW5ShN3MKr4nhvoCrbPQ==]

https://twitter.com/RoKhanna/status/1710316936397979767?s=20 [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna/status/1710316936397979767?s=20]

The “Save Medicare Act” addresses private insurers’ predatory and deceptive practices by renaming so-called "Medicare Advantage" plans, prohibiting private insurers from using "Medicare" in plan titles or advertisements, and imposing significant fines for any insurer that engages in this deceptive practice.

Nobody should have to go without care because they can’t afford it.

Sign the petition: Support the Save Medicare Act. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/save-medicare-act-petition?contactdata=iIaeKE3j9EjGRYrTaCpk+NB/Tyx/Nv0RcMc14JJWMQDvB0Az98BjgwO1eFRlbP4FRm6LMS4a5EJU8Gxok94X9Ph02I02qnr3kMau/qce/1wG+UKDeCgtZhzVzqqe4BNErsWW5ShN3MKr4nhvoCrbPQ==]

Sign the Petition [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/save-medicare-act-petition?contactdata=iIaeKE3j9EjGRYrTaCpk+NB/Tyx/Nv0RcMc14JJWMQDvB0Az98BjgwO1eFRlbP4FRm6LMS4a5EJU8Gxok94X9Ph02I02qnr3kMau/qce/1wG+UKDeCgtZhzVzqqe4BNErsWW5ShN3MKr4nhvoCrbPQ==]

In solidarity,
Ro

# **Ron Paul's Dire Warning To Retirement Savers**
---
**Ron Paul's Dire Warning To Retirement Savers**
### **"Do this BEFORE the 2024 election to save your hard-earned money."**
**"Do this BEFORE the 2024 election to save your hard-earned money."**
| | | Hi, Dr. Ron Paul here. Biden's relentless money printing has forced millions of Americans into poverty. Today, you're paying a lot more for food, rent, gas and energy. This won't stop until the people fight back! And that means doing more than voting in 2024. **_All patriotic Americans_** should diversify into physical precious metals. Because we need to **demand real money** to protect the country from further ruin. _And the benefits for yourself?_ Gold and silver can safeguard YOUR savings from inflation better than anything else. Fortunately, we have a lot of options for investing in precious metals. [| Are Conservatives Wrong About Barbie?The Kathy Barnette Show27:29
---|---](https://substack.com/redirect/e9cccb24-4964-4e59-9972-2203b4216575?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Friends,
You have probably heard about the Barbie movie. It seemed very popular for left-wing "influencers" to praise the film and right-wing ones to bash it. The reviews were so partisan that I cannot recall a single conservative public figure offering a positive critique of Barbie.
Lucky for you, I'm here to make that case.
Every conservative with a platform who I allowed to speak into my life was adamant that fellow conservatives should *not* watch this movie. I listened. We weren't going. But then there was this small still voice that I could not escape, that ever so gently kept nudging me to go, to take my daughter and three of her best friends with me. So, I did. A dinner with a movie and some strong deprogramming is how I had expected that evening to go.
Instead, I was moved. I cried. I laughed. I loved it...and then I got really pissed.
[Listen to the rest of this story here](https://substack.com/redirect/fb8888aa-5631-4b45-8046-97d7a9ca3b87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3b293ed8-11d8-4785-a0fc-f1727f4d12f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This is not *just* about Barbie. We cannot allow ourselves to be this easily manipulated. We are facing a critical moment in this country, and we *need* to do better. That starts with doing some thinking for ourselves.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8b627322-feb3-412a-851a-aeae517f2dec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I always promised to tell you the truth with candor, and here I am again: Don't be gullible. Think for yourself. Our Republic is being tested every day, and we cannot allow ourselves to simply digest click-baiters' opinions.
Listen to the whole episode on Apple podcasts:
[Subscribe to The Kathy Barnette Show](https://substack.com/redirect/35d24ac7-d23a-4a68-b590-dfab875ba33a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Wes Moore
subject: I am proud to endorse Angela Alsobrooks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
Peter, I’m proud to announce my endorsement of Angela Alsobrooks
for Senate right here in Maryland.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7439?t=1007&amount=25&akid=599%2E52803%2EAcb3Un ][IMG]

The world needs America’s leadership now more than ever, the country needs
Maryland’s leadership now more than ever, and that leader is Angela.

For Angela, this work isn’t political. It’s personal. Angela loves
Maryland because she’s lived here her whole life. Angela fights for
working families because she grew up in a working family.

Angela wants every young Marylander to achieve success because she’s a
working mom who would do anything for the success of her daughter.

As Angela runs statewide for the first time, it’ll take a lot of resources
early on to set the foundation to win. [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7439?t=1008&amount=25&akid=599%2E52803%2EAcb3Un ]Join me today in supporting
Angela for the Senate by making a contribution toward her campaign right
now.

When Angela puts her mind to something, she gets results, and she has the
track record to prove it. This is exactly the type of senator we need in
Maryland.

Angela is someone who sets out to make her community, and the whole state,
a better place to live and work. Maryland deserves a senator who will work
day in and day out for fair wages, affordable health care, the right to
choose, and quality education for every single child in Maryland.

I am proud to endorse Angela because I know she is the best person to
represent the Old Line state. I am honored to support my friend in her
race for the Senate. I am supporting her because of what she would mean
for the Senate, and a contribution right now is the best way to show her
Maryland is on her side. [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7439?t=1009&amount=25&akid=599%2E52803%2EAcb3Un ]100% of your contribution will support
Angela’s campaign — make a donation today.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7439?t=1010&amount=25&akid=599%2E52803%2EAcb3Un ]Donate >>

Elevate,

Wes Moore

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/89?t=1001&akid=599%2E52803%2EAcb3Un ][IMG]

We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=1002&akid=599%2E52803%2EAcb3Un ]click here.
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/115?t=1003&akid=599%2E52803%2EAcb3Un ]Text JOIN to 74064 to receive SMS updates
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4693?t=1004&akid=599%2E52803%2EAcb3Un ]Chip in a one-time donation
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4694?t=1005&akid=599%2E52803%2EAcb3Un ]Chip in a monthly recurring donation!

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=599%2E52803%2EAcb3Un

Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
Alsobrooks for Senate
PO Box 6058
Largo, MD 20792
