name: Bob Casey
subject: URGENT: new GOP opponent -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Big news: **Mitch McConnell’s hand-picked candidate just launched his campaign for Pennsylvania’s Senate seat.**

McConnell has already said he’s targeting Pennsylvania, and this entrance to the race all but ensures that national Republicans are going to flood our state with an unprecedented amount of outside money to run attack ads against me.

**In fact, Mitch McConnell already promised this candidate super PAC support.**

**Republicans are committed to doing in 2024 what they almost did in 2022 and 2020 – take Pennsylvania. Senate control could come down to our race, so we need to respond right away.**

**[This is a make-or-break moment, and we need all hands on deck to fight back. We need to raise $50,000 to prepare for the incoming attacks – can I count on you to split a donation between the DSCC and my campaign now to defend our Senate majority?](https://go.dscc.org/go/12724?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20231024-BobCasey-CaseyTandemNewOpponent-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20231024-BobCasey-CaseyTandemNewOpponent-Pros-sl1&akid=12374%2E9716520%2E3nes6v)**

| | [DONATE $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/12724?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20231024-BobCasey-CaseyTandemNewOpponent-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20231024-BobCasey-CaseyTandemNewOpponent-Pros-sl1&akid=12374%2E9716520%2E3nes6v)
---

With the presidential race at the top of the ticket in 2024, Pennsylvania will be a key battleground and could see more political spending than any other state. Plus, we know this opponent could self-fund this race and outspend us – on top of the immense super PAC and national Republican establishment support Mitch McConnell has promised him.

**[If you’ve been waiting for the right time to support our campaign, this is it. We can’t let ourselves be outspent, so will you chip in whatever you can to the DSCC and my campaign to help us raise early resources, compete, and defend the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/12724?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20231024-BobCasey-CaseyTandemNewOpponent-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20231024-BobCasey-CaseyTandemNewOpponent-Pros-sl1&akid=12374%2E9716520%2E3nes6v)**

Thank you for being on our team,

Bob Casey
U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12724?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20231024-BobCasey-CaseyTandemNewOpponent-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20231024-BobCasey-CaseyTandemNewOpponent-Pros-sl1&akid=12374%2E9716520%2E3nes6v)

Bob Casey is running for re-election in Pennsylvania to take on the powerful special interests and deliver real results for working families and communities.

**[Chip in now to help keep Pennsylvania’s seat blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/12724?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20231024-BobCasey-CaseyTandemNewOpponent-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20231024-BobCasey-CaseyTandemNewOpponent-Pros-sl1&akid=12374%2E9716520%2E3nes6v)**

In fact, Mitch McConnell already promised this candidate super PAC support. Republicans are committed to doing in 2024 what they almost did in 2022 and 2020 – take Pennsylvania. Senate control could come down to our race, so we need to respond right away. | | With the presidential race at the top of the ticket in 2024, Pennsylvania will be a key battleground and could see more political spending than any other state. Plus, we know this opponent could self-fund this race and outspend us – on top of the immense super PAC and national Republican establishment support Mitch McConnell has promised him. Thank you for being on our team, Bob Casey U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania Bob Casey is running for re-election in Pennsylvania to take on the powerful special interests and deliver real results for working families and communities. | | | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please . to receive fewer emails. to unsubscribe. Every year, generous and patriotic Americans like YOU help the American Veterans Center honor our nation's heroes, from World War II to today, at the Annual Veterans Conference. At this special, one-of-a-kind event, veterans have the opportunity to share their stories with young people and military cadets in attendance. They can reconnect with their brothers- and sisters-in-arms. And, just as important, they can know that their stories are professionally recorded and preserved by AVC, so their legacy is passed on to the next generation.

_**\- Tennessee Journal**_

We just saw Marsha Blackburn’s third-quarter fundraising report, and something funny’s going on 👀...
* Marsha falsely claimed she raised DOUBLE what our campaign brought in last quarter.
* Her report shows that HALF of what she raised came from PACs and transfers.
* Only **29%** of Marsha’s donors are from Tennessee!
* **Meanwhile, 75% of Gloria’s donations came from Tennesseans like you — and _not a single dollar_ came from big corporate PACs.**

It’s clear that Marsha is bending the truth to make pundits and pollsters think she has the advantage. The reality is that Gloria is giving Marsha a run for her money!
Much of Marsha’s funding has come from massive donations from deep-pocketed CEOs, PACs, and politician insiders. Gloria’s proud that our campaign’s average donation is _just $45.69_ — and that everyday folks like you have stepped up to power our grassroots movement.

clean_body: Here are the highlights of Marsha’s financial report: | | BLACKBURN’S THIRD-QUARTER FINANCIAL REPORT “OPAQUE” \- Tennessee Journal We just saw Marsha Blackburn’s third-quarter fundraising report, and something funny’s going on 👀... Marsha falsely claimed she raised DOUBLE what our campaign brought in last quarter. Her report shows that HALF of what she raised came from PACs and transfers. Only 29% of Marsha’s donors are from Tennessee! Meanwhile, 75% of Gloria’s donations came from Tennesseans like you — and not a single dollar came from big corporate PACs. It’s clear that Marsha is bending the truth to make pundits and pollsters think she has the advantage. The reality is that Gloria is giving Marsha a run for her money! Much of Marsha’s funding has come from massive donations from deep-pocketed CEOs, PACs, and politician insiders. Gloria’s proud that our campaign’s average donation is just $45.69 — and that everyday folks like you have stepped up to power our grassroots movement. = = Let’s do this! Team G | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. name: Grassroots Army
subject: Interview W/ US Senate Candidate
body:
Dr. Sherry O'Donnell
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | | Interview With Dr. Sherry O'Donnell and Her Run For US SenateClick on image below to watch the interview.
---
| [ ](https://9l762.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsDg0fV3Ji0XTonBupr9Lp/bLtUuAVlabAc)
---
|
### Dr. Sherry O'Donnell Has The Goods, But Can She Fundraise To Get Her Messaging Out?
---
| "Fundraising! Fundraising! Fundraising!" I don't know how many times my consultants would harp on those words. To be honest, I still cringe when I hear the word. However, we were very successful in fundraising with our run for Governor, over $2.2 million dollars raised, 94% of that money came from under $200 donations. What does that tell you? That's GRASSROOTS BABY! With that money we were able to produce two professional commercials and air it statewide, build an effective team and organize our greatest asset, our Grassroots Army, to make phone calls (Over 500,000), door knock (Over 100,000), and put together events (3-5 per week for 16 months). The straw that broke our camel's back, was losing President Trump's endorsement, which we had, but lost because of some shady politics behind the scenes (That's a whole other story for another time). Dr. O'Donnell, to be successful, needs to be able to fundraise millions of dollars for a statewide race, in order to compete. If she tacks on President Trump's endorsement, she has a chance to win in the primary. Time will tell.Fundraising! Fundraising! Fundraising!Garrett SoldanoGrassroots Army
---

1776 Newsletter - December 2022

** Elections Are Over, Covid Scam Mandates Have Subsided, So Where Do We Go From Here?
------------------------------------------------------------
Do you find yourself lost and wondering how to get involved and make an impact on a local, State and National level? There are currently no campaigns that need your participation, no mandates to mask up, vax up and rob you of your parental and medical freedoms to fight against. Corrupt Government and Big Pharma would love for you to believe that there is nothing to fight for right now. Everything has gone back to "normal", and you are supposed to forget the past two years where you lost income and unconstitutional mandates kept you shackled. Now is the time to unite and educate yourself! 1776 Forever Free is bound and determined to educate everyone who is willing to listen. Open your eyes to the agenda of the far left, prepare yourself for the fight on the horizon. We buried our heads in the sand long enough, believing that the government had our best interests in mind. We see now that our passivism only led to loss of our freedoms and our God Given Rights.

** The far left and main stream media want to sexualize our children, emasculate our men, change our history books and remove all resemblance of morality.

clean_body: we could get Congress back on track, Peter! | Peter, it’s been over a week since we floated the idea that Liz Cheney could lead the House out of dysfunction and back towards progress... Here’s what you need to know: 1. The House is still without a speaker... 2. The Republican party is more divided than ever before... 3. Liz Cheney could still step up and get Congress back on track... but not without a SURGE of support! | ****** **** **** Your feedback is critical, Peter — we can’t move forward without you. Can’t thank you enough, — Emily, Team UTS \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: this changes everything... [via UTS] <info@upsetsetup.org> Date: Wed, Oct 17, 2023 at 10:55 AM Subject: Liz Cheney makes a return!? To: You <dpwillis67@gmail.com> Liz Cheney bravely did what her GOP colleagues wouldn’t: She stood up to Donald Trump and participated in the January 6th Committee. That’s why we’re not surprised so many Americans are calling for her to be the next Speaker of the House. But we must know what 18326 Democrats think, so we’re conducting an urgent poll before the vote to elect the next Speaker begins: **** **** **** Awaiting your critical feedback, — UTS Strategy Team | | Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC (www.upsetsetup.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 600 Pennsylvania Ave. SE #15180, Washington, DC 20003 Upset The Setup is working everyday to elect young, diverse, progressive Democrats to critical local offices so we can build up our communities, increase opportunity, and eliminate poverty. [](http://links.ericearly.com/u/click?_t=ad21af4bbba74273abaf5a1183f945ac&_m=59fe0b659a9a404ba12fafe862382f97&_e=M5_pJcfD9JJTowAuGMryrZKWjHgAltqDpQVhHp4vuCTWhEVfJPJfXO6L1ce29XcEkihhK-_PPdTs2Ne3gPcXHvc6RetQxsS1Ai2z21d2YIlD0bZ5HtO-OMknyW102NGIPfz7j1Riq_pU-GektRQE0vV9LKvaS-Lyz_awmTmLp2qUsgbVLtv5dkfIX2eMXR6GvoArp7DJSV2ibj9Qrr4uHv0_dXfa6RyYSDSXssGzp_0On6L3MbTod1e2vWsrcrMx1Y3HsNp85iFUWbox3o07Pjfjl3rKlIgRpkpqIrJOoXczHuZJ18dQzyiwdkjMzdmtBUXNQ8sgG3AC-_D3za6lMPjRC4DnDvGJSC8KC_h4Bj_na34i6pwKRBeGS1xpp71F)

Peter,

As I wrote in a recent Op-Ed, **we are witnessing the horrors of weak American leadership.**

Under Biden and his left-wing allies in Congress – _like my opponent Adam Schiff_ – we may as well have **NO** leadership.

With Biden wholly incapable of securing our borders, bolstering our economy, controlling inflation, or showing strength to our enemies abroad, this void could be filled by a Republican-controlled Senate.

And if Adam Schiff were to be elected to the U.S. Senate **it would get even worse.**

Adam Schiff can’t point to a single real accomplishment in his 20+ years in Congress. **Adam Schiff is a danger to the nation.[We must defeat him.](http://links.ericearly.com/u/click?_t=ad21af4bbba74273abaf5a1183f945ac&_m=59fe0b659a9a404ba12fafe862382f97&_e=M5_pJcfD9JJTowAuGMryrZKWjHgAltqDpQVhHp4vuCTWhEVfJPJfXO6L1ce29XcEkihhK-_PPdTs2Ne3gPcXHvc6RetQxsS1Ai2z21d2YIlD0bZ5HtO-OMknyW102NGIPfz7j1Riq_pU-GektRQE0vV9LKvaS-Lyz_awmTmLp2qUsgbVLtv5dkfIX2eMXR6GvoArp7DJSV2ibj9Qrr4uHv0_dXfa6RyYSDSXssGzp_0rik2dllZ0d3MTO3zldyyJEfqf1MxYu2ghgsPLMKj3PB1cezFTryqs4emXCG6bUEddIpWfjJ5nfxIb-fQ6bMIBS7x1Bj5-bxBx_uLf6yanJJdHnQgWxCxmNgNbfGmkEkgbosAFQbA00IuO7_NUMvl3)**

[** Support Eric to defeat schiff » **](http://links.ericearly.com/u/click?_t=ad21af4bbba74273abaf5a1183f945ac&_m=59fe0b659a9a404ba12fafe862382f97&_e=M5_pJcfD9JJTowAuGMryrZKWjHgAltqDpQVhHp4vuCTWhEVfJPJfXO6L1ce29XcEkihhK-_PPdTs2Ne3gPcXHvc6RetQxsS1Ai2z21d2YIlD0bZ5HtO-OMknyW102NGIPfz7j1Riq_pU-GektRQE0vV9LKvaS-Lyz_awmTmLp2qUsgbVLtv5dkfIX2eMXR6GvoArp7DJSV2ibj9Qrr4uHv0_dXfa6RyYSDSXssGzp_2e7eYxPR9oaoQTjQRrUUu3JfYNF80iwJx3boS1w59oaI0qHVYzgDpyvFZdKf-SqCuko0Z68kGU042SnXhGHw6EEkFGH8rK5N1Jp0zz6sLy1W1nJ9_1rSnsTyZ4z-R7wyRiqL7U-JNMtE-wqdFu9nFF)
He’s basing his entire campaign and millions of dollars he has raised in fundraising off his coup attempt at former President Trump.

Schiff is a nightmare and he would be _worse_ if he were to reach the Senate.

# ABOUT ERIC EARLY
---
Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. **Not a career politician.** Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. As the co-owner and Managing Partner of a nationally recognized law firm, Eric understands how difficult it is to start and run a successful business. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. Eric will stand-up to the Socialist woke interests that control Washington, DC, fight to preserve and protect our Democracy, and fight for ordinary Californians who are being left behind. Peter, As I wrote in a recent Op-Ed, we are witnessing the horrors of weak American leadership. Under Biden and his left-wing allies in Congress – like my opponent Adam Schiff – we may as well have NO leadership. With Biden wholly incapable of securing our borders, bolstering our economy, controlling inflation, or showing strength to our enemies abroad, this void could be filled by a Republican-controlled Senate. And if Adam Schiff were to be elected to the U.S. Senate it would get even worse. Adam Schiff can’t point to a single real accomplishment in his 20+ years in Congress. Adam Schiff is a danger to the nation. He’s basing his entire campaign and millions of dollars he has raised in fundraising off his coup attempt at former President Trump. Schiff is a nightmare and he would be worse if he were to reach the Senate. America doesn’t just need new leadership... we need ACTUAL leadership! in the California U.S. Senate race and hold both him and Biden accountable for their corruption and failure to lead the American people. name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: Sponsor meals for our WWII heroes
body:
I wouldn't ask for your help if it weren't urgent.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=605d0429bddb4e01885c99f9f2b3f980&_e=AJPIGz98TE6fY7f52ihxADfZ3-VMGw0w8Efp41GtyZGPI2OXvDK9irGWrUtKeO_H3sKI2uXdXF5O00KrVw45PqRjc3ausCqq0HuyzJPcmoTZDAzYxyk4nnGL1rqI4mmCjDOfFu2zPCOm8HKAR6bxx9f5bri8LQLnKc2cEkiGO2CIwZVyIuPak8hRooXji89G9gR909OeETQ3ixeE4evf5UcJ_9xjpmKs-4TQIte_H2CkhMYtJbr94CniD8eYROtViZYy9ZVr2c1ceKZP-aki_EyreM7UFzv1aOy4c2ZDbKl9C8o4nAeJUnRyFQlWXmCh)
---
Fellow American, I wouldn't ask for your help if it weren't urgent. **This year, the American Veterans Center is expecting our BIGGEST gathering of World War II heroes for our Annual Veterans Conference in nearly 20 years.** And while the budget for this year's Annual Veterans Conference has already been spent, the American Veterans Center team is _still_ hearing from World War II veterans who would like to attend. The **Gary Sinise Foundation** is generously providing lodging ... **American Airlines** is providing flights ... and I hope that you, Fellow American, would consider helping to cover lunch and dinner for our World War II heroes during this year's Veterans' Conference.
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=605d0429bddb4e01885c99f9f2b3f980&_e=AJPIGz98TE6fY7f52ihxADfZ3-VMGw0w8Efp41GtyZGPI2OXvDK9irGWrUtKeO_H3sKI2uXdXF5O00KrVw45PqRjc3ausCqq0HuyzJPcmoTZDAzYxyk4nnGL1rqI4mmCjDOfFu2zPCOm8HKAR6bxx9f5bri8LQLnKc2cEkiGO2BNZpthUquHAqWAAjfjdjEaZEO7Vcr0tVmDPWh1VirEiIdE1MJGo_LR0ADmnyDX3iu3ffZng2yCLkCRPghJJ_CGEo0g3QznpxLx9DpwIKxpgzg-WcKPaD3ARPZw0YAcJTnDFyU6aMTg0HMLb_j7M4aq)
---
**[Can I count on your urgent gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or more before Wednesday, October 25 to help cover the meals for our World War II heroes at this year's Conference?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=605d0429bddb4e01885c99f9f2b3f980&_e=AJPIGz98TE6fY7f52ihxADfZ3-VMGw0w8Efp41GtyZGPI2OXvDK9irGWrUtKeO_H3sKI2uXdXF5O00KrVw45PqRjc3ausCqq0HuyzJPcmoTZDAzYxyk4nnGL1rqI4mmCjDOfFu2zPCOm8HKAR6bxx9f5bri8LQLnKc2cEkiGO2B4n6Cjiizo-4ebe7eWbZeZZDuOW0fGxYGwOtJiLMWFBoJavjQ2Caz-uPkpfRoDRFGsxfPZ-PIBoftHDPGrk4P1Dw3EslThZxbj6w2ugDJLzd4oUcB_Zb-7eY1GDmC0GL__gkJL-okjjP2awhWTC8v7)** On average, it costs $100 for each day of meals we provide to a World War II veteran. To make sure we can cover all the meals for the veterans we expect, I'm urgently raising $3,000 before Wednesday, October 25.
---

clean_body: I wouldn't ask for your help if it weren't urgent. | | | Fellow American, I wouldn't ask for your help if it weren't urgent. This year, the American Veterans Center is expecting our BIGGEST gathering of World War II heroes for our Annual Veterans Conference in nearly 20 years. And while the budget for this year's Annual Veterans Conference has already been spent, the American Veterans Center team is still hearing from World War II veterans who would like to attend. The Gary Sinise Foundation is generously providing lodging ... American Airlines is providing flights ... and I hope that you, Fellow American, would consider helping to cover lunch and dinner for our World War II heroes during this year's Veterans' Conference. On average, it costs $100 for each day of meals we provide to a World War II veteran. To make sure we can cover all the meals for the veterans we expect, I'm urgently raising $3,000 before Wednesday, October 25. Every year, generous and patriotic Americans like YOU help the American Veterans Center honor our nation's heroes, from World War II to today, at the Annual Veterans Conference. At this special, one-of-a-kind event, veterans have the opportunity to share their stories with young people and military cadets in attendance. They can reconnect with their brothers- and sisters-in-arms. And, just as important, they can know that their stories are professionally recorded and preserved by AVC, so their legacy is passed on to the next generation. The AVC Annual Veterans Conference is a monumental occasion for veterans of every generation. But it's particularly moving for our World War II heroes, who will see firsthand how their service and sacrifices are still being honored, 80 years later. Your generosity today will ensure the Greatest Generation's legacy lives on, making their bravery immortal and safeguarding the firsthand accounts of their valor and service for generations to come. Thank you for your support and thank you for playing a critical role in honoring our World War II heroes at this year's Conference. Tim Holbert President American Veterans Center P.S. Your contribution to this special mission doesn't just make a difference -- it makes history. Let's ensure every World War II veteran who wishes to attend this year's Annual Veterans Conference can have all their costs fully covered! The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Georgia House Democrats
subject: Choice is a human right.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC
body:
Peter,

Georgia House Democrats firmly believe that the government has no place in private medical decisions. We are denouncing the Georgia Supreme Court ruling upholding Georgia’s six-week abortion ban, which criminalizes doctors who try to provide life-saving care and keeps in place a law that was deemed unconstitutional when it was passed in 2019.

We are convinced that this ruling will embolden the radical GOP to continue passing legislation that they know is unconstitutional. We stand for the rights of all Georgians and will always fight to protect fundamental freedoms.

House Minority Leader James Beverly says "I am saddened by the decision today. Despite the setback, our commitment remains unwavering. We will continue to advocate for healthcare rights in the legislature and partner with them in striving to repeal HB 481 – Georgia's abortion ban."

Forbes magazine recently ranked Georgia’s healthcare system as the worst in the country, the result of decades of disinvestment. At the same time that the Governor is hoarding almost $11 billion in unallocated funding, half the counties in Georgia do not have an OBGYN, and the maternal mortality rate in the state is among the worst in the nation. This decision will only make things worse.

Read the complete statement from Georgia House Democrats. [https://mailchi.mp/993c79e5c4a3/georgia-house-democratic-caucus-releases-proposed-map-13996594?e=c0f535feb7]

We need you to help put a stop to this madness. Give today to help us support Democratic candidates and legislators and help restore our majority in the Georgia House. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=102423_SCResponse_link]

The systematic stripping of Georgians’ fundamental rights needs to stop now.

Give Today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=102423_SCResponse_button1]

Onwards,

Georgia House Democrats

The Georgia House Democratic Caucus is Georgia’s most diverse group of leaders working on the ground in Georgia every day to flip the State House and secure a blue Georgia. To create the change we need, we’ll need all the help we can get. Will you join the movement for a blue Georgia by donating today?

DONATE TODAY! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=102423_SCResponse_button2]

Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC

Georgia House Democratic Caucus
PO Box 18622
Atlanta, GA 31126
United States

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Here’s one of the reasons I won in 2022. It might surprise you.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPP4UMuwuVRNqveCSx_C8Tr_WxqvRITVpicMjAc_gyJEIM3DdDCQrY-1raRGt_p4TJHZtX6Y9dNqCn77JTlF1e1AN6NtqZpBzZshWA0CI5V_8jLe2Uno9ijXywNz4UY3NvUFvXS-llFd1z86R8EUx1BbsdFnbKg-1ui9yFn4_UpRwKk-wxcbHB2Qz8T5buLKSlhl7_zAhyK93ORPuR0owdUSIFiR0FUVGHEMAqqWjCEuxXBxfT1tFgeAUIu67-iSe4i7zaPy-o7PrE8kTn-R79-waXsYmehWBkVymp1rlzwwjQHNhQWdfc_k9SPRi0SmO6DArCWvbuejmn4CMQz9NpV1ukjiy6N0AJ0uwIsw3lneDzhzDliDDtdwY6yJfwl0eNz/40p/xqP0RF_YSXydfyxywBIqqA/h0/-1crqfuaYnNZX1-eiApTAo9W_qLVi_ysuMOT28_iFaE)
---
Peter,
I have a special request today -- it's one I don't make very often. I'm asking you to chip in a donation to support College Democrats of Illinois State University. [**I want to share a quick story about why your support for ISU Democrats is so important, but if you're already on board with supporting their organizing efforts in IL-17, send in a donation today. Every donation to this email will go directly toward their work.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPNYjaSf0HiRB1luFcP1Zl2V2Cgf-aZsZkBOJr2GHeQx72iSOA8LIFVzkyeh8_J09vGEhqpNU7Cy9BqcJrY1O63vJt8RdPmHVnvWFFtErWclgq_lfGLf4QGnW88Wis7coayGZYF-4MfSuY9KvYWuzX2NKB-A_BiwYSgdzw9u75o-BT7vaj_qT_RIJxKH6QTi7eTAfuqUYxLRgKbkgA88UcA3i3gDvRPEwjWRAXtsz945IOhXoWhvc0FqaQ3o_QzH42Dp5C7YFq1Wt_pkRoaTSm7pm-QhZnuZidVVWsAZJpoHo3dSJurFjhXV02UEW2lVvxM8I7r0OyJul3mw_Fm9Br8eAx5YsUGDPA3hdduDVFMRhhKwjvY_Bdd1A4x9wutawapgF_Lyb3rwL2tWAWHUU9cCG5Q21AQGWbUcjBgsreneJ-_arcJ8zFfarSSQMPJaEW86IGh4NvOthQ6B_mulCrvym8Zbyw9b4VxkgXbjcrt1U/40p/xqP0RF_YSXydfyxywBIqqA/h1/nHKoKpMIxFoke0g8Bn9Z_XPo1sQX1wvwJMalnY33QVw) Back in 2022, just one day before Election Day, I actually spent a few hours canvassing in the main quad at Illinois State. I was handing out literature and reminding folks to vote for me, and answer any last-minute questions about my platform.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPNYjaSf0HiRB1luFcP1Zl2V2Cgf-aZsZkBOJr2GHeQx72iSOA8LIFVzkyeh8_J09vGEhqpNU7Cy9BqcJrY1O63vJt8RdPmHVnvWFFtErWclgq_lfGLf4QGnW88Wis7coaTiCxKhTlV6AfEYplhJyzowkO6PECkjAVl-kqUslwtrFn3YPPcicythISIkSNjOAZ3UuVr30U3hrjSb9vGseISGw_pmZWc4hdp9aBEWMARZfyJm8QbB8TsOM2vriwWusKt-jw1U0p65OykJgSW_a2G_ThzVAG-DcZXWexKCYvWuCIV04goktTC2wEEFwu71GVTUb_lWhn4uN2wkVcIzySCe1BTG9Poequn99kaLDVQaaY448p22q_UJPweN7xoyyudYz1rhQlmUkW6r7t9V_z8FCt3oLGR4tH-jTXLKcNGkBckxpQbVdqFxEYSKjKnTzSJbVfy7B-dfkHpj6A9awDHUB9qtPeRYGKpjR4xKVhjYk/40p/xqP0RF_YSXydfyxywBIqqA/h2/stC0O6plI9XejGX5bgMiCld9LZtOdX6ChDZ35BnAKUo)
---
_On campus at ISU before Election Day._
---
Much to my surprise, almost every single student I interacted with already knew who I was. I got a ton of responses like, _"I got you, Eric!"_ and _"I recognize you, you can count me."_ It turns out, the College Democrats had already done a _ton_ of legwork -- organizing the student body and doing voter registration. Friend, Americans are rising up, saying we will not be complicit in the genocide of Palestinians. **Since the horrific attack on Israeli civilians by Hamas and the unhinged collective punishment of Palestinians, Rashida has been steadfast in demanding the U.S. and the world work to save as many lives as possible, no matter their faith or ethnicity.** Last week, Rashida spoke at a rally in Washington DC organized by Jewish Voice for Peace and IfNotNow, and an interfaith prayer vigil and rally to hold the political establishment accountable for continuing the drumbeat of war that will lead to more lives lost, especially children in Palestine. At the rally, Rashida reminded us that we must not lose our shared humanity. The cries of the mother in Gaza who lost all of her children in the unrelenting bombing by the Israeli government are the same cries of Maya's father who listened to his daughter being attacked by Hamas not knowing if she is alive. Rashida’s voice is needed. More lives will be lost. The use of white phosphorus is melting children's faces in Gaza, whole neighborhoods have been destroyed, generations of families wiped out, and the Israeli military is saying that they are just getting started. **As the only Palestinian American member of Congress, Rashida’s voice and lived experience is more critical now than ever.** But in response to her leadership in calling for a ceasefire and an end to the genocide unfolding against millions of people trapped in Gaza, Rashida has been under relentless attack. Far-right Republicans have introduced multiple censure resolutions seeking to silence Rashida. clean_body: Rashida spoke at rallies and prayer vigils organized by faith-based and Palestinian human rights groups. | | | Friend, Americans are rising up, saying we will not be complicit in the genocide of Palestinians. Since the horrific attack on Israeli civilians by Hamas and the unhinged collective punishment of Palestinians, Rashida has been steadfast in demanding the U.S. and the world work to save as many lives as possible, no matter their faith or ethnicity. Last week, Rashida spoke at a rally in Washington DC organized by Jewish Voice for Peace and IfNotNow, and an interfaith prayer vigil and rally to hold the political establishment accountable for continuing the drumbeat of war that will lead to more lives lost, especially children in Palestine. At the rally, Rashida reminded us that we must not lose our shared humanity. The cries of the mother in Gaza who lost all of her children in the unrelenting bombing by the Israeli government are the same cries of Maya's father who listened to his daughter being attacked by Hamas not knowing if she is alive. Rashida’s voice is needed. More lives will be lost. The use of white phosphorus is melting children's faces in Gaza, whole neighborhoods have been destroyed, generations of families wiped out, and the Israeli military is saying that they are just getting started. As the only Palestinian American member of Congress, Rashida’s voice and lived experience is more critical now than ever. But in response to her leadership in calling for a ceasefire and an end to the genocide unfolding against millions of people trapped in Gaza, Rashida has been under relentless attack. Far-right Republicans have introduced multiple censure resolutions seeking to silence Rashida. Even members of her own party are policing her words and continue to dehumanize Palestinians. We need to keep Rashida in Congress fighting for the rights of all marginalized people. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Our movement demanding the human rights of Palestinians―and of all people―is growing. Together, let’s support Rashida’s leadership as she grieves the lives lost and works to save countless civilian lives, even as others in Congress continue the drumbeat of war. Thank you for having Rashida’s back. -Team Rashida P.S. Now there are 18 morally courageous members of Congress who have co-sponsored our Ceasefire Now Resolution , which calls for humanitarian aid to Gaza and an immediate ceasefire. . name: Andy Kim
subject: This doesn’t have to be Jersey’s reputation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
When I read this headline, my heart sank. I know for some, New Jersey politics — and politics in general — has a reputation for corruption. Many people and politicians brush it off, saying that's just Jersey .

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim-ak4nj?refcode=2023-10-24-stopnjcorruption&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=fc56d6db-a372-ee11-b004-00224832eb73 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim-ak4nj?refcode=2023-10-24-stopnjcorruption&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=fc56d6db-a372-ee11-b004-00224832eb73]

But when we say that corruption "comes with the job," people lose faith in our democracy. They begin to think that if it's all corrupt, why should they even bother?

You've heard me say before that I believe that the opposite of democracy is apathy. We are losing more and more people to it while we allow corruption to remain.

Now more than ever, New Jersey needs hard working, trustworthy leaders focused on the common good and injecting some integrity and civility back into our politics. That's why I'm running for Senate.

Will you join me in the fight for integrity in our democracy today by making a contribution before our end-of-month fundraising deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim-ak4nj?refcode=2023-10-24-stopnjcorruption&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=fc56d6db-a372-ee11-b004-00224832eb73]

A recent poll showed that New Jersey Democrats view Senator Menendez unfavorably and that if the election were today, he would get just 10 percent of the vote, while I would get 63.

New Jerseyans are ready for a change. But if we're going to win, we need your help.

We're building a movement of people who don't accept corruption as inevitable in New Jersey politics. Chip in now before the end of the month and join our movement for change! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim-ak4nj?refcode=2023-10-24-stopnjcorruption&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=fc56d6db-a372-ee11-b004-00224832eb73]

More soon,

Andy

clean_body: When I read this headline, my heart sank. I know for some, New Jersey politics — and politics in general — has a reputation for corruption. Many people and politicians brush it off, saying that's just Jersey . [] But when we say that corruption "comes with the job," people lose faith in our democracy. They begin to think that if it's all corrupt, why should they even bother? You've heard me say before that I believe that the opposite of democracy is apathy. We are losing more and more people to it while we allow corruption to remain. Now more than ever, New Jersey needs hard working, trustworthy leaders focused on the common good and injecting some integrity and civility back into our politics. That's why I'm running for Senate. Will you join me in the fight for integrity in our democracy today by making a contribution before our end-of-month fundraising deadline? [] A recent poll showed that New Jersey Democrats view Senator Menendez unfavorably and that if the election were today, he would get just 10 percent of the vote, while I would get 63. New Jerseyans are ready for a change. But if we're going to win, we need your help. We're building a movement of people who don't accept corruption as inevitable in New Jersey politics. Chip in now before the end of the month and join our movement for change! [] More soon, Andy Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: $5 [] $15 [] $25 [] $50 [] Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey

body:
Enough is enough | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72110860/434333305/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDA1NThhYi1hNjcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bhAyKUDSrBxYB-mEZk75GvdZNZKuhgDEIre4z3MI5Nc=&emci=4927d176-9b72-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=600558ab-a672-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=15529135) | Dear friends, The House of Representatives is in disarray, with three weeks wasted on internal chaos, I am stuck in DC waiting on a vote, instead of serving my constituents. I know that here in CT05, we value compromise and bipartisanship, and I’m extending those values to my colleagues across the aisle. **We need a Speaker who can secure the Farm Bill, national security, and government funding while supporting hungry children and addressing global security. ** It's time for action. We cannot afford further paralysis. Democrats have rallied behind Hakeem Jeffries for a bipartisan path forward because the choice is clear: We must set aside partisan divisions, prioritize the needs of the American people, and work together to move forward.** ** [**If you are as frustrated as I am, will you help commit to a bipartisan future by donating to my reelection campaign so that I can continue to get the work done?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72110861/434333306/2146739136?refcode=E4662-20231024-HousePressConference-SL-Other&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDA1NThhYi1hNjcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bhAyKUDSrBxYB-mEZk75GvdZNZKuhgDEIre4z3MI5Nc=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72110862/434333307/2146739136?express_lane=true&refcode=E4662-20231024-HousePressConference-EG-Other&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDA1NThhYi1hNjcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bhAyKUDSrBxYB-mEZk75GvdZNZKuhgDEIre4z3MI5Nc=)

clean_body: Enough is enough | | Dear friends, The House of Representatives is in disarray, with three weeks wasted on internal chaos, I am stuck in DC waiting on a vote, instead of serving my constituents. I know that here in CT05, we value compromise and bipartisanship, and I’m extending those values to my colleagues across the aisle. We need a Speaker who can secure the Farm Bill, national security, and government funding while supporting hungry children and addressing global security. It's time for action. We cannot afford further paralysis. Democrats have rallied behind Hakeem Jeffries for a bipartisan path forward because the choice is clear: We must set aside partisan divisions, prioritize the needs of the American people, and work together to move forward. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = The time to choose unity and effective leadership is now. Thank you, Rep. Jahana Hayes | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. Keep up with the latest from Jahana on and . ---|--- Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. If the Supreme Court decides not to take up this case, it could uphold the ruling by a federal appeals court that imposed significant restrictions on access to the pill.

This could be detrimental for women and healthcare providers across the country.

We must do everything in our power to protect women’s healthcare and fight for the right to choose.

It’s never been more important to flip the House blue next year and prevent MAGA extremists from trying to pass a national abortion ban.

**We must ensure a pro-choice majority next November, and that begins with protecting vulnerable seats like mine in PA-07.**

Peter,
It's time for Extreme Senate Democrats to PASS the Secure the Border Act!
**Border security is not just a political issue; it's a matter of national security.**
Our great state has been on the front lines of the battle for years, and it's time we put an end to the chaos and insecurity that our communities have had to endure.

That's why I'm reaching out to you today.

We need your help to make sure the Secure the Border Act is passed in the Senate. This vital piece of legislation will help secure our border, protect our communities, and uphold the rule of law.

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

clean_body: | | | | Can you take a look at this proposal for me, Peter? Peter, It's time for Extreme Senate Democrats to PASS the Secure the Border Act! Border security is not just a political issue; it's a matter of national security. Our great state has been on the front lines of the battle for years, and it's time we put an end to the chaos and insecurity that our communities have had to endure. That's why I'm reaching out to you today. We need your help to make sure the Secure the Border Act is passed in the Senate. This vital piece of legislation will help secure our border, protect our communities, and uphold the rule of law. | As we speak, our brave Border Patrol agents are working tirelessly to keep us safe, but they need the support of Congress to succeed. The Secure the Border Act will provide them with the resources and tools they need to do their jobs effectively. | I know you share my commitment to a secure and prosperous future for Texas and our nation. That's why I'm asking you to stand with me and demand action from the Senate. We must make our voices heard and demand that border security remains a top priority. | Together, we can secure our border, protect our communities, and ensure a brighter future for all Americans. Thank you, Rep. Roger Williams TX-25 | | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ ROGER WILLIAMS FOR U.S. CONGRESS 10 N. CADDO ST. PMB #174 CLEBURNE, TX 76031 Stay connected with our campaign and be part of the movement. Follow Roger on social media for updates, volunteer to support the cause, or reach out to him directly. By joining Team Williams, you will make a difference in your community. | A Note For You, From Roger My commitment to our great state and country is unwavering, and I am grateful to have my wife Patty, our two daughters, and YOU standing beside me on this journey. | From the Desk of Roger Williams 10 N. | | **We're excited to share that we're partnering with national organizations like Planned Parenthood and ACLU to identify, recruit, and turn out thousands of local "Abortion Defenders" in a state near you.** From Nevada to Michigan to Ohio, we're on the ground in ten states that are organizing critical abortion rights elections or gathering signatures to codify our rights into law this cycle. We're providing data, technology, digital support, and texting services that will move thousands of online volunteers to on-the-ground volunteers playing a huge role in winning back our right to choose. Our reproductive rights are a shell of what they once were – and that's why we see every single state as a critical battleground. If we put in the time, money, and resources now, we're going to see a groundswell of states codifying reproductive freedom into law and creating safe havens across the country. [**That's why every dollar you can give right now is so crucial.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72111351/434335219/-327605227?refcode=2023-10-24-abortion-defenders&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=3aac2512-a872-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWFjMjUxMi1hODcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R5qPUP1_VZKAAStOAkFi-VPgC3MxuN-85SB8I1UYjQA=) [Donate Now](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72111352/434335220/-327605227?refcode=2023-10-24-abortion-defenders&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=3aac2512-a872-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWFjMjUxMi1hODcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R5qPUP1_VZKAAStOAkFi-VPgC3MxuN-85SB8I1UYjQA=) Our strategy works. When we move the needle in overlooked regions, we are turning the tide for abortion rights across the U.S. [**Become an Abortion Defender, and do your part to make sure everyone can access the health care they need without permission from guys like Mitch McConnell. Can you make a contribution of $3 today to support our work in states like Ohio before Election Day on November 7th?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72111353/434335221/-327605227?refcode=2023-10-24-abortion-defenders&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=3aac2512-a872-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWFjMjUxMi1hODcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R5qPUP1_VZKAAStOAkFi-VPgC3MxuN-85SB8I1UYjQA=) Ohio's Issue 1 is on the ballot in just a few weeks. Michigan's Reproductive Health Care Act is up against stiff competition in the state legislature. Nevada is gathering signatures to put a constitutional amendment on the ballot. And so on, and so on. clean_body: Abortion defenders in 43614 | | | | We're excited to share that we're partnering with national organizations like Planned Parenthood and ACLU to identify, recruit, and turn out thousands of local "Abortion Defenders" in a state near you. From Nevada to Michigan to Ohio, we're on the ground in ten states that are organizing critical abortion rights elections or gathering signatures to codify our rights into law this cycle. We're providing data, technology, digital support, and texting services that will move thousands of online volunteers to on-the-ground volunteers playing a huge role in winning back our right to choose. Our reproductive rights are a shell of what they once were – and that's why we see every single state as a critical battleground. If we put in the time, money, and resources now, we're going to see a groundswell of states codifying reproductive freedom into law and creating safe havens across the country. = = Our strategy works. When we move the needle in overlooked regions, we are turning the tide for abortion rights across the U.S. = Ohio's Issue 1 is on the ballot in just a few weeks. Michigan's Reproductive Health Care Act is up against stiff competition in the state legislature. Nevada is gathering signatures to put a constitutional amendment on the ballot. And so on, and so on. = Thanks for your help and hard work, Movement Labs | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Rapid Resist Action. Contributions to Rapid Resist Action, a 501(c)(4), are not tax deductible for income tax purposes. |

Dear Friend,
---
Tomorrow night at 7pm PST we are hosting "A Night of Hope for Israel." It's sure to be a POWERFUL night of praise, worship, and prayer for Israel! We will be joined by my friend, Israeli musician and former IDF Captain, Yair Levi. In addition to Yair, there will be a Rabbi there to answer questions about the war in Israel. Do you have any questions about the war in Israel that you would like answered? If so, please fill out the form below. We will try to answer as many as possible. This event will be **[live-streamed on the Let Us Worship Youtube channel](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=2d3ad958df7d4a268a3624d22d52e0b5&_e=V_aWwjaGtGXe00Ri3XSZrsv97Mlt5TcBDZbbXZcw14U5YJs4w0zsUJDiBCFohi9J3Ab9ImcayWWI_Cs8PVA4rjTJkqNnnsMkm2vuZ8Ma5su6N8j_sLvi_GqcPtwBMqR7LnT8XkcK1pmNr1_SuzkgZcP7iFd46iIm9bqa5GI75Oc9G3dgolaZjESiVua8_RvT7j6tcFXgkFHmGbLUyPTp2r1wmhCf-jREGoO6A0DEOe6Cj2jodjNf3vg9nyEpeKq41vjkrN_qE6Z2PxPu4TVJXxQfLIydQimgLoMmVzZaZcvXbwNECEyUYT511wwZcGvd)** , so make sure to watch and see if your question is answered. _**SUBMIT A QUESTION**_

name: Blue NY 2024
subject: The numbers AREN'T looking good
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
We can't let another Red Wave happen
| | |
---
Friend, Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand and her Democratic colleagues have been fighting tirelessly to defend our progress and move our country forward.

But in 2022, Republicans came FAR too close to destroying all of our hard-earned wins. Now, with the help of their far-right megadonors, Republicans are ramping up for 2024 with more fighting power than ever.

**And with so much on the line, the numbers AREN'T looking good:**
* **23 SEATS: That's the number of Senate seats Democrats need to defend to maintain our majority — including Kirsten's. **

* **1 SEAT: That's _all_ Mitch McConnell needs to win to have a shot at controlling the Senate. **

* **4 SEATS: That's the number of House seats NY Republicans flipped in 2022 — and now, they're _directly targeting Kirsten._**

* **$50,000: What we need to raise by end-of-month to compete with GOP spending and run this campaign. But right now, we're still $39,874 short. **

Friend, with Republicans ready to invest MILLIONS to take the Senate and create another red wave in New York, we can't afford to leave _anything_ to chance. That's why it's so important that this campaign has the resources it needs to keep up with Republican's endless attacks.
**[We cannot defend our Senate majority without defending Kirsten's must-win seat. Please, before our midnight deadline, can you be one of the dedicated Democrats who powers Kirsten's campaign to defeat her GOP opponents and keep New York Blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72111702/434336388/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4483-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTUyZGU5Yy1hODcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WrV7hMu3cGQSXxl4x-LrSY_vDqBZXu7xE58iiUPMwAw=)**

clean_body: We can't let another Red Wave happen | | | Friend, Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand and her Democratic colleagues have been fighting tirelessly to defend our progress and move our country forward. But in 2022, Republicans came FAR too close to destroying all of our hard-earned wins. Now, with the help of their far-right megadonors, Republicans are ramping up for 2024 with more fighting power than ever. And with so much on the line, the numbers AREN'T looking good: 23 SEATS: That's the number of Senate seats Democrats need to defend to maintain our majority — including Kirsten's. 1 SEAT: That's all Mitch McConnell needs to win to have a shot at controlling the Senate. 4 SEATS: That's the number of House seats NY Republicans flipped in 2022 — and now, they're directly targeting Kirsten. $50,000: What we need to raise by end-of-month to compete with GOP spending and run this campaign. But right now, we're still $39,874 short. Friend, with Republicans ready to invest MILLIONS to take the Senate and create another red wave in New York, we can't afford to leave anything to chance. That's why it's so important that this campaign has the resources it needs to keep up with Republican's endless attacks. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, – Team Gillibrand | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Hill Harper
subject: I’m so proud to see unionized Michiganders stepping up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20231024&t=1&akid=480%2E62735%2E3JFZ-M)
Peter, in case you missed it, **6,800 more workers just joined UAW in their fight against the big three automakers for workers’ rights.**
Take a look 👇🏾
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231024?amount=5&refcode=em20231024-480&refcode2=480_62735_3JFZ-M&akid=480%2E62735%2E3JFZ-M)
This is the workers movement we need. We’ve seen the real change striking can bring about from Starbucks to Amazon to WGA to SAG-AFTRA to now the auto industry, we’re seeing workers come together and win long overdue change.
Imagine if we had those same principles from our politicians. Too many of them right now are _comfortable_.
They’re comfortable maintaining the status quo, resting until the next election season, and letting everyday working people suffer the consequences.
**Well, I’m not about that, and it’s part of the reason why I felt I had to run for Senate this year****, Peter.**
We need passionate representatives who aren’t afraid to fight for the people and workers who need it most. And that’s exactly what I hope to do.
As a card carrying + striking union member myself, I’m prepared to bring that same fire all the way to Washington to fight for what’s going to make a real difference in the lives of Michiganders.
But just like the power in unions comes from its members, the power of this movement is dependent on the power of our people across Michigan and beyond.
[**Can I count on your support today****, Peter? We’re up against a $11,000 fundraising gap and a deadline of October 31 at midnight. Anything you can donate right now will make a big difference.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231024?amount=5&refcode=em20231024-480&refcode2=480_62735_3JFZ-M&akid=480%2E62735%2E3JFZ-M)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231024?amount=5&refcode=em20231024-480&refcode2=480_62735_3JFZ-M&akid=480%2E62735%2E3JFZ-M)**
Onwards,
Hill
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-footer?refcode=em20231024&t=2&refcode2=480_62735_3JFZ-M&akid=480%2E62735%2E3JFZ-M)**

We’ve done extensive research on length, language, and endorsements to see how they impact the success of a measure. But we want to hear directly from you about how you interact with ballot measures. K.I.S.S (Keep It Simple, Silly): When passing ballot measures, simplicity is key. When voters have less information about a measure, they’re more likely to answer “yes” when it’s written in simple, easy-to-understand language. Do you research ballot measures with longer and more complicated language? Longer Ballots: During election season, choice fatigue is real. Ballots can be extremely long, and studies show 6% of ballot measures would have passed if voters had less choices to make. Do you always complete your longer ballots? At The Fairness Project, we collaborate with partners nationwide to run winning ballot measure campaigns that directly affect individuals' everyday experiences. Whether it's safeguarding abortion, expanding paid sick leave, or increasing the minimum wage, we want voters to have the most seamless experience at the ballot box, and your responses will help us continue that fight. So, thank you for your feedback!. Hearing directly from the people is extremely important for fighting for progressive policies through direct democracy. To continue this fight, we need your help, = = Thanks for your support, Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won over 30 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to the Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at the Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. You can request to get only the most important emails from our team , or you can . Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project P.O. Box 21337 Washington, DC 20009 United States

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
Our homeland is in danger. Not from overseas terrorists but Washington’s radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=212c7f0a1af5405d95e0735718fa0740&_t=LpFzO1vbRpZk4vQvzgujksPFAx1rV9GQ7kh5Ql3YT_UQIgylI-YtRE_aNA3WMdS-V8EFIOQnsuq1FFhL6JyVwoUpxgxYmq8eazFnsz36Xv8%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=212c7f0a1af5405d95e0735718fa0740&_t=LpFzO1vbRpZk4vQvzgujksPFAx1rV9GQ7kh5Ql3YT_UQIgylI-YtRE_aNA3WMdS-V8EFIOQnsuq1FFhL6JyVwoUpxgxYmq8eazFnsz36Xv8%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=212c7f0a1af5405d95e0735718fa0740&_e=Bt473ShoKHdN4q7I5BHrgRoBSthB1HDUPhopjzAQi5omMJ2uf2r3CidWTPm5XCPBMtv-_fturoVcBzjh968iqGQFV32dnQajfWwAPw_33m--9H624xCdyVozXsfJkzJyvrbXH4wHM4YTQz9j2Spmu79LCHVUp2dQtiXBhvfYPOmwKfprGbKdEv2M2gI1Kimv9VZvFGOUWRr9T6EXfekFqz_fGLShLEgGgp4o43rdfZyDu9TlCRRUNCQq4UGG6p1jOWlP580Ulr0unWqMKgrGzLhCv0TOWpE_lFXdgWSHRl1B4553i80n60Z9X5CWZoM9DmRtz8Q6iviSS1Lkwqd8-j5OMpRZDAi1G-LoNI3uu7af5B6uoqLPBfrwLIisNcx__f9Pc1QhBjkn8EVncJCUKQ%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve always known that I was meant to live a life of service, but I could never have imagined that perhaps **the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate.**

[**Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=212c7f0a1af5405d95e0735718fa0740&_e=Bt473ShoKHdN4q7I5BHrgRoBSthB1HDUPhopjzAQi5omMJ2uf2r3CidWTPm5XCPBMtv-_fturoVcBzjh968iqGQFV32dnQajfWwAPw_33m--9H624xCdyVozXsfJkzJyvrbXH4wHM4YTQz9j2Spmu79LCHVUp2dQtiXBhvfYPOmwKfprGbKdEv2M2gI1Kimv9VZvFGOUWRr9T6EXfekFqz_fGLShLEgGgp4o43rdfZyDu9TlCRRUNCQq4UGG6p1j4KT0m9EEGmeifa6c5wMAZkXWvo5tNzqO7HNumZie4Sgr_aZ0rU_CdZI8pCq-yWti3W9lNt6KBE0tu_jgQBL2w_OVQ3JgFGSgM52F5iijF_GECp39JvOmpaXXs5D519FflgybjaaNOb-9vjZYJCNPwA%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will back my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=212c7f0a1af5405d95e0735718fa0740&_e=Bt473ShoKHdN4q7I5BHrgRoBSthB1HDUPhopjzAQi5omMJ2uf2r3CidWTPm5XCPBMtv-_fturoVcBzjh968iqGQFV32dnQajfWwAPw_33m--9H624xCdyVozXsfJkzJyvrbXH4wHM4YTQz9j2Spmu79LCHVUp2dQtiXBhvfYPOmwKfprGbKdEv2M2gI1Kimv9VZvFGOUWRr9T6EXfekFqz_fGLShLEgGgp4o43rdfZyDu9TlCRRUNCQq4UGG6p1jRsGr8bj2G0_ciRRTmA4nwF7AVMpg8VFiPFEej5UanoaQcdZ9MTKsb9xhU-xcdevoCLex83V4w0ZynIo4jY7WqfUepFf5BITPocEryFP3bEkpsmqICWAlCjVelFu8W7uF-cqGLQ38as8zBJGzWLOqFw%3D%3D)

Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. **When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you.**

I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. _And believe me, there are some tales._

**I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism.** I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why [**I am determined to take on the anti-American, radical Left in Washington as Montana’s next U.S. Senator.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=212c7f0a1af5405d95e0735718fa0740&_e=Bt473ShoKHdN4q7I5BHrgRoBSthB1HDUPhopjzAQi5omMJ2uf2r3CidWTPm5XCPBMtv-_fturoVcBzjh968iqGQFV32dnQajfWwAPw_33m--9H624xCdyVozXsfJkzJyvrbXH4wHM4YTQz9j2Spmu79LCHVUp2dQtiXBhvfYPOmwKfprGbKdEv2M2gI1Kimv9VZvFGOUWRr9T6EXfekFqz_fGLShLEgGgp4o43rdfZyDu9TlCRRUNCQq4UGG6p1jG6mv36xMZkEcHlJVQJkAynjPKjGo-CkeLn5u5nw0LwMVmV_BzDwRLvw7m7js3J3d7WFVAdlyYRIxBk_6oG0B_Hxwa0jV5UujHy4Sja1VKR6k-cr0vhD26i-BGNteS_XRJF9qAeR8Lp1tr_eVtroujg%3D%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=212c7f0a1af5405d95e0735718fa0740&_e=Bt473ShoKHdN4q7I5BHrgRoBSthB1HDUPhopjzAQi5omMJ2uf2r3CidWTPm5XCPBMtv-_fturoVcBzjh968iqGQFV32dnQajfWwAPw_33m--9H624xCdyVozXsfJkzJyvrbXH4wHM4YTQz9j2Spmu79LCHVUp2dQtiXBhvfYPOmwKfprGbKdEv2M2gI1Kimv9VZvFGOUWRr9T6EXfekFqz_fGLShLEgGgp4o43rdfZyDu9TlCRRUNCQq4UGG6p1jPsoxKUlUhsl5caxb8iHvl-CTp4DNgRCo1S3KyppNWTqBSm14lsJ0N-aiZX04jKoESLLbZn5E-uO4jPwe6LmTOxmNWTpESIjipnnB2jQmRf69kzMeMHyF2mYcfxvNQI6NivhA-xxbIqGeBcEiIOF_ZA%3D%3D)

Our homeland is in danger. Not from overseas terrorists but Washington’s radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream.

**The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security.**

**The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the Senate in 2024, and our path to the Majority runs through this race in Montana.**

[**We need a proven warrior to take back this Senate seat and take on the Democrats in Washington. I hope hearing my story proves I am the man for the job.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=212c7f0a1af5405d95e0735718fa0740&_e=Bt473ShoKHdN4q7I5BHrgRoBSthB1HDUPhopjzAQi5omMJ2uf2r3CidWTPm5XCPBMtv-_fturoVcBzjh968iqGQFV32dnQajfWwAPw_33m--9H624xCdyVozXsfJkzJyvrbXH4wHM4YTQz9j2Spmu79LCHVUp2dQtiXBhvfYPOmwKfprGbKdEv2M2gI1Kimv9VZvFGOUWRr9T6EXfekFqz_fGLShLEgGgp4o43rdfZyDu9TlCRRUNCQq4UGG6p1jasG2QjuR1BlEptXYGKOg6zsTvUCft8j3ygcB581aMm-jD0qw9nCjY40ZH41aaAM8H7d_WOYvdMEWCc1drdRvW1oGMMjHSj34SWq6ZnSKgXPWpwzVK07hpU9lHaViygyOpXKqocfNofTjekkDuVLE4A%3D%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=212c7f0a1af5405d95e0735718fa0740&_e=Bt473ShoKHdN4q7I5BHrgRoBSthB1HDUPhopjzAQi5omMJ2uf2r3CidWTPm5XCPBMtv-_fturoVcBzjh968iqGQFV32dnQajfWwAPw_33m--9H624xCdyVozXsfJkzJyvrbXH4wHM4YTQz9j2Spmu79LCHVUp2dQtiXBhvfYPOmwKfprGbKdEv2M2gI1Kimv9VZvFGOUWRr9T6EXfekFqz_fGLShLEgGgp4o43rdfZyDu9TlCRRUNCQq4UGG6p1j5MFRXhb6W-fvkZvzYqAWco8-hWpRMM0yAiekKqXHx4EY0yJijJduJro572BSfYW3MvW3siDkEYxV-GtpequegsX49rctaZoUwIVWcA9qhg45xmRaBi63SdzfMEl3nswdV8Yffag51pQC241BvUArdw%3D%3D)

Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, **I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list.** The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election.

_***If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play.***_

This is my most critical mission to date, and [**I am counting on you to enlist in the fight.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=212c7f0a1af5405d95e0735718fa0740&_e=Bt473ShoKHdN4q7I5BHrgRoBSthB1HDUPhopjzAQi5omMJ2uf2r3CidWTPm5XCPBMtv-_fturoVcBzjh968iqGQFV32dnQajfWwAPw_33m--9H624xCdyVozXsfJkzJyvrbXH4wHM4YTQz9j2Spmu79LCHVUp2dQtiXBhvfYPOmwKfprGbKdEv2M2gI1Kimv9VZvFGOUWRr9T6EXfekFqz_fGLShLEgGgp4o43rdfZyDu9TlCRRUNCQq4UGG6p1jzpw03o-FOJTSlauCx9YkkVH-FTOybsjEntMZ_aJlBjgsqAaPixHLexJhOkA7YS0cRI-vy0nZysAfq92MpSJ15rq5gG4XDuLtY4cqllLVLI-vK65Psa4x4_lig8ztlyz4u-KhATydO4SRRyX8uAVR7g%3D%3D)

Tim Sheehy

Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Do you know what makes this primary different?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=31990%2E3422442%2EFQdVR5)
Derek, California’s Senate race is unique: The top two vote-getters, regardless of party, will advance from March’s primary to November’s general election.
Recent polls show Katie in a strong position, but around **a third of all voters are still undecided**. That means there’s ample room for other candidates to pull ahead and prevent Katie from advancing to the general election. This could happen because:
1. Our opponent, Adam Schiff, has a huge cash advantage. At the end of the last fundraising quarter, he reported having more money in the bank than any other Democrat, including President Biden’s campaign.
2. Republican celebrity candidate Steve Garvey jumped into the race two weeks ago. His personal funds and LA Dodger fame could allow him to win enough votes to advance to the general election.

We must keep our momentum and reach the millions of undecided voters who will determine the outcome of this race. There are just over four months to go until Primary Day, so it’s critical we pull ahead soon. [**Can you make a donation today to help us elect Katie Porter to the U.S. Senate?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231024-1?refcode=EMAM24_1_POL_20231024_V1_F&refcode2=31990_3422442_FQdVR5&akid=31990%2E3422442%2EFQdVR5)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231024-1?refcode=EMAM24_1_POL_20231024_V1_F&refcode2=31990_3422442_FQdVR5&akid=31990%2E3422442%2EFQdVR5)
Thanks team!
—KPHQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. clean_body: Derek, California’s Senate race is unique: The top two vote-getters, regardless of party, will advance from March’s primary to November’s general election. Recent polls show Katie in a strong position, but around a third of all voters are still undecided. That means there’s ample room for other candidates to pull ahead and prevent Katie from advancing to the general election. This could happen because: 1. Our opponent, Adam Schiff, has a huge cash advantage. At the end of the last fundraising quarter, he reported having more money in the bank than any other Democrat, including President Biden’s campaign. 2. Republican celebrity candidate Steve Garvey jumped into the race two weeks ago. His personal funds and LA Dodger fame could allow him to win enough votes to advance to the general election. We must keep our momentum and reach the millions of undecided voters who will determine the outcome of this race. There are just over four months to go until Primary Day, so it’s critical we pull ahead soon. Thanks team! —KPHQ Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

name: Team Jayapal
subject: It’s time to pass Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This is a clear and heartbreaking image of the corporate greed that’s tearing apart the fabric of our society.
#
Peter,
It only costs Pfizer $13 to produce Paxlovid. They're charging $1,390 for it.
**That's more than a 10,000% markup,****Peter,** all at the expense of patients and people who rely on this medicine for a better quality of life after COVID.
This is a clear and heartbreaking image of corporate greed. We know these profits are being funneled right back to the greedy CEOs who caused this problem.
**It's time to pass Medicare for All and finally put people before profits.**
[**If you stand with Pramila and our collective fight to end corporate greed in our health care system, please add your name to call on Congress to pass Medicare for All.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pass-m4a-20231024/?source=em20231024-3079&t=1&akid=3079%2E420207%2EHFPSbp)

clean_body: This is a clear and heartbreaking image of the corporate greed that’s tearing apart the fabric of our society. Peter, It only costs Pfizer $13 to produce Paxlovid. They're charging $1,390 for it. That's more than a 10,000% markup,Peter, all at the expense of patients and people who rely on this medicine for a better quality of life after COVID. This is a clear and heartbreaking image of corporate greed. We know these profits are being funneled right back to the greedy CEOs who caused this problem. It's time to pass Medicare for All and finally put people before profits. Thank you, Team Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

Period.** | [FIGHT BACK](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72114083/434344005/2084576589?sourceid=1052184&refcode=20231024_GARR_v1s1&refcode2=WTEFE1050&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDRiM2QwYi1iMTcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v6mnqzzUlXa2kaKUKSDPtEtZKi7Gyf1deaSZX-mOwjI=)

Black women in Georgia are more than twice as likely to die during and after pregnancy, and the state has one of the highest overall rates of maternal mortality in the nation. _When Republicans like the ones who wrote, passed, and argued in court for this ban call themselves "pro-life,"**they are lying**_.

It's easy to feel hopeless when our fundamental rights are destroyed. **But there is a way to fight back**. We can elect Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot, in Georgia and everywhere, who will protect our rights and GROW our freedom — instead of limiting it.

clean_body: This ban endangers the lives of Georgians. Period. | | | = Peter, The news just broke: Georgia's Supreme Court voted to UPHOLD the state's dangerous, cruel abortion ban. Here's the simple truth: pregnant bodies are less safe in states with abortion bans. This ban will endanger the lives of Georgians. Period. | = Black women in Georgia are more than twice as likely to die during and after pregnancy, and the state has one of the highest overall rates of maternal mortality in the nation. When Republicans like the ones who wrote, passed, and argued in court for this ban call themselves "pro-life,"they are lying. It's easy to feel hopeless when our fundamental rights are destroyed. But there is a way to fight back. We can elect Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot, in Georgia and everywhere, who will protect our rights and GROW our freedom — instead of limiting it. If you'd like to support the work of electing women fighting for reproductive freedom, please donate to EMILYs List today: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = In solidarity, the EMILYs List team EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. We stand at yet another crossroads for democracy, and the clock is ticking. In North Carolina, the delicate balance of fairness and justice teeters on the brink, and we have only hours left to protect North Carolinian’s right to fair representation. Right now, extreme, partisan politicians in North Carolina are pushing to enact electoral maps in their favor.
[**A.G. Holder reminds us: "The fair maps movement will continue in North Carolina."**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72114035/434343891/-1054259093?refcode=20231024_AOTL_F_NCUpdate_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmY2I4NDAzLWIxNzItZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KmDH6wuzHR64_21cT-a7xvw6Cirep87XM-73myIQoEQ=)** It is imperative that we take a stand for fair maps, not only in North Carolina but nationwide.**
