* * *
**_One of the most troubling developments in American policy and politics in recent decades involves the normalization of actions and ideas once widely viewed as outrageous and/or counter to the nation’s core democratic values..._
– NC Newsline**
[**This is the stark reality we face.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72114042/434343903/-1054259093?refcode=20231024_AOTL_F_NCUpdate_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmY2I4NDAzLWIxNzItZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KmDH6wuzHR64_21cT-a7xvw6Cirep87XM-73myIQoEQ=)
* * *
**Consider this:** We may have mere hours left until the North Carolina legislature passes these gerrymanders. The new lines, drawn by a highly partisan state legislature, suppress the voice of the people and diverse communities, extinguishing fairness for a decade.
**This is a call to action, a plea for your help in preserving fair representation in states like North Carolina and beyond.** [**Help fuel our fight for fair representation and safeguard our democracy everywhere it is on the line.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72114043/434343904/-1054259093?refcode=20231024_AOTL_F_NCUpdate_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmY2I4NDAzLWIxNzItZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KmDH6wuzHR64_21cT-a7xvw6Cirep87XM-73myIQoEQ=)

In North Carolina, the delicate balance of fairness and justice teeters on the brink, and we have only hours left to protect North Carolinian’s right to fair representation. Right now, extreme, partisan politicians in North Carolina are pushing to enact electoral maps in their favor. = It is imperative that we take a stand for fair maps, not only in North Carolina but nationwide. = = One of the most troubling developments in American policy and politics in recent decades involves the normalization of actions and ideas once widely viewed as outrageous and/or counter to the nation’s core democratic values... – NC Newsline = Consider this: We may have mere hours left until the North Carolina legislature passes these gerrymanders. The new lines, drawn by a highly partisan state legislature, suppress the voice of the people and diverse communities, extinguishing fairness for a decade. This is a call to action, a plea for your help in preserving fair representation in states like North Carolina and beyond. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The path ahead may be long, but with your support, we are determined to overcome every obstacle. Let’s draw a line in the sand against gerrymandering and ensure a fair future for North Carolina and our nation. \-- Brianna Shamsuddoha Mobilization Director All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. Contributions or gifts to The National Redistricting Action Fund are not tax deductible. 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600, Washington, D.C. 20005 This email was sent to:dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Our Revolution
subject: LIVE Healthcare for All Town Hall with Barbara Lee, Pramila Jayapal, Ro Khanna and more TONIGHT!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, big news!

On Tuesday (Oct. 24th), Our Revolution will hold a LIVE Healthcare for All Town Hall with Reps. Barbara Lee, Ro Khanna and Pramila Jayapal, the chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus, along with CA Assemblyman Ash Kalra.

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10284?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231024_INV_healthcaretownhall_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_healthcaretownhall&t=1011&akid=4831%2E5885482%2EQ8BPZU

RSVP (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10284?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231024_INV_healthcaretownhall_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_healthcaretownhall&t=1012&akid=4831%2E5885482%2EQ8BPZU)

We’ll talk about CalCare single payer healthcare in California and the path to national Medicare for All, as well as medical debt, drug prices, and how we can chart a path to healthcare justice in America.

RSVP here to be part of the conversation! The Live Town Hall event kicks off at 6pm Pacific/9pm Eastern on Tuesday! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10284?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231024_INV_healthcaretownhall_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_healthcaretownhall&t=1013&akid=4831%2E5885482%2EQ8BPZU)

We are thrilled to have this powerful lineup of healthcare justice champions working alongside Our Revolution and our progressive movement for universal healthcare in California and beyond.

Healthcare is a human right, and it’s long past time for America to adopt a single payer system. Winning CalCare would be a huge step forward in advancing the fight for Medicare for All nationwide.

Join Barbara Lee, Ro Khanna, Pramila Jayapal, Ash Kalra, and our progressive coalition for this LIVE Healthcare for All town hall! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10284?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231024_INV_healthcaretownhall_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_healthcaretownhall&t=1014&akid=4831%2E5885482%2EQ8BPZU)

Hope to see you there!

When we organize, we win

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Bennett, Team Rick Scott
subject: Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Hi there - it’s Bennett, Digital Manager for Senator Rick Scott.

**Here’s the situation -** In 2024, we have the opportunity to WIN BACK a GOP Majority in the Senate. If we do that, Republicans can pass laws that put AMERICANS FIRST.

**But, here’s the catch -** The Florida Senate race may be the deciding factor between a Republican and Democrat Majority, and last time Senator Scott ran, he won by less than 1%.

Democrats have pledged to spend _**MILLIONS**_ of dollars in Florida attacking Rick in this critical race, and we need to start building our war chest now if we’re going to fend off their attacks.

**[I know it seems inconsequential, but every single dollar gets us closer to victory. Can you pledge $15 to our conservative campaign?](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=af78f2678d434dd6b0bd5014bfc64482&_e=uS6cpM4EjxCBKCcb5LNxsqZTmS7KlzBPkpVsdTUabcFzSe5AFaoLlg-bG263uW1XZGGb0jdUsdurAXCAncsQoJmFYvJJcIEtO2NIBedKyYt6BY8YeT0kP_-TDxlqLQUytnfirbEHDI8fm_9mO6bCh2_S9E4BO9PZEX2XhZGlzuanVGNiL9uCeh58ZfrpSuZDo56AJM_2nEG_CgzZtgmmkkZgW1XeVRlbruk6syYU4wix2_j0y-kS3goQ17t1ml0Qgdv8bkajTkiQz1JCA7sgiz19pmNoIJLtc9j1eb2QbyZSa4-FNBTlu_Ikq7nXnLkapsj3swSUrLpvCmaoEo72TXds0-aeTWux-qfk7Z786dreiVSCXC_qQIszm-YxkXEa)**

We desperately need you on our team because without you, we may lose.

**[Will you stand with us?](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=af78f2678d434dd6b0bd5014bfc64482&_e=uS6cpM4EjxCBKCcb5LNxsqZTmS7KlzBPkpVsdTUabcFzSe5AFaoLlg-bG263uW1XZGGb0jdUsdurAXCAncsQoJmFYvJJcIEtO2NIBedKyYt6BY8YeT0kP_-TDxlqLQUytnfirbEHDI8fm_9mO6bCh2_S9E4BO9PZEX2XhZGlzuanVGNiL9uCeh58ZfrpSuZDo56AJM_2nEG_CgzZtgmmkkZgW1XeVRlbruk6syYU4wj_MAMLxnX-Wa7mTssWe7MzLvylH5iqZDEuFCfd1BYFpGtG-ZJlIWLt3c8A-wD9t8UvgyXzifmMJ__d3G9niWWofoA-fakSmymYqX1CLi-QwoXkPrQUv6ry-66TG6lYCnmkdVLZJL5pudbgz7jxhP2u)**

clean_body: | | | Hi there - it’s Bennett, Digital Manager for Senator Rick Scott. Here’s the situation - In 2024, we have the opportunity to WIN BACK a GOP Majority in the Senate. If we do that, Republicans can pass laws that put AMERICANS FIRST. But, here’s the catch - The Florida Senate race may be the deciding factor between a Republican and Democrat Majority, and last time Senator Scott ran, he won by less than 1%. Democrats have pledged to spend MILLIONS of dollars in Florida attacking Rick in this critical race, and we need to start building our war chest now if we’re going to fend off their attacks. If Florida flips blue, we’ll LOSE our chance at a Senate Majority, and Republicans won’t be able to stop the liberal madness in Washington. We desperately need you on our team because without you, we may lose. subject: BREAKING: Border Under Attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark]( "Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark")
body:
Gonzales sits by as U.S. reports Terrorists at the border | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/33a2020c9a08/im-announcing-my-run-for-congress-12658484?e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=2ddaac26d6&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | Peter,
**The threat is here:_America’s frontline in the war on terror has moved to our Southern border._** The U.S. Border Patrol just issued an alarming report revealing that __a record 18 people on the FBI’s terror watch list__ were arrested at the border last month, for a total of __169 terrorists this year__. _**More than the past 6 years combined.**_

We cannot afford to ignore this invasion any longer. As **Hamas wages war on Israel** , prompting groups like **Al-Queda, IS, and Hezbollah** **to order their fighters _around the world_** __to increase attacks on Jews and Americans__ , it is now _critical_ that we **end Biden’s open border policies, and start protecting our people, and our home.**

Unfortunately, _**our own representative,**_**Tony Gonzales** , is more interested in **_playing politics than protecting our people._**
Rep. Gonzales _refused_ to vote on more border funding earlier this year, and now would rather fight his own party than the terrorists at the border... voting against party nominee Jim Jordan 3 times, and **making it impossible to secure the border and protect our people, and our home.**

**I will not let this stand.** When I get to Congress,**** I will stand against Biden’s open borders, I will stand up to RINOs like Gonzales, _**I will stand up for you.**_
[_With your support, [FNAME], we can stand up together and protect our people, will you stand with me today?_](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=d56e6a7e08&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| [HELP ME SECURE OUR BORDER](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=771d9dcc8c&e=c982eb7ad4 "HELP ME SECURE OUR BORDER")
---
| [JOIN THE CAUSE TODAY](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=b9bb64452e&e=c982eb7ad4 "JOIN THE CAUSE TODAY")
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=4e3c6c1665&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| In a brutal attack that began last week on **the sacred Jewish Holiday of Simchat Torah** , Hamas terrorists from Palestine and Gaza carried out rampant campaign of bloodshed against her people. These heartless terrorists continue their onslaught of shameless _**slayings, torture, rape, and capture**_ of thousands of Jewish men, women and children in the __**country of our close ally, Israel.**__ As these attacks continue to escalate, with threats of televised hostage slayings and coordination with Iran backed Hezbollah, _**Biden is nowhere to be found**_ _**as he avoids accountability and shuts down his office for comment**_ , even after news of **9 Americans killed in the attacks** , just one month after his administration gave Iran a _**6 BILLION dollar payment on the anniversary of 9/11! **_ We cannot let this treachery stand,_**Israel should not face this fight alone.**_ Biden’s failure is unacceptable. If Trump was at his rightful place as Commander-In-Chief, an attack like this on a treasured ally would be unthinkable. For too long Joe Biden has been hiding from conflict, and only signals weakness to our enemies everywhere with the message that the office of the American Presidency is nowhere to be found. As Israel faces its darkest hour, I call on our people to join me in standing with Israel against this unimaginable terror wrought by a heartless enemy. You are not alone dear friends, America stands with you, _**until this battle is won**_ , _**until Israel is safe**_ , _**until her people are free at last.**_
---
|
_For America,_

Julie Clark
Former Medina County Republican Chair
Candidate for U.S. Congress, TX-23
[ClarkForCongress.com](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=8fb62f5cb8&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | | | | | | [](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=7d07c34c0f&e=c982eb7ad4)

| | [](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=c02a752ff7&e=c982eb7ad4)

ONLY IF To cement our GOP victory, we need AT LEAST 500 small-dollar donors (YOU) to step up in the next few moments. body:
I could never have imagined that perhaps the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=e1827e8db8fb4a5e8c2f1612067f9092&_t=nHk7wswCsNIUVaq8aJHVle2nZAGkSNDavq5znms56vlW7e57p4Vx7FVHUH1imkitmfQ4WaFkcxM6svMv-7uIO49IKX-CMkyGNzYa-YF74n0%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=e1827e8db8fb4a5e8c2f1612067f9092&_t=nHk7wswCsNIUVaq8aJHVle2nZAGkSNDavq5znms56vlW7e57p4Vx7FVHUH1imkitmfQ4WaFkcxM6svMv-7uIO49IKX-CMkyGNzYa-YF74n0%3D)
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e1827e8db8fb4a5e8c2f1612067f9092&_e=x7z4aGIhEtlYvBNrlVBvHVpMoEuVeSDFAHjkhjTBz12KGaiGI4KagvfZBGls-WlPSg00OUZX2SFnKIESO4MltROy-yV3Ax7LpHs9ZXG6qEB_pu3GoGeZ7czXcfAJOqKZ5diJwJetSej8VpbnjfkTi5Z6szu7VKYa-Yk7vinx44Sk1vt6oTOBvTI4MiZMQ9dgzwb4kXlnKFZnDaZgQU-ZZaJ33V0kFW-3B6mvLPFsNMJfUo7akzrldzswaIy0FdgageeqNnOZYPvCKQaUIBPiDjw97N7LShvmtHJLZXUAX48FaQDxx9-JnO9DlvNIEZRKj03G5oVAELCeiOiRsZnJa_8eb7ML45MSFwsShhVxq6Dgd5fzmll_cepbzxLE0no0tMIgk6NO0SCAjKkjeVPmcA%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve always known that I was meant to live a life of service, but I could never have imagined that perhaps **the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate.**

[**Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e1827e8db8fb4a5e8c2f1612067f9092&_e=x7z4aGIhEtlYvBNrlVBvHVpMoEuVeSDFAHjkhjTBz12KGaiGI4KagvfZBGls-WlPSg00OUZX2SFnKIESO4MltROy-yV3Ax7LpHs9ZXG6qEB_pu3GoGeZ7czXcfAJOqKZ5diJwJetSej8VpbnjfkTi5Z6szu7VKYa-Yk7vinx44Sk1vt6oTOBvTI4MiZMQ9dgzwb4kXlnKFZnDaZgQU-ZZaJ33V0kFW-3B6mvLPFsNMJfUo7akzrldzswaIy0FdgaGLU2rVgWNeNVuyd0iaR7BziEOL3qj6B4nfrUyykE8T-i5997eiFqe54KpZHr6yX1CwsalncR-qcCp0KU2R8nCJvh_jGk7CelSt5NopttOCZDY4ztd8W5hRj-3oql6e9ZJJdG-S6z-UddkkifGsRy4g%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will back my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e1827e8db8fb4a5e8c2f1612067f9092&_e=x7z4aGIhEtlYvBNrlVBvHVpMoEuVeSDFAHjkhjTBz12KGaiGI4KagvfZBGls-WlPSg00OUZX2SFnKIESO4MltROy-yV3Ax7LpHs9ZXG6qEB_pu3GoGeZ7czXcfAJOqKZ5diJwJetSej8VpbnjfkTi5Z6szu7VKYa-Yk7vinx44Sk1vt6oTOBvTI4MiZMQ9dgzwb4kXlnKFZnDaZgQU-ZZaJ33V0kFW-3B6mvLPFsNMJfUo7akzrldzswaIy0FdgaKouzMhf5i879c0Oe5Vn7LWL3WMGkVPC8ZRh0nJI9ZEL1q7RgWMaeVSlV4fhNdxP6_Gv7x9FCuoGBujXvmHavEjOLxjy38QmBcMQ0Nf2kTnhPua47HeH3B7oxR1yEkH5QkyaPU9OCYtRI4KTjlXHcDw%3D%3D)

Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. **When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you.**

I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. _And believe me, there are some tales._

**I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism.** I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why [**I am determined to take on the anti-American, radical Left in Washington as Montana’s next U.S. Senator.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e1827e8db8fb4a5e8c2f1612067f9092&_e=x7z4aGIhEtlYvBNrlVBvHVpMoEuVeSDFAHjkhjTBz12KGaiGI4KagvfZBGls-WlPSg00OUZX2SFnKIESO4MltROy-yV3Ax7LpHs9ZXG6qEB_pu3GoGeZ7czXcfAJOqKZ5diJwJetSej8VpbnjfkTi5Z6szu7VKYa-Yk7vinx44Sk1vt6oTOBvTI4MiZMQ9dgzwb4kXlnKFZnDaZgQU-ZZaJ33V0kFW-3B6mvLPFsNMJfUo7akzrldzswaIy0FdgaK6pkCypvabVzv6cOx0PiyfvNyHIBRMflOcOFMgZTcMFtQbJnDiMOIG2Bhw7S4kPBdUAUHzUC4vyYaqQRVxJF-ZxsjfamQ4Q8iWXGSHNEaANXUqbC6fThatXdA7z71Z5GoMNMEILd7vpMrfdueoXmMA%3D%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e1827e8db8fb4a5e8c2f1612067f9092&_e=x7z4aGIhEtlYvBNrlVBvHVpMoEuVeSDFAHjkhjTBz12KGaiGI4KagvfZBGls-WlPSg00OUZX2SFnKIESO4MltROy-yV3Ax7LpHs9ZXG6qEB_pu3GoGeZ7czXcfAJOqKZ5diJwJetSej8VpbnjfkTi5Z6szu7VKYa-Yk7vinx44Sk1vt6oTOBvTI4MiZMQ9dgzwb4kXlnKFZnDaZgQU-ZZaJ33V0kFW-3B6mvLPFsNMJfUo7akzrldzswaIy0Fdga254CIvfUT7k0tonzIBOGlXTuZofehWB_aZd7yoDfo9gEz-RUEbCUFin0IWhMyJ0sKJ6iY-GYbKVrJVGqVyoqyn9Yu5MmC2xWeOKZuFDvZIBi2Bhe1PRwGEP-6neX-q0RHSLBgBo1zT84nQEJdsmRKQ%3D%3D)

Our homeland is in danger. Not from overseas terrorists but Washington’s radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream.

**The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security.**

**The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the Senate in 2024, and our path to the Majority runs through this race in Montana.**

[**We need a proven warrior to take back this Senate seat and take on the Democrats in Washington. I hope hearing my story proves I am the man for the job.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e1827e8db8fb4a5e8c2f1612067f9092&_e=x7z4aGIhEtlYvBNrlVBvHVpMoEuVeSDFAHjkhjTBz12KGaiGI4KagvfZBGls-WlPSg00OUZX2SFnKIESO4MltROy-yV3Ax7LpHs9ZXG6qEB_pu3GoGeZ7czXcfAJOqKZ5diJwJetSej8VpbnjfkTi5Z6szu7VKYa-Yk7vinx44Sk1vt6oTOBvTI4MiZMQ9dgzwb4kXlnKFZnDaZgQU-ZZaJ33V0kFW-3B6mvLPFsNMJfUo7akzrldzswaIy0FdgaTTnWnWio9nDmAADN9msrGxg4Sy3fGE9ScXSTUBxDyOwou66csBmusedJxe5lUy9Fc0_jB5kIScAiV4fWsXWhaCJIjaD53121Meu9X_S3aPX-lz6R4B4TduIS93HqZacBXgcsUx-xSAQgwaovuPmsuQ%3D%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e1827e8db8fb4a5e8c2f1612067f9092&_e=x7z4aGIhEtlYvBNrlVBvHVpMoEuVeSDFAHjkhjTBz12KGaiGI4KagvfZBGls-WlPSg00OUZX2SFnKIESO4MltROy-yV3Ax7LpHs9ZXG6qEB_pu3GoGeZ7czXcfAJOqKZ5diJwJetSej8VpbnjfkTi5Z6szu7VKYa-Yk7vinx44Sk1vt6oTOBvTI4MiZMQ9dgzwb4kXlnKFZnDaZgQU-ZZaJ33V0kFW-3B6mvLPFsNMJfUo7akzrldzswaIy0FdgaiEMDahEVvnWgzorifimThxuPpnYiJu5JA4fypzq_W9aArsERaC0uCOp7YPzFgudZ9F8fais7RckkGt3UBhlRHmjye0KfNWzB16TwzyN3iSv6myGmJK2Uvh3FMc5vA7iGDKTeWtZjI0WmqElRBoPIig%3D%3D)

Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, **I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list.** The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election.

_***If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play.***_

This is my most critical mission to date, and [**I am counting on you to enlist in the fight.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e1827e8db8fb4a5e8c2f1612067f9092&_e=x7z4aGIhEtlYvBNrlVBvHVpMoEuVeSDFAHjkhjTBz12KGaiGI4KagvfZBGls-WlPSg00OUZX2SFnKIESO4MltROy-yV3Ax7LpHs9ZXG6qEB_pu3GoGeZ7czXcfAJOqKZ5diJwJetSej8VpbnjfkTi5Z6szu7VKYa-Yk7vinx44Sk1vt6oTOBvTI4MiZMQ9dgzwb4kXlnKFZnDaZgQU-ZZaJ33V0kFW-3B6mvLPFsNMJfUo7akzrldzswaIy0Fdgaqn0W5T-dfWk-Nv_hOqjJXTSs0CTgDkGrrUW2ThWukDqV2AfEy_A_3UfOyqA2fTrPfeFHoEXdGoLOI6Ych6_-Wrqkt13PRZfhCAnjhKEYRtkqQ6HQLP_PcQRfEXVgyiCzPUVqFO--tLGK-t0Rzr1L7Q%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e1827e8db8fb4a5e8c2f1612067f9092&_e=x7z4aGIhEtlYvBNrlVBvHVpMoEuVeSDFAHjkhjTBz12KGaiGI4KagvfZBGls-WlPSg00OUZX2SFnKIESO4MltROy-yV3Ax7LpHs9ZXG6qEB_pu3GoGeZ7czXcfAJOqKZ5diJwJetSej8VpbnjfkTi5Z6szu7VKYa-Yk7vinx44Sk1vt6oTOBvTI4MiZMQ9dgzwb4kXlnKFZnDaZgQU-ZZaJ33V0kFW-3B6mvLPFsNMJfUo7akzrldzswaIy0FdgaxClQw2WdhrWjxMHN8iYQUzgXjCrfikxgP6PvijUSYapS4coQR5yUVF5svnBAKBjV0AG88D-8-OgNOfRG69Ok7qqCHX4hZxKXtl0GF7Htwzcomd_E_RkSXXbf4riv9xKGagFAf11bQOFhmNjReyxHuw%3D%3D)

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e1827e8db8fb4a5e8c2f1612067f9092&_e=x7z4aGIhEtlYvBNrlVBvHVpMoEuVeSDFAHjkhjTBz12KGaiGI4KagvfZBGls-WlPSg00OUZX2SFnKIESO4MltROy-yV3Ax7LpHs9ZXG6qEB_pu3GoGeZ7czXcfAJOqKZ5diJwJetSej8VpbnjfkTi5Z6szu7VKYa-Yk7vinx44Sk1vt6oTOBvTI4MiZMQ9dgzwb4kXlnKFZnDaZgQU-ZZaJ33V0kFW-3B6mvLPFsNMJfUo7akzrldzswaIy0Fdgah_5TZ52zb910itPfYLX2mAjSpSyMShI9a-M8PhoEuFVJDTPoDPydzw-35EpTuFWpvAGvoI9tzr-TGyTVKhjUaU3rbctwJtQX8JY0mcTaexG5-7szFUnDSS0ynTts2fyid32xJdPOnukt4Ic0ujKmDw%3D%3D)

* * *

Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election. *If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play. This is my most critical mission to date, and Thank you, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

**We are Americans.**

At the end of the day, that is our most unifying principle. That spirit of unity is a centerpiece of my campaign. We cannot establish a national identity without saying, "I am proud to be American."

A President can and should be the best example of that ideal. Someone who listens to every American, even if they disagree on issues or on how to make America stronger. That's exactly why I need to hear from you now, Peter.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

That spirit of unity is a centerpiece of my campaign. We cannot establish a national identity without saying, "I am proud to be American." A President can and should be the best example of that ideal. Someone who listens to every American, even if they disagree on issues or on how to make America stronger. That's exactly why I need to hear from you now, Peter. | PRE-DEBATE ISSUES POLL 1\. ◯ Yes ◯ No 2\. ◯ Yes ◯ No ◯ Unsure 3\. ◯ State of the economy ◯ Standing with our allies ◯ Strength of our borders ◯ Big Tech and censorship ◯ Securing our elections ◯ Stance on "Woke" Issues 4\. ◯ Right ◯ Wrong ◯ Unsure 5\. Share your thoughts on how to save America | Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: Why did you ignore us? [FFR]
subject: Liz Cheney needs your help ASAP
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
Don’t abandon Cheney in her time of need!
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20330%2E4449941%2ELf86A0)
---
Hey,

Last week, we sent you our urgent petition to stand with Liz Cheney after Rep. Jamie Raskin floated her name as a Speaker option and triggered GOP attacks.

**But our records indicate that you didn’t sign.** Without your signature, we’re still [5] local signatures short of our signature goal.

So we’re giving you a second chance to add your signature now, before Republicans take over and force in a Trump-puppet as Speaker. [**_Click HERE or use the button below to sign »_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-cheney?source=FFR_20231024_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=7&akid=20330%2E4449941%2ELf86A0) | [_SECOND CHANCE:_ ADD YOUR NAME NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-cheney?source=FFR_20231024_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=8&akid=20330%2E4449941%2ELf86A0)
---
I’ve attached the original petition below for your records. Thanks,

Andrew

Fight for Reform

\---------- Forwarded message \---------
From: speechless! (via FFR)
Subject: Jamie Raskin just STUNNED the GOP >>
To: Top Democrats
**_Look, Jamie Raskin just STUNNED the GOP:_**
[ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-cheney?source=FFR_20231024_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=9&akid=20330%2E4449941%2ELf86A0)
The GOP has DOUBLED DOWN on their all-out assault on Cheney after Raskin’s stunning announcement.

They’re deadset on keeping Cheney from returning to Congress as her punishment for participating in the January 6th Committee.
[**_Please, the GOP is making an example out of Cheney to ensure that no other Republicans dare to stand up to Trump. Sign our petition to stand with Liz Cheney »_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-cheney?source=FFR_20231024_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=10&akid=20330%2E4449941%2ELf86A0)
[15,000 SUPPORTERS NEEDED: Add your name immediately to stand with Liz Cheney »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-cheney?source=FFR_20231024_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=11&akid=20330%2E4449941%2ELf86A0)
---
Look, here’s three things you need to know:
**ONE:** Liz Cheney bucked her party and stood against Trump’s corruption.

**TWO:** Republicans were FURIOUS! _She lost her seat in Congress by standing up for the truth._

**THREE:** **The GOP never stopped attacking her!** They’re hellbent on completely destroying Cheney’s career to send a message to other Republicans.
[**_That’s why it’s crucial we get 15,000 signatures standing with Liz Cheney, she’ll know she has the support to keep standing up to the GOP! Sign on to stand with Liz Cheney »_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-cheney?source=FFR_20231024_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=12&akid=20330%2E4449941%2ELf86A0)
[ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-cheney?source=FFR_20231024_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=13&akid=20330%2E4449941%2ELf86A0)
[15,000 SUPPORTERS NEEDED: Add your name immediately to stand with Liz Cheney »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-cheney?source=FFR_20231024_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=14&akid=20330%2E4449941%2ELf86A0)
---
Thank you for adding your voice to our emergency petition!

– FFR

Friend,
Recent reports and statements made by the Customs and Border Protection and Department of Homeland Security, highlights the urgent need for new leadership among our top law-enforcement agencies. Instead of following the duties and responsibilities laid out by Congress in the wake of 9/11 to help secure our nation, the department has instead chosen to follow a highly politicized agenda that has compromised our national security.
_**We Must Hold Our Leaders Accountable!**_
The negligence of our current leadership has led to high turnover rates among our border and national security agencies, failures in enforcement, and record-breaking terrorist crossings. My experience in the military has given me the necessary knowledge to identify terrorist threats and the physical vulnerabilities that they are exploiting to enter our nation. Our national security should not be compromised by leadership who is willfully ignorant of the realities at our southern border.

body:
NOW LET’S WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE.

NOW LET’S WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE. | | | Friend,

---
It is my great honor to tell you that I have officially filed the paperwork to be a candidate for President of the United States in the very first primary of the 2024 election - New Hampshire.
---
_**_NOTHING_**_** _CAN STOP THE GREATEST MOVEMENT IN HISTORY!_**
---
To prove that we truly are unstoppable, I'm calling on grassroots donors all across the nation to make a campaign contribution that will be _registered_ the very week that our official presidential paperwork is filed.
---
**There will always be**** _time-stamped_****proof that you were with us on WEEK ONE.**
---

NOW LET’S WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE. | | | Friend, It is my great honor to tell you that I have officially filed the paperwork to be a candidate for President of the United States in the very first primary of the 2024 election - New Hampshire. NOTHING CAN STOP THE GREATEST MOVEMENT IN HISTORY! To prove that we truly are unstoppable, I'm calling on grassroots donors all across the nation to make a campaign contribution that will be registered the very week that our official presidential paperwork is filed. There will always be time-stampedproof that you were with us on WEEK ONE. Of course, if you cannot give because of the corrupt and incompetent fool who we will soon FIRE from the White House, then please do not donate today! I know who my loyal supporters are - and even if there won't be time-stamped proof, I will remember who was with us on Day One. | Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: [FROM TRUMP FORCE ONE] Date: Mon, October 23, 2023 Subject: re: OFFICIALLY FILING TODAY To: dpwillis67@gmail.com | | Friend, Right now, I'm flying to the great state of New Hampshire - home of the FIRST PRIMARY OF THE 2024 ELECTION. But this isn't any ordinary campaign stop... ...I'm traveling to OFFICIALLY FILE THE PAPERWORK TO APPEAR ON THE BALLOT. Today, I want to send a message to Crooked Joe Biden, the naysayers in the Fake News Media, George Soros, the DNC, the RINOs, and all of our many other enemies that no matter how hard they conspire to try and destroy us, I will NEVER DROP out of this race and I will NEVER SURRENDER our mission to Make America Great Again! But I'll need YOU to echo that message. Along with our official filing, I want to report that we had a MASSIVE SURGE of grassroots donations today, showing just how many Americans are 100% committed to our mission and will NEVER SURRENDER our country to tyranny. | Thank you, Donald J. clean_body: In a post-Roe v. Wade country, reelecting Sharice Davids to Congress is more important than ever. | Team, Sharice Davids is one of the strongest pro-choice advocates in the House. She’s been a fighter for reproductive freedom – and in post-Roe v. Wade America, reelecting her to Congress is more important than ever. That’s why we’re reaching out today. EMILYs List is proud to support Sharice Davids, because we know we can count on her to do her part in protecting reproductive freedom for her district in Kansas. = | | = At EMILYs List, we work to elect Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot and across the country with a goal of fighting for our rights and our communities. Your support helps us recruit and train candidates just like Sharice Davids. And with extremist Republicans doing everything they can to roll back reproductive freedom, it’s critical that we work harder than ever to reelect pro-choice candidates and flip the House in 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for being with us in the fight, \- the EMILYs List team * | = Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. Due to surging interest rates and skyrocketing prices, young Americans are forced to put off key milestones like getting married, having children, opening their own businesses, and saving for retirement.
As someone who went from being homeless to the House of Representatives, I know just how this issue severely hurts Millenials and Gen Z.
And if you’re Gen X or older, don't you want your children and grandchildren to have the same opportunities you did when you were starting out?
That is why I was proud to sponsor the REINS Act in Congress, a bill that greatly enhances legislative oversight on ridiculous regulations that make it nearly impossible to build things like new homes, condos, and apartments in the United States.
Before Washington bureaucrats create another barrier to your prosperity, they must explain themselves before Congress and tell us why it’s necessary. If they can’t, then they can go kick dust.
This is a common sense bill that America desperately needs, but Democrats have opposed it every step of the way and you are guaranteed that if they take back the House in 2024, they’re going to kill the REINS Act for good.
[That is why we MUST hold the House in 2024. Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life.
Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.
Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home.

clean_body: | | | | Americans need relief! Fellow Patriot, Joe Biden and the radical Left think you should own nothing and thank them for it. According to the latest real estate industry studies, home prices are now unaffordable in 99% OF THE NATION. Due to surging interest rates and skyrocketing prices, young Americans are forced to put off key milestones like getting married, having children, opening their own businesses, and saving for retirement. As someone who went from being homeless to the House of Representatives, I know just how this issue severely hurts Millenials and Gen Z. And if you’re Gen X or older, don't you want your children and grandchildren to have the same opportunities you did when you were starting out? That is why I was proud to sponsor the REINS Act in Congress, a bill that greatly enhances legislative oversight on ridiculous regulations that make it nearly impossible to build things like new homes, condos, and apartments in the United States. Before Washington bureaucrats create another barrier to your prosperity, they must explain themselves before Congress and tell us why it’s necessary. If they can’t, then they can go kick dust. This is a common sense bill that America desperately needs, but Democrats have opposed it every step of the way and you are guaranteed that if they take back the House in 2024, they’re going to kill the REINS Act for good. | Americans are strong. We don’t need government handouts, we need the government to get out of our way! Right now, young Americans are being priced out of a good life, my friend, but with your help, we’re going to reignite the American Dream and Make America Affordable Again. | | | Rep. Kat Cammack Congresswoman FL-3 | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- | Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life. Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home. | | FOLLOW KAT ONLINE | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Donate by Mail Kat For Congress 5200 NW 43rd Street SUITE 102-180 Gainesville, FL, 32606 | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Kat Cammack 5200 NW 43rd st, suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 = \- ==

Peter – it's clear from the chaos in Congress that our work to transform politics has never been more urgent. For the sake of our communities, we need to build our ranks of bold Democratic women at every level of our government.
**Emerge has known all along that 2023 would be a critical election year. Now, with just 14 DAYS until the November elections, we need to ramp up support for our Emerge alums on the ballot right now! **
**[Will you donate $14 dollars now to help empower Democratic women to run and WIN in 2023 and beyond?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72115646/434349735/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=14&refcode=jtk1337-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE4MGNkZGFkLWI4NzItZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IqN4jBSnGgel8Dj5CFehwotwz4Fdf4TTkGfbItjWO3o=)**
| | [DONATE NOW ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72115647/434349736/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1337-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE4MGNkZGFkLWI4NzItZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IqN4jBSnGgel8Dj5CFehwotwz4Fdf4TTkGfbItjWO3o=)
---
We work year in and year out to build a bench of powerhouse Democratic women, Peter. That’s how we got**over 200 Emerge alums on the ballot** this year, seizing the opportunity to make a difference.
Our alums like Davida Haygood, Joy Hollingsworth, Shellie Willis, and Col. Pam Stevenson could each be **the FIRST Black person elected to their school boards, city councils, or the attorney general’s office.** Kasandra Gandara could be the **FIRST woman mayor** of Las Cruces, New Mexico. Lily Franklin and Russet Perry could help **turn Virginia's legislature blue** , and Britnee Timberlake could **bring much-needed leadership to the New Jersey State Senate. **
If elected, these trailblazing women will achieve historic firsts, build crucial blue firewalls in bellwether states, and take us ever closer to strong, women-led Democratic majorities across the country. **But they need us to have their backs, Peter, and we’re counting on Emerge community members like you to support women who step up when it matters most.**
**[So please, with 14 days left until Election Day: Donate $14 or more to Emerge now to empower Democratic women to run for office and win in 2023 and beyond.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72115648/434349737/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=14&refcode=jtk1337-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE4MGNkZGFkLWI4NzItZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IqN4jBSnGgel8Dj5CFehwotwz4Fdf4TTkGfbItjWO3o=)**
| | [DONATE NOW ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72115649/434349738/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1337-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE4MGNkZGFkLWI4NzItZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IqN4jBSnGgel8Dj5CFehwotwz4Fdf4TTkGfbItjWO3o=)

They have gone nearly three weeks – _and counting_ – without a speaker of the House after multiple sabotage attempts from within their own party! Here's the latest.
_**FIRST,** _Kevin McCarthy lost the vote for speaker of the House FOURTEEN TIMES before finally winning, but only after making concessions to far-right members of his party.
_**THEN,** _the "Freedom Caucus," a far-right and alarmingly powerful faction of House Republicans, joined with their extremist allies to remove Kevin McCarthy as speaker of the House after he reached across the aisle to pass a temporary budget and prevented a catastrophic government shutdown.
_**NOW,** _House Republicans are cycling through their most far-right options for speaker of the House at an alarming rate – and as of today, they still have NOT voted for a new speaker.
_**Peter, this is not how a functioning democracy should work.**_
**I'm working hard to ensure that protections for working families in New York and beyond don't falter during this political circus, but I need to know where Fearless Fighters like you stand on the antics of House Republicans. I'm counting on 5,000 people to respond to my flash poll before midnight tonight, so please tell me ASAP:**

| | Peter — Here's a quick recap of where we're at: **Days without a speaker: ****21** **Days until we face another government shutdown:****23** **Failed Speaker-designate nominations: ****3** This is no way for a government to keep functioning. I'm sick of seeing manufactured crises in the House again and again. There won't always be an 11th-hour solution, and I'm concerned that regardless of the outcome in the Speaker race, we'll be right back in the thick of the chaos that gripped the House for much of the past month. **Why does all of this keep happening? Because Republicans won a narrow House majority in 2022 and then proceeded to let their most extreme members run the show.** **Their latest pick for Speaker, Rep. Tom Emmer was selected from a pool of 9 candidates**** _yesterday_****.** He was one of only 2 candidates in that pool that wasn't a 2020 presidential election-denier — and then he dropped out of the race in no small part because the election-denier wing of the House GOP found him unacceptable. Having worked in local government I can tell you this: if elected officials continually came close to failing to do their basic duty of keeping the lights on, _they would be fired by their constituents_. It's well past time to get back to work. [**Will you help me unseat Republican Rep. Lori Chavez-DeRemer with a contribution of $19 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72116029/434350749/974409837?refcode=2023-10-24-speaker&recurring=&amount=19&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=83f28364-b972-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2YyODM2NC1iOTcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VfbWytMdjD0GyWYYoQemI8mhCfK1WE7QJgg94Uv4uls=) Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

My opponent Lori Chavez-DeRemer flipped one of the decisive House districts last year, and Kevin McCarthy owed his majority to members like her. She made sure to make as few public statements as possible during this shutdown debate — but she _did_ make time to vote for the GOP's preferred budget plan (one that, thankfully, did not pass).
**Chavez-DeRemer is on the record having voted to:**
* severely cut to aid for millions of working families
* make college less affordable
* make it harder for parents to send their kids to school
* make housing harder to find, and
* make food less accessible.

Great leadership all around, huh?
Republicans wanted to force America to choose between a cruel and unfair budget or a government shutdown, and my opponent would've been very happy had this budget passed.
What do they have to show for the 45 days a continuing resolution granted them? Quite literally, nothing. No progress, no legislation, no solutions — hell, they can't even keep a Speaker nominee in the running for more than a few hours.
[**Now, we need to hold Republicans like Chavez-DeRemer accountable for their weak "leadership," join this movement by chipping in $19 today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72116035/434350755/974409837?refcode=2023-10-24-speaker&recurring=&amount=19&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=83f28364-b972-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2YyODM2NC1iOTcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VfbWytMdjD0GyWYYoQemI8mhCfK1WE7QJgg94Uv4uls=)
If the last few weeks have shown us anything, it's that it's time for some new voices in Congress — and that fake-moderate Republicans like my opponent have had their chance and failed.
The people of the 5th District deserve better, and I'm more determined than ever to fight for them.
_Lynn_

| | Patriot,

---
Yesterday, President Trump filed the official paperwork to appear on the ballot in the FIRST PRIMARY of the 2024 election.

---
It signified a pivotal moment in the race for the White House.

---
Now, there is another important filing to take care of...

---
...As we approach the end of the year, we will soon close the books on the final roster of Founding Members of _**THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST**_ – authorized by President Trump earlier this year in order to defend our movement from the never-ending witch hunts.

---
The 2024 election will not be an ordinary election in which voters simply choose which candidate has the better set of ideas.

---
Rather, 2024 will be consumed by a series of never-ending witch hunts designed to destroy President Trump, and above all, our movement.

---
That’s why President Trump is depending on his Founding Members of _**THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST**_ to defend our movement.

---
And if you choose to accept your invitation as a Founding Member, _**YOU**_ will be a critical defender of our movement.

---

clean_body: More important paperwork... involving YOU.| | | | | Patriot, Yesterday, President Trump filed the official paperwork to appear on the ballot in the FIRST PRIMARY of the 2024 election. It signified a pivotal moment in the race for the White House. Now, there is another important filing to take care of... ...As we approach the end of the year, we will soon close the books on the final roster of Founding Members of THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST – authorized by President Trump earlier this year in order to defend our movement from the never-ending witch hunts. The 2024 election will not be an ordinary election in which voters simply choose which candidate has the better set of ideas. Rather, 2024 will be consumed by a series of never-ending witch hunts designed to destroy President Trump, and above all, our movement. That’s why President Trump is depending on his Founding Members of THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST to defend our movement. And if you choose to accept your invitation as a Founding Member, YOU will be a critical defender of our movement. | | THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST Invitation for: dpwillis67@gmail.com Founding Member Acceptance:: PENDING | | | Thank you, Team Trump | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. subject: It’s time for Congress to get working again

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72116161/434351279/972226503?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGNkNmIxNS1iYTcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3nl1tJ5Sr4Ip3QiZjf7a283q0eGphOP4xAyhHFzKOW4=) Hey team, it’s been _three weeks_ since Republicans in the House kicked out their own Speaker — and they don’t seem any closer to getting Congress back to work. Look, no matter what far-right chaos is going on in the House, I’ll always keep focused on kitchen table economic issues affecting working families and getting results for mid-Michigan. **But if we _really_ want to get Congress moving and working for the people again, Democrats need to win back the House. And that means I need to hold onto my Republican-leaning seat.** [_**Working Michiganders can’t afford two more years of Republican-led dysfunction — that’s why I’m asking: Will you chip in $5 to help me win my battleground race and keep MI-08 in Democratic control? body:
you’ve been handpicked to sign
| **Leader Hakeem Jeffries Stands Strong with Unified Caucus as GOP Civil War Intensifies** Listen, Rep. Hakeem Jeffries has been an INCREDIBLE leader for Democrats while the MAGA mob has spent the entire year ripping itself to pieces.

**So we’re giving 500 top Democrats the opportunity to show Rep. Jeffries our appreciation for all his hard work!**[**We’re hand-delivering this letter to his office at 8 AM tomorrow – so we need your signature by MIDNIGHT! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55841?t=6&akid=11450%2E878179%2EvfWjUx) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55841?t=7&akid=11450%2E878179%2EvfWjUx) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55841?t=8&akid=11450%2E878179%2EvfWjUx)
---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

MAGA Republicans have done nothing but tear themselves apart since they seized control of Congress. **Even ousting their own Speaker!**

While they’re busy waging a civil war, you’ve stood strong for the American people, our democracy, and President Biden’s groundbreaking agenda.

**Your continued strength gives me hope that Democrats can take back the House in 2024 and end the MAGA circus for good.**

**We’re so grateful to have you leading the way!** [**That’s why today I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my appreciation and to help Democrats flip the 5 seats we need to WIN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55841?t=9&akid=11450%2E878179%2EvfWjUx) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55841?t=10&akid=11450%2E878179%2EvfWjUx) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55841?t=11&akid=11450%2E878179%2EvfWjUx)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11450%2E878179%2EvfWjUx). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11450%2E878179%2EvfWjUx).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=11450%2E878179%2EvfWjUx) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=11450%2E878179%2EvfWjUx). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=11450%2E878179%2EvfWjUx)

body:
| | |
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=da1879b7d6fe407b9dcd0abd71046ea8&_e=1EzDH9wHgVQcMQelIFGBWWgnx5hsF2YxF10pmBMg1a738nqab2CbVrxPF8oXQSPYIwRoMK5AvvZr2nZouUBrgoQEIZY3FI30rjTXvWR_2utz75dMAXQfIGwuGqML1N9PKKTX8LOt83D0itnvWB-LlyfXyDnBQCzRC0lbiZYizqMh8wZV1KUvTAOU25ah1SegorGXf1LxyxHNOCKI1JZime-yWL1c-ivLMR5x0eGisSGUh7YOYfmEEdjlM2yQ8EiZJV8Ir-0DFQfwCuMwd-Aj5PL4CPHdZeks9DP-68k5AXpyhXcWjbcGR7j5lzyjN1VyO5In1dM0yDiIEUFwX7ACuZQGJbi5lbD4cQilfOVbL6ZCct7ZKWa0MhumxnLHLkmKHqtIH-tVmwBeu-czuKX6qrlPucv3eqODP7g99cVZ6qs%3D)

My name is Mike Rogers, **[I’m running for Senate, and I need your help.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=da1879b7d6fe407b9dcd0abd71046ea8&_e=1EzDH9wHgVQcMQelIFGBWWgnx5hsF2YxF10pmBMg1a738nqab2CbVrxPF8oXQSPYIwRoMK5AvvZr2nZouUBrgoQEIZY3FI30rjTXvWR_2utz75dMAXQfIGwuGqML1N9PKKTX8LOt83D0itnvWB-LlyfXyDnBQCzRC0lbiZYizqMh8wZV1KUvTAOU25ah1SegorGXf1LxyxHNOCKI1JZime-yWL1c-ivLMR5x0eGisSGUh7YOYfmEEdjlM2yQ8EiZJV8Ir-0DFQfwCuMwd-Aj5BXln7nHW7QWE1afanytyIgUxw9_DSvfnP_RA_CkhpJ1Fh7Prts00Wj0MPdwjtJAjNJiIAHZofIrbGM3yHG_2ABgeffz-xEjPC73mL26tSkm489C-Dz7-2f4zRfnObxVnmNT-reQ_oErLl6MTfRrOEM%3D)** Here’s why my campaign’s different: **[I’m leaving behind my private life to identify, dismantle, and destroy the deep-rooted corruption within our nation’s Federal Law Enforcement agencies.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=da1879b7d6fe407b9dcd0abd71046ea8&_e=1EzDH9wHgVQcMQelIFGBWWgnx5hsF2YxF10pmBMg1a738nqab2CbVrxPF8oXQSPYIwRoMK5AvvZr2nZouUBrgoQEIZY3FI30rjTXvWR_2utz75dMAXQfIGwuGqML1N9PKKTX8LOt83D0itnvWB-LlyfXyDnBQCzRC0lbiZYizqMh8wZV1KUvTAOU25ah1SegorGXf1LxyxHNOCKI1JZime-yWL1c-ivLMR5x0eGisSGUh7YOYfmEEdjlM2yQ8EiZJV8Ir-0DFQfwCuMwd-Aj5P2mXHpolEsZlLAb-xf8ndhUUiMLlI6fgAW6mTE4JM-tHBpRBXon34dV8fxGmtrQyt8xLa_9P4IGsQt8WbJk1Y0cYgkaDiz-ALcOM8yOFW64B0KpIvEcuf6By-4Ss16uk9FJACBoG6PmHagcbiST7sQ%3D)** First and foremost I want to tell you this — I’m not running because I want the money. I’m not running because I want to cozy up to the establishment and be invited to exclusive elite events. I’m not running because it’s an easy path for me and my family. I’m running because somebody with my experience MUST stand up to Joe Biden, his corrupt DOJ and FBI, and put an end to his blatant corruption. My entire career has been defined by public service. I served for years in the military and the FBI. I was the chairman of the House Intelligence Committee. I know our nation’s federal law enforcement like no one else running for public office today — and frankly... name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Humbly asking you to contribute $5 or $10 today. PLEASE give me a chance to explain.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
These goals are not arbitrary made up numbers. They are what we need to win.
#

Peter -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make your first online contribution to my campaign for Senate. Now, I don't expect you to donate to every email or text we send, but I do hope you'll contribute in response to this one.
Please give me a chance to explain:
One week from today, we close the books on our October fundraising deadline, and right now we're short of our goals for the month.
Now, don’t panic. The sky isn’t falling yet. But we do need to catch up. So here are a few important reasons to chip in $5 or $10 and help us hit those goals.
1\. Kyrsten Sinema has a huge cash-on-hand advantage over us right now. She’s raised massive sums of money from the wealthy and well-connected. And that makes sense, because that’s who she represents in the Senate.
2\. Kari Lake is in this race. Right now. She launched her campaign earlier this month, and she’s been attacking me directly online and in the media ever since. And with Trump’s endorsement, she’s surely raking in the MAGA cash.
3\. By this point in previous Arizona races, outside groups had opened up with multi-million dollar broadsides of attack ads. It’s been quiet here so far, but that could change any day now. We have to be ready — and we need to be able to fight back.
So please. These goals are not arbitrary made up numbers. They are what we need to win. That's why I am asking:
[**Can I count on you to use this link to contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to my campaign for Senate in Arizona? It will all add up fast if everyone chips in what they can today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231024-2&t=1&akid=1372%2E734936%2EcR9_W1)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

---

| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-oct23.sGe5d1&refcode=em231024-2&t=21&akid=1372%2E734936%2EcR9_W1)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-oct23.w_T1Qs&refcode=em231024-2&t=22&akid=1372%2E734936%2EcR9_W1)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-oct23.GsFzby&refcode=em231024-2&t=23&akid=1372%2E734936%2EcR9_W1)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-oct23.T1UQyl&refcode=em231024-2&t=24&akid=1372%2E734936%2EcR9_W1)**

****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-oct23.Ns39yQ&refcode=em231024-2&t=25&akid=1372%2E734936%2EcR9_W1)**

****
Thank you in advance for chipping-in today. I am so thankful for this team.
Ruben Gallego

body:
In just TWO WEEKS we have a chance to defend our reproductive rights at the ballot box →

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72116542/434352837/-1743337223?refcode=em_eng_2023.10.24_b1_te_all-nd&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTEyZDJkZi1iYjcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cayhCPnRd_bKqxRkg-K1jdJMdhAmdeOK9-5elV34coI=) **Peter, there’s a critical election in just TWO WEEKS, and we want to make sure you’re ready to cast your vote.**

Earlier this month we told you about Issue 1 or _The Right to Reproductive Freedom with Protections for Health and Safety_ – which, if enacted, would defend our reproductive rights and ensure that personal medical decisions stay personal.

**Right now,_early voting is happening!_** There’s nothing more important than defending our freedoms. So please, Peter, make a plan to vote **YES on Issue 1 on or before November 7!** | [**FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72116543/434352843/-2001625320?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTEyZDJkZi1iYjcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cayhCPnRd_bKqxRkg-K1jdJMdhAmdeOK9-5elV34coI=&emci=53689acf-af72-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=7512d2df-bb72-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=11703046)

It’s going to take all of us to defend our fundamental rights, so please, Peter, be sure to vote YES on Issue 1!

– _Team Emilia_

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **As the _State Representative for Akron_ and _Ohio's State House Minority Leader_ , _Emilia cut through the divisiveness to deliver results_.**

[**Can we count on you to chip in a few dollars to Emilia's campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72116545/434352845/-1743337223?refcode=em_eng_2023.10.24_b1_te_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTEyZDJkZi1iYjcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cayhCPnRd_bKqxRkg-K1jdJMdhAmdeOK9-5elV34coI=) | [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72116546/434352846/-1743337223?refcode=em_eng_2023.10.24_b1_te_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTEyZDJkZi1iYjcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cayhCPnRd_bKqxRkg-K1jdJMdhAmdeOK9-5elV34coI=)

Earlier this month we told you about Issue 1 or The Right to Reproductive Freedom with Protections for Health and Safety – which, if enacted, would defend our reproductive rights and ensure that personal medical decisions stay personal. Right now,early voting is happening! There’s nothing more important than defending our freedoms. So please, Peter, make a plan to vote YES on Issue 1 on or before November 7! | It’s going to take all of us to defend our fundamental rights, so please, Peter, be sure to vote YES on Issue 1! – Team Emilia A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change. name: Robert L
subject: Unbelievable!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
I didn't want to email you a third time today, so this one comes with some cartoon levity. These revelations in the news are too absurd not to keep you informed of what's happening on the Hill, so l et's correspond directly. Reply and let me know your thoughts on this Speaker debacle.
-Bob
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Americans have had enough!
Without the backing of the Freedom Caucus, Rep. Emmer has dropped out and it's back to square one for the GOP.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
The dysfunction in Washington is unbelievable and unprecedented. It's crystal clear my opponent, Rep. Jack Bergman is not an answer, but how can the GOP not find a single unifying leader?
If you're able, and haven't given recently , please help us fund some National outreach [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] to encourage Congress to get back to work.
CONTRIBUTE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
actblue.com/donate/about-bob [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Regardless of political affiliation — Republican, Democrat, Independent — Americans have grown tired of the ongoing political gridlock in Congress. The power-plays, the politicking, and the power broking needs to end immediately.
The lack of consensus among Republicans, including those in the ultraconservative House Freedom Caucus and loyalists to former President Trump, has prevented Rep. Emmer from being selected as the Republican's speaker-elect. He dropped out.
It is absolutely unacceptable for one branch of the government to be this dysfunctional. We are witnessing an attempt to destroy democracy, with an extreme minority of a single party holding Congress hostage.
Both parties must come together to select a candidate who will work for all Americans. Now is the time for cooperation, collaboration, and compromise.
It's a time for leadership to shine and for the courageous to act. We must heal, mend fences, and move forward for the betterment of all Americans.
It is imperative that the next vote for Speaker has a majority of Congress voting 'Yes.' Whatever happens, I need you in my corner for 2024 to bring function and integrity back to the House for Michigan's 1st District.
Thank you for your support, loyalty, and generosity.
Bob
Dr. Bob Lorinser, MD, MSW, MPH
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan and the UP
Democrat, MI01
CONTRIBUTE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]

"Friends of Dr. Bob"
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855

name: Ronna McDaniel
subject: The GOP will ALWAYS stand with Israel
body:
Join us & sign our petition HERE.
[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c551c766f485480c8104dc89516a0c27&_e=zwOr5rWoJWEJV0IDfleunvuRDy4nikPTPsyeu-_cfB8_RCE7iukfBAri0vNFZsNHpLDjopu4IaWwL3EaKiQtX-RuUKcubHvBAYFSkzwYczCGfIiOzKB4kI210_LaKpqc-SrnCkTXv-XInEddXZK5LcwiJmSSqJaeN_rUjhZQSmZeen4ET7DZ3sacbBKHfi1fL8QYLobBKsZ_C1Ksee2GNPQ93TKLSGLRUG0AXYZmSVqXGsO_0y6JLdc8HjkzNyOb-LpoOd2eRCEmDyBObvRy3uuP22kqOvCq9VVjmyrenEjhOcyxvpTbriiLMeV0W8BQ16NPrcpoL4vMFZg_unKG9DeJ8ekt85duLaAs5EReL2t4-3hqGAxObLNiPQvNMaDAzrMiRgbQVj9KqYWRZTpa6kJTfq97jlmUaGYqW6XEnXzJSDVngHHV3ygcqyquuT5BNU_ZPvPChleaKymXxUw4BJOQ_tcf2ZlNRJELieQUbGeHrDtC2JWWCoeolW_KLQi-33SjkLEMktZMGbXHN4btXw%3D%3D)

Friend,

Israel is under attack and innocent civilians are being held hostage.

_But what is Biden focused on?_ Defending his radical decision to appease Iran - **the world 's largest state sponsor of terror** - by unfreezing $6 BILLION in assets.

The Republican Party is very clear in our position, Friend. Hamas's barbaric attacks are pure evil, and we must ALL stand with Israel.

[>> STAND WITH ISRAEL <<](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c551c766f485480c8104dc89516a0c27&_e=zwOr5rWoJWEJV0IDfleunvuRDy4nikPTPsyeu-_cfB8_RCE7iukfBAri0vNFZsNHpLDjopu4IaWwL3EaKiQtX-RuUKcubHvBAYFSkzwYczCGfIiOzKB4kI210_LaKpqc-SrnCkTXv-XInEddXZK5LcwiJmSSqJaeN_rUjhZQSmZeen4ET7DZ3sacbBKHfi1fL8QYLobBKsZ_C1Ksee2GNPQ93TKLSGLRUG0AXYZmSVqXGsO_0y6JLdc8HjkzNyOb-LpoOd2eRCEmDyBObvRy3uuP22kqOvCq9VVjmyrenEjhOcyxvpTbriiLMeV0W8BQ16NPrcpoL4vMFZg_unKG9DeJ8ekt85duLaAs5EReL2t4-3hqGAxObLNiPQvNMaDA3Ha45DG40IuveRyauv5VxEHMA1g7sJoutkmrAj2wfWxC3L6JpfYkaXrzHuQVVf4k5N2_XL7RrThB7YzZ7QyBshPnVoqvWwM6Gdf0-VKfi8qiVclO34nV1kO5LHEW-6KJxaXFfQzeTujKp9PRzaUwZQ%3D%3D)

subject: KochPAC gives to Obernolte again

body:
| | |
Newly filed campaign finance reports reveal that KochPAC gave Rep. Jay Obernolte another $2,500 last quarter, a total of $13,500 since 2022.
Peter, we’re up against fossil-fuel conglomerates like Koch Industries that deny climate change and profit off pollution.
They need Rep. Jay Obernolte and a Republican majority in the House to slash taxes for billionaires and protect their profits.
Unlike his MAGA Republican opponent, Democrat Derek Marshall has taken _$0_ from KochPAC - or _any other_ corporate PAC.
**We can’t wait to act on climate. That’s why we’re challenging Democrats like you to donate $2500 to Derek’s campaign to beat the Koch’s latest investment in Jay Obernolte.**

Peter, we’re up against fossil-fuel conglomerates like Koch Industries that deny climate change and profit off pollution. They need Rep. Jay Obernolte and a Republican majority in the House to slash taxes for billionaires and protect their profits. Unlike his MAGA Republican opponent, Democrat Derek Marshall has taken $0 from KochPAC - or any other corporate PAC. We can’t wait to act on climate. That’s why we’re challenging Democrats like you to donate $2500 to Derek’s campaign to beat the Koch’s latest investment in Jay Obernolte. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Team -- In less than three years, the Biden-Harris administration has made _tremendous_ progress in addressing the nationwide epidemic of gun violence -- but President Biden is right: **we still have more work to do.**

**FIRST:** President Biden and Senate Democrats passed the most significant gun safety legislation in 30 years.

**THEN:** President Biden established the _first-ever_ White House Office of Gun Violence Prevention to expand efforts to keep Americans safe.

**AND NOW:** We need Democrats _everywhere_ to stand with President Biden and support his call for _more progress_ to STOP gun violence in our country!

# Trump’s legal issues answered:
We went from 1 candidate for Speaker of the House to 9 over the weekend. We’re back down to one tonight so stay tuned for the result.
Also Mike Davis from Article 3 Project breaks down the latest in legal cases against Trump.
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=4d69e60100&e=f6564bbe3b)
Don’t forget to subscribe and hit the bell to get notified every time a new episode drops.
Would also greatly appreciate it if you could subscribe to the audio version and give us a 5 star review. It really makes a big difference in growing this show and being able to put out great content at no cost to you all.

# A Story I Wrote...

[If Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin wants a Republican legislature in Richmond how they talk about abortion could shape the election outcome](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=229f120923&e=f6564bbe3b) — via The Hill
# Stories I’m Reading...
[Exclusive poll: Biden and Trump tie at 37% as RFK Jr. costs Trump a narrow lead ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=7a5f2c1a61&e=f6564bbe3b)— via USA Today
[In Iowa and New Hampshire a solid ground game is critical ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b4f6c7aaf0&e=f6564bbe3b)— via The Messenger
[No Labels sues Arizona to block opponents from using the new political party to run for office ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=1bb7df8d2e&e=f6564bbe3b)— via AP News
[Scoop: U.S. to send Israel artillery shells initially designated for Ukraine](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=d1a302313f&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Axios
[The United States Naval Academy is hiring a professor specializing in gender and sexual studies amid growing geopolitical turmoil that could test US military readiness ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=aeeb76c057&e=f6564bbe3b)— via National Review
[RFK Jr. comes out for reparations, carving out lane to Biden’s left ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3511d1a179&e=f6564bbe3b)— via New York Post

name: Nikki HQ
subject: Falling short could be scary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Hey team, In just one week, all the ghosts, ghouls, and goblins will take to the streets to celebrate Halloween. Next Tuesday also happens to be our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and the thought of falling short of our fundraising goal is scarier to our team than any spooky monster. We want to avoid as many horrors as possible, so we need all hands on deck to reach our goal, keep our campaign on track to reelect Nikki, and help secure our chances of taking back the House majority. **But this work takes a lot of resources.** With National Republicans prepared to flood money into this race to keep Nikki from continuing her work to invest in our infrastructure and secure funding to support farmers, advance farming technology, and grow our rural economies — we need all hands on deck. **[Can we count on you to help our team reach our critical October fundraising goal before midnight on October 31 by chipping in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72117133/434355279/2093963021?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20231024_PM1_T3_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTVmZGRmOC1iZTcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bzld40iIHKev3BXl3oOWpyamcuvDzf3FDNbmzTQU_xY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72117134/434355280/2093963021?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20231024_PM1_T3_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTVmZGRmOC1iZTcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bzld40iIHKev3BXl3oOWpyamcuvDzf3FDNbmzTQU_xY=) | | [EXPRESS DONATE: $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72117135/434355281/-2002594886?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20231024_PM1_T3_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTVmZGRmOC1iZTcyLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bzld40iIHKev3BXl3oOWpyamcuvDzf3FDNbmzTQU_xY=)

I’ve governed by bringing Democrats and Republicans together to meet in the middle. |

Hi, this is Kansas Governor Laura Kelly. I have an exciting announcement and wanted you to hear it from me first: Recently, I announced the launch of my Middle of the Road PAC! Middle of the Road PAC is dedicated to electing leaders who are laser-focused on common-sense policies that improve the lives of all Americans. I’ve always been a middle-of-the-road leader. It’s how I was successful in the Kansas Legislature, and it’s how I’ve governed – by bringing Democrats and Republicans together to meet in the middle. And I’m ready to work to elect the next group of leaders who will bring practical solutions for years to come. [**Now, I need your help to get Middle of the Road PAC off the ground so we can get to work electing the next era of leaders. For too long, we’ve been focused on political differences, and we’ve forgotten how to work together.
People expect their leaders to work together and pass common-sense policies like expanding Medicaid, funding our schools, and cutting taxes to help our families. And under my administration, the Kansas legislature has been able to accomplish so much by putting aside our differences and getting to work for our state.
I know we can continue to work together to find leaders who will put aside partisan games and meet in the middle to create lasting change.
[**Chip in $10, or whatever you can, to Middle of the Road PAC and Fight Like Hell PAC to help us get to work.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72117262/434355441/597083026?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20231024_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTNjMzQ0NGItYmY3Mi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OXDfHPqOTGLVSPdpgwiQVjN3MtmUf0avh18Kg-Q9HBI=)

Laura Kelly
