clean_body: I’ve governed by bringing Democrats and Republicans together to meet in the middle. | Hi, this is Kansas Governor Laura Kelly. I have an exciting announcement and wanted you to hear it from me first: Recently, I announced the launch of my Middle of the Road PAC! Middle of the Road PAC is dedicated to electing leaders who are laser-focused on common-sense policies that improve the lives of all Americans. I’ve always been a middle-of-the-road leader. It’s how I was successful in the Kansas Legislature, and it’s how I’ve governed – by bringing Democrats and Republicans together to meet in the middle. And I’m ready to work to elect the next group of leaders who will bring practical solutions for years to come. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Middle of the Road PAC and Fight Like Hell PAC will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = For too long, we’ve been focused on political differences, and we’ve forgotten how to work together. People expect their leaders to work together and pass common-sense policies like expanding Medicaid, funding our schools, and cutting taxes to help our families. And under my administration, the Kansas legislature has been able to accomplish so much by putting aside our differences and getting to work for our state. I know we can continue to work together to find leaders who will put aside partisan games and meet in the middle to create lasting change. = Thank you, Laura Kelly = Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

Friend, Washington's out of control -- and our only hope to get this country back on track is by making sure we secure a Republican Majority in 2024.

That doesn't just mean taking back the Senate, winning the White House, or increasing our majority in the House.

[**We need a FULL SWEEP of Washington, D.C. if we 're going to get this country back on track!**](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=e498c829a09a4693af74ba5c650a597e&_e=dTevXYi4yvJZ4yYzvjtywRtBERiyb1PN6okWyDoE1eypqKdBrMc4qIOuSJYlxZqRpDM7f3RiVZPwllyM9hTML894IJ4xnvsaNVd9PKYSTstWBpXOSV_mw-25jekkO_OzOng92TZsZL7u3CZUdV1sD2Fa1axWeWT_aG_aklzbH1FlDZ5ltDyBmtDQrBGOEFrSGSpaphvbP_m6iLfCKEg6rsM072tRkUQl9h4FMhkZwQ7hGqm5PrJ2L86NytFnQMavGQH0sXAReogtLMDDku_pR5b3ZlvS5EIWsVFeQ2fGTdE%3D)

Hi Peter,
Reproductive Freedom for All – formerly known as NARAL Pro-Choice America – has just endorsed Raquel Terán for Congress as a “champion” for reproductive rights.
We don’t have to remind you that access to legal and safe abortion is under assault across this country and it’s time for Congress to step up and act. Sign on to our Reproductive Rights team and tell Congress to protect our rights >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5vgcBLvItEiAQTP3Iq8ZGg2]
Reproductive Freedom for All has been in the fight for abortion rights, access to birth control, parental leave policies, and pregnancy protections for over 50 years so they know how serious the stakes are in 2024. They’re endorsing Raquel because they know Raquel’s the only candidate in this race with a record taking on and beating extreme Republicans on abortion.
“Anti-abortion House Republicans are hell-bent on ramming through a national abortion ban, and we need to take back the House in 2024 to stop them. The champions we are endorsing today know that abortion access matters to Americans and are boldly leading with their plans to protect and restore our rights across the country. That’s why Reproductive Freedom for All is proud to endorse them, and we’re ready to get to work and ensure they’re elected next November.”
Reproductive Freedom for All President and CEO Mini Timmaraju
As a legislator, Raquel traveled to El Salvador, where there’s currently a total ban on abortions. She met with women who were incarcerated for having obstetric emergencies or miscarriages. These are terrifying realities that we must fight back against. Join us in support of reproductive freedoms >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5vgcBLvItEiAQTP3Iq8ZGg2]
In Congress, you can bet she will fight to protect access to abortion and expand health care for everyone.
Sí se puede,
Team Terán

For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.
She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.
Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_102423_RFforallendorsement]

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: An important update after my trip to the Middle East
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72117949/434358183/623074613?refcode=jtk1352-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjZlYzc4YzMtYzE3Mi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sAK02e2nEVOw_UPg-4IaGcKzs95CMEn_g9OBMjF1DbM=&emci=b446ba49-5772-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=b6ec78c3-c172-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=9329426)
---
Friend,

I’ve just arrived back to the United States from the Middle East where, along with nine of my Senate colleagues, I met with leaders in Saudi Arabia, Egypt, and Israel. Our bipartisan delegation pressed Saudi Arabia and Egypt to serve as regional counterweights to Hamas, Iran, and Hezbollah. We reaffirmed our unshakeable commitment to Israel as it fights to defend itself, and our belief that regional cooperation can limit civilian suffering. I’d like to give you an update on the outcomes of this trip and speak to the national security inflection point in which our nation and its allies find ourselves. Hamas is a hideous terrorist organization that launched an unspeakable, staggering assault on Israel beginning Oct 7. More than 1,400 Israelis, most of them civilians, were slaughtered in their homes or at a music festival. Hamas has taken hundreds of Israelis hostage, as well as other foreign nationals including Americans. I met with family members of these hostages while overseas, pledging America’s solidarity and support to return these loved ones home. Similarly, in Europe, Vladimir Putin has launched unspeakable horrors on Ukraine. Ukrainians have been butchered, and their very democracy hangs in the balance as Putin, a ruthless tyrant, continues to wage war on Ukraine’s rightful sovereignty. History teaches us if terror is left unchecked and unchallenged – if Israel and Ukraine fall to the likes of terrorists and tyrants – terror and tyranny will not stop at their borders. **Our nation’s security interests are endangered in Israel and Ukraine. Democracies must unite against invasion. Standing with our allies is an investment in our own national security.** But America can’t bear the brunt of allyship alone. Just as we’ve led the world in rallying to Ukraine’s aid, we must use our influence to rally support for lifesaving humanitarian assistance for all who need it in Gaza and Israel, for Israel’s right to defend itself, and for long lasting peace and security in the Middle East. That’s why the first stop for my Senate colleagues and I was Saudi Arabia, where we met with Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman. I’ve been an especially loud critic of the Saudi regime. I raised my concerns about their human rights abuses and pressed them for normalization of relations with Israel. Saudi Arabia must demonstrate a serious commitment to peace and human rights, and that can begin by working with the United States as a partner in deterring Hamas, Iran, and Hezbollah. In Israel, we reaffirmed our commitment to Israel, its right to defend itself, and the imperative to destroy Hamas. When meeting with Israelis whose family members had been taken hostage by Hamas, I saw my own family. I told them this. I have a cousin fighting in the IDF against Hamas. After visiting with Egyptian President Sisi, I am very hopeful that Egypt will play an even greater role in enabling more assistance – fuel, water, electricity – to reach the people of Gaza who are suffering so desperately right now. **Having returned to Washington, I will do everything in my power to pass the broad aid package for Israel and Ukraine that President Biden has proposed. This package is exactly the right move. Israel and Ukraine need our support now to protect their independence, and this is what will deliver it.** Thank you, Dick
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/p3FPDNcG3USxiOP5q9s2qQ2?unsubscribedata=6SI43mdYxw6qaoYgpTLCN%2BZxB0919N6bknQcazK0tOSS%2F5x%2BVNkHQvoqUyZvGgfHjBwMVaFcHTAKNNh9ryDwYMvNezeahOXPAISzt5pqbX8KrfaXbSH1KCadGn2Urozc7psc3auPbuF54Jzw1utzupyY4FL4R7aryIm7CZXAsj8fQVDhTEl6iz3paKqvXrILmTwjULCAbiiCNVSS4d9B7YWlX5zs%2FOu6ce%2FdXKbhBcxDZihejSofIpGE6ba16wEOqWV%2B%2BlU9L%2FjlSXx%2FMl%2BN8dIjD4Tb%2BETr4xZORhRSP0R5r3y1zKO%2BrBhR1zPV%2B3iL7GJwMaqBrHXHKaDNuOwap9%2BFJLeLkcqbt%2Fnd5cucA%2BZYMoQe2PXp2thZ32tbz%2FZ4JSGxmMY1JkJJzehHo7mxkNllShKL0irS9ubCM18Ceiy%2F3D44pxyGbHHxzImZAU1C) | | Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

subject: The real reason the left hates school choice... it may surprise you
body:
[Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=a501b9a273f142daa0fce5427c88d606&_t=PqWwzBFnrfPVYt2apc65HI-kcH0trtIouPsn3Mifvg8dgmMerniJI0nz3wEzqqtelMxwS74Ud8Os-T55v6AFcwvGNGFym70WDVNNi2nfCSI%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=a501b9a273f142daa0fce5427c88d606&_t=PqWwzBFnrfPVYt2apc65HI-kcH0trtIouPsn3Mifvg8dgmMerniJI0nz3wEzqqtelMxwS74Ud8Os-T55v6AFcwvGNGFym70WDVNNi2nfCSI%3D)

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a501b9a273f142daa0fce5427c88d606&_e=HIyTRwBepxM2TLhR3XC7k7uBVllQye6dMGS5ZLxBGEKKQwoNJ5uaB8umIIRoveLndxTp3gEQRmZvX1X7D2e8eEuvPW1bfRiGH658wAOrF_dqHYFMjYPo67_OUtpy6ldP7jdvmIcRrYumvHszhym5x24OOKFBQOb_cqS55gyvQyeSObf1hTnV3aOJMILX9FdHh1tXmbi6SzhVTG2Hnmc_PVR7qObd0HHTOMaGDF3Eg9yFXpnlUKjo-4v5BA6hb4PQ)

Fellow Conservative,

Why does the radical left not want parents to have control over their kids' education? Every child who leaves a failing school means fewer dollars for their public school union allies. Cash is their focus -- not education.

I want to introduce you today to my friend, Victor Riches, who runs the Goldwater Institute. Victor and his team promote school choice across the nation with major successes.

Before I explain how they are fighting for school choice, I have a personal favor to ask of you.

[Fellow Conservative, I told Victor I would help raise $30,000 online to support the Goldwater Institute. The Goldwater Institute needs your support to expand its programs. Can you please donate $10, $35, $100, or any amount you can give today? Please click here or below to donate.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a501b9a273f142daa0fce5427c88d606&_e=HIyTRwBepxM2TLhR3XC7k7uBVllQye6dMGS5ZLxBGEKKQwoNJ5uaB8umIIRoveLndxTp3gEQRmZvX1X7D2e8eISa0H8WSCoranjOXhKwsa1Hd021b735NYbNx6GByShFWwwwvlJiNxxfrraSLQp0vhGlagoefmn5ZzdZzMM7SlaxFoUwpOvl1S_8FE0ts0ua-CCgife7iLwOH4_itxQCkxFkzpgy32NJlNpTZaV3LaYqr86_3cC3KZrCCXu_n2Au)

[Donate >>](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a501b9a273f142daa0fce5427c88d606&_e=HIyTRwBepxM2TLhR3XC7k7uBVllQye6dMGS5ZLxBGEKKQwoNJ5uaB8umIIRoveLnzlj7ixPwW38F3HUrIubFysaMtSzhh2RD8va5SL9mkbhK-BPEfvF32c4SMdtJrXwOUivmV2OYLXR2oWqrFGsCr0GCZwX8hdQAvYlbfOjcAwD50kuZiTxkb_cScam6ayB99aI2UobCfPPF2g0D-EDL32ReNjoN035o5StjW2QzFqupnwicnodMFA2_w15FDxuv)

The Goldwater Institute passed the nation's first Universal School Choice program. It's a genius idea. Tax dollars follow students -- not failing school districts. If you're a parent concerned about the quality of your kids' education, you can now guarantee your children the education that best fits their needs.

School choice is smart. It's fiscally responsible. No wonder the leftist activists hate it so much!

But the Goldwater Institute isn't finished with their school choice work.

The Goldwater Institute has now passed school choice laws in 15 states, including Iowa, Michigan, and West Virginia. And they won't stop until they pass school choice laws in every state across the country!

So, why am I asking for your immediate support?

Here's the issue, Fellow Conservative.

clean_body: | Fellow Conservative, Why does the radical left not want parents to have control over their kids' education? Every child who leaves a failing school means fewer dollars for their public school union allies. Cash is their focus -- not education. I want to introduce you today to my friend, Victor Riches, who runs the Goldwater Institute. Victor and his team promote school choice across the nation with major successes. Before I explain how they are fighting for school choice, I have a personal favor to ask of you. The Goldwater Institute passed the nation's first Universal School Choice program. It's a genius idea. Tax dollars follow students -- not failing school districts. If you're a parent concerned about the quality of your kids' education, you can now guarantee your children the education that best fits their needs. School choice is smart. It's fiscally responsible. No wonder the leftist activists hate it so much! But the Goldwater Institute isn't finished with their school choice work. The Goldwater Institute has now passed school choice laws in 15 states, including Iowa, Michigan, and West Virginia. And they won't stop until they pass school choice laws in every state across the country! So, why am I asking for your immediate support? Here's the issue, Fellow Conservative. A growing counter-movement is developing to stop school choice. Powerful teacher unions and leftist special interests spend MILLIONS each year to prevent school choice legislation from passing. You can help fight for parents' rights in education this school year. The Goldwater Institute aims to raise $30,000 to promote the values of liberty. While House Republicans stall progress to a halt, Senate Democrats are united around our shared priorities.
This month alone, I’ve introduced legislation to make it easier for homeowners to install renewable energy systems like rooftop solar panels, protect New Mexico’s Pecos Watershed from mining accidents, and help New Mexico rebuild from the Cerro Pelado Fire.
Folks are relying on the results this legislation would bring, yet Republicans would rather in-fight about who to elect Speaker than get to work for the communities they represent.
**We can’t afford to let Republicans take back the Senate next year and stall our progress.**
But holding our Senate Majority won't be easy. Mitch McConnell only needs to flip **two** of the 23 seats we're defending — including mine in New Mexico — to take the Senate. That number goes down to _**one**_ if Republicans win the White House.

clean_body: Here’s why your support ahead of our campaign’s end-of-month deadline matters so much. Folks, even as you read this email, chaos is unfolding in the Republican-led House. That’s why I’m reaching out to make sure you don’t miss what the Democratic Senate Majority has been up to lately. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = While House Republicans stall progress to a halt, Senate Democrats are united around our shared priorities. This month alone, I’ve introduced legislation to make it easier for homeowners to install renewable energy systems like rooftop solar panels, protect New Mexico’s Pecos Watershed from mining accidents, and help New Mexico rebuild from the Cerro Pelado Fire. Folks are relying on the results this legislation would bring, yet Republicans would rather in-fight about who to elect Speaker than get to work for the communities they represent. We can’t afford to let Republicans take back the Senate next year and stall our progress. But holding our Senate Majority won't be easy. Mitch McConnell only needs to flip two of the 23 seats we're defending — including mine in New Mexico — to take the Senate. That number goes down to one if Republicans win the White House. That’s why it’s so important we meet every single fundraising milestone to ensure we have the resources to carry out our plans.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you for being a part of our work to keep the Senate in Democratic hands. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Sen. Rick Scott
subject: Here's the truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,

Career politicians care about 2 things -
---
1. What their donors think and;
2. What the DC establishment thinks.

---
_That’s never sat right with me..._ I was elected to serve the people of Florida, not Washington politicians and special interest groups that wave their money around. **I’ve even challenged some of the establishment's favorite politicians.** I’ve made some enemies here, but I didn’t come to DC to make friends. I came here to make Washington work for everyday Floridians. My mission to take on the establishment isn’t done, but now, I need your help. **[Since I can’t count on Washington insiders to help me keep FLORIDA RED, I’m calling on trusted conservatives. clean_body: | | | Peter, Career politicians care about 2 things - 1. What their donors think and; 2. What the DC establishment thinks. That’s never sat right with me... I was elected to serve the people of Florida, not Washington politicians and special interest groups that wave their money around. I’ve even challenged some of the establishment's favorite politicians. I’ve made some enemies here, but I didn’t come to DC to make friends. I came here to make Washington work for everyday Floridians. My mission to take on the establishment isn’t done, but now, I need your help. | | | | | | I’ll never answer to the swamp, Peter. That’s not what Floridians elected me to do. The truth is, I’m proud to be an outsider in Washington. To me, that means I’m doing my job.** | | | | | | Thank you, Sen. Claim your set of "Help, I'm Lost" Golf Balls today! Become an Official Member of Team Rick Scott by claiming your 2024 Membership Card! Socialism sucks, simple as that. Claim your "Socialism Sucks" T-Shirt today and let socialists know that they are not welcome in Florida! | A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott: Joe Biden’s America includes record-high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: 21 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
All we've gotten from the GOP this year is chaos.
#
It’s been 21 days since Republicans kicked out their Speaker. Let’s take a look back.
The GOP’s first pick was Steve Scalise, who withdrew after 24 hours because the **self-described ‘David Duke without the baggage’** didn’t have the support to win.
The next choice for Speaker was Jim Jordan, **a 2020 election denier and Trump cheerleader** , who lost 3 rounds of votes on the House floor because colleagues were turned off by the death threats they were getting from his supporters.
This afternoon, Tom Emmer became the nominee — even though far-right extremists don’t like him for supporting gay marriage _and_ certifying Biden’s election.
About 4 hours later, Emmer dropped out. **Chaos.**
[The ‘far left’ and the ‘far right’ are often compared, but while MAGA Republicans dismantle their party with extremism, Alexandria is fighting for universal healthcare, a $15 minimum wage and other just policies. Will you make a $5 contribution today to power her campaign for real progress?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231024.fOiD4v&refcode=em20231024-5208-P_FND_EXP_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5208%2E2526796%2Ezryebl)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231024.fOiD4v&refcode=em20231024-5208-P_FND_EXP_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5208%2E2526796%2Ezryebl)**
While Republicans waste precious time wrangling their extremist caucus, all legislation, all votes, and **all of the work Congress should be doing to avoid another shutdown is suspended.**
The government is on course to run out of funding in a month, and a deadly conflict is raging in Israel and Palestine. Republicans' chaotic leadership is dangerous.
We need to send Republicans a message that **our movement is stronger than their extremism.**
[Alexandria is working nonstop to fight Republican chaos and extremism, and for real change for all of us. Will you make a $5 contribution right now to keep her fighting in Congress? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231024.fOiD4v&refcode=em20231024-5208-P_FND_EXP_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5208%2E2526796%2Ezryebl)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231024.fOiD4v&refcode=em20231024-5208-P_FND_EXP_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=5208%2E2526796%2Ezryebl)**
We will keep you updated as more develops during this government standstill.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=5208%2E2526796%2Ezryebl) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=5208%2E2526796%2Ezryebl) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=5208%2E2526796%2Ezryebl)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Thousands of grassroots activists have already stepped up to endorse Debbie's campaign — but your signature is MISSING. | | | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

The first $6,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $3,300/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $3,300/$5,000 for the general election. The next $41,300/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting contact@joebiden.com. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. clean_body: | = New Faces in Congress: Rep. Jared Moskowitz, the Gun Safety Crusader from Florida | = Jared has been fighting for gun safety for his whole career. After Parkland, Jared worked with his Florida colleagues across the aisle — many of whom were rated A+ by the NRA — and PASSED the Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School Public Safety Act. It raised the age to buy guns from 18 to 21 and instituted red flag laws, which have been used more than 9,000 times since 2018. This was all done with bipartisan support under a Republican legislature and signed into law by a Republican governor. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you — it means so much. name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: Everything you need to know about Missouri’s U.S. Senate race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter,
**Here’s a look at Missouri’s U.S. Senate race by the numbers:**
After his actions on January 6th, Josh Hawley made himself the most vulnerable GOP U.S. Senator up for re-election in 2024. **A recent _Morning Consult_ poll found his approval at just 44% among Missouri voters.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38704?refcode=em20231024-4052&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4052%2E614464%2ED650Us)
Our grassroots movement is taking advantage of this historic opportunity to replace Hawley. **With your help, we’ve raised more than $3.9 million to elect Lucas Kunce since January** — the most ever raised by a Senate challenger’s campaign at this point in Missouri, without a cent from corporate PACs.
We’re starting to see some early movement in the polls, too. **New polling recently showed Lucas and Hawley in a statistical tie, with 12% of voters still undecided.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38704?refcode=em20231024-4052&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4052%2E614464%2ED650Us)
Our momentum has national insiders seriously worried about this race. In July, they launched a new GOP Super PAC to make Hawley look strong while they fund even more desperate attacks about Lucas. **And just last week we learned that national Republicans transferred another $500,000+ into Hawley’s campaign in Q3.**
These insiders have made it clear that Missouri is their top defensive target in 2024, so our campaign has a long fight ahead. But here’s the good news: **Every $1 here in Missouri goes nearly 5x as far as in states like Texas and Florida.**
With smaller media markets and less ground to cover, we’ll be able to get Lucas’ message across the state and start contacting voters earlier than ever before. **But with about 230,000 split-ticket voters to reach before November 5, 2024, we can’t afford to go dark for even one day.**
So Peter:
**[Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can afford today so we can keep reaching voters with Lucas’ election-winning message and defeat Josh Hawley next year? Lucas isn’t taking a penny from corporate PACs in this race, so we’re counting on your support every step of the way.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38704?refcode=em20231024-4052&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4052%2E614464%2ED650Us)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38705?refcode=em20231024-4052&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=4052%2E614464%2ED650Us) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38705?refcode=em20231024-4052&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=4052%2E614464%2ED650Us) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38705?refcode=em20231024-4052&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=4052%2E614464%2ED650Us) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38705?refcode=em20231024-4052&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=4052%2E614464%2ED650Us) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38705?refcode=em20231024-4052&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=4052%2E614464%2ED650Us) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38705?refcode=em20231024-4052&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=4052%2E614464%2ED650Us) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38704?refcode=em20231024-4052&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=4052%2E614464%2ED650Us)
---
Thanks for all your help,
Team Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20231024-4052-footer&t=11&refcode2=4052_614464_D650Us&akid=4052%2E614464%2ED650Us)**

If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=4052%2E614464%2ED650Us). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

name: South Bay CRA
subject: 2023 CRA Presidential Endorsing Convention.
body:
2023 CRA Presidential Endorsing Convention. We wanted to let you know about the 2023 CRA Presidential Endorsing Convention. Also the FORMAL RECEPTIO
| |
---
|
---
# 2023 CRA Presidential Endorsing Convention.
---
---
|
---
# We wanted to let you know about the 2023 CRA Presidential Endorsing Convention.
Also the FORMAL RECEPTION FEATURING DR. SEBASTIAN GORKA.
Blessed and Free
**Nena Gates**
President
nenarenae2@gmail.com
## 2023 CRA Presidential Endorsing Convention
---
|
---
The 2023 CRA Presidential Endorsing Convention will be held on Saturday, November 4 at the Hilton Orange County/Costa Mesa Hotel in Costa Mesa.
EVENT DETAILS:
When: November 04, 2023, 9:00 AM to 4:00 PM
Where: Hilton Orange County/Costa Mesa, 3050 Bristol Street, Costa Mesa, CA 92626
At this convention, we will:
hold endorsement votes for President and U.S. Senate;
consider amendments to the CRA Bylaws and resolutions; and
hear from guest speaker Trevor Loudon during the luncheon.
The early bird price for registration plus lunch is $85 through Tuesday, October 24. The price rises to $100 after October 24. To register for the convention, click this link.
There are a limited number of rooms available at the group rate of $165 (net of all taxes): 30 rooms with one king bed and 30 rooms with two queen beds. This special discounted rate is good only through Tuesday, October 24 and then goes up.
To reserve a room, call 1-800-HILTONS (1-800-445-8667) or book online by clicking this link.
About Trevor Loudon
Trevor Loudon is an author, filmmaker, and public speaker from Christchurch, New Zealand. For more than 30 years, he has researched radical left, Marxist and terrorist movements and their covert influences on mainstream politics.
For more information about Mr. Loudon, visit TrevorLoudon.com.
Recent video of Trevor Loudon:
|
---
# A Formal Reception Featuring Dr. Sebastian Gorka – Friday, November 3 in Costa Mesa
Dr. Sebastian Gorka
In 2008 Gorka moved to America with his family where he became a proud American citizen in 2012. He obtained his doctorate in Political Science from Corvinus University in Budapest and was a fellow at Harvard’s Kennedy School of Government. In Washington, he served as Associate Dean for Congressional Affairs and Relations to the Special Operations Community at National Defense University and has also taught on the Masters program at Georgetown University.
In 2020, President Donald Trump named Gorka to the National Security Education Board. This board provides strategic consultation and was established by congressional act in 1991.
Dr. Gorka has briefed the CIA, the DIA, the US Navy Seals, the Commandant of the Marine Corps, served as an expert for the DoJ during the Boston Bombing trial, and testified before Congress on the threat of Global Jihadism. He remains a guest instructor at the John F. Kennedy Special Warfare Center and School, at Fort Bragg, the home of the Green Berets.
Gorka writes for The Hill and has written two books for Regnery Publishing. His first “Defeating Jihad,” was a national best-seller and his latest, released in October, is called “Why We Fight...Defeating America’s Enemies with No Apologies.” Before launching his SALEM show, “AMERICA FIRST with Sebastian Gorka,” he was an advisor to candidate Donald J. Trump and served on the staff of the White House in 2017 as Deputy Assistant to the President for Strategy. Visit www.sebgorka.com for more information about Dr. Gorka.
|
---

We meet currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA

His first “Defeating Jihad,” was a national best-seller and his latest, released in October, is called “Why We Fight...Defeating America’s Enemies with No Apologies.” Before launching his SALEM show, “AMERICA FIRST with Sebastian Gorka,” he was an advisor to candidate Donald J. Trump and served on the staff of the White House in 2017 as Deputy Assistant to the President for Strategy. Visit www.sebgorka.com for more information about Dr. Gorka. | JOIN THE SBCRA TODAY We meet currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA If you want to Join the fight, you can get started at this link! ©2023 South Bay CRA | South Bay CRA == "Share this on Facebook" | == "Web Version" == "Preferences" == "Forward" "Unsubscribe" |

Hi there, it’s hard to believe that October is nearly over.

My team and I have been hard at work during these busy fall months -- from putting hundreds of miles on my car driving across beautiful AZ-01, to holding community events and spaces to converse with voters.

These travels across the district keep me motivated to turn this seat blue. The people of AZ-01 deserve much better representation than David Schweikert, and I can feel the momentum surge behind our campaign.

[**So before I share about our recent events in more detail, will you chip in $3 toward my campaign today? With a little over a year until the election, it’s critical that we keep moving forward together -- and I need you by my side.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72119176/434362545/-381882994?refcode=em-10.24.23-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2E4ZDk3YmEtYzg3Mi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nXgSuUZY5T-Cfh4WokfbNBWeiS0XXxdEqnG5tlOWCNk=)

Thank you,

Marlene

* * *
**Late last month, I was honored to sign the Arizona Abortion Initiative with my friend and endorser Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes.** Ensuring abortion and reproductive health care access for all women is one of my top priorities.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72119178/434362547/-381882994?refcode=em-10.24.23-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2E4ZDk3YmEtYzg3Mi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nXgSuUZY5T-Cfh4WokfbNBWeiS0XXxdEqnG5tlOWCNk=)
Over the last few weeks, our team has hosted and attended many events across the district where I have met with hundreds of voters. **It is extremely important to me that Arizonan voices are heard, respected, and centered in this campaign.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72119179/434362548/-381882994?refcode=em-10.24.23-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2E4ZDk3YmEtYzg3Mi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nXgSuUZY5T-Cfh4WokfbNBWeiS0XXxdEqnG5tlOWCNk=)
**I’ve met with voters in some of the LDs and other small voter groups in the district, to introduce myself and learn how I can best represent them, from Scottsdale to Fountain Hills.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72119180/434362549/-381882994?refcode=em-10.24.23-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2E4ZDk3YmEtYzg3Mi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nXgSuUZY5T-Cfh4WokfbNBWeiS0XXxdEqnG5tlOWCNk=)
I am so proud of our Arizona-driven, Arizona-focused campaign. **We recently reviewed the results from our latest fundraising quarter, and we received a resounding amount of support from Arizona and AZ-01 supporters.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72119181/434362550/-381882994?refcode=em-10.24.23-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2E4ZDk3YmEtYzg3Mi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nXgSuUZY5T-Cfh4WokfbNBWeiS0XXxdEqnG5tlOWCNk=)
Thank you for your support over the past few weeks and months. Our campaign is built by supporters like you!

I hope you will join recent endorsers including former Gov. Janet Napolitano, the National Education Association, and Professional Firefighters of Arizona by continuing to support our campaign. [**Can I count on you to chip in $3 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72119182/434362551/-381882994?refcode=em-10.24.23-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2E4ZDk3YmEtYzg3Mi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nXgSuUZY5T-Cfh4WokfbNBWeiS0XXxdEqnG5tlOWCNk=)

With thanks,

Marlene
